link: 11x385 - Arriving at Halfway Through the Grand Line! The Red Line
comment:
Hold Land of Marie Jois

Bartholomew Kuma-sama has returned!

Don't be ridiculous!

Bartholomew Kuma, you're telling me they escaped your powers?

Give me a better excuse than that!

I'm the one who has to report this to the top!

That's my grandson for you!

Quiet, Garp!

You were assigned a special government mission to eliminate them all,

yet you couldn't even bring back the head of Luffy of the Straw Hats?

You're a disgrace!

Don't worry, Sengoku.

Luffy isn't the sort of man who'd go around telling the world that he defeated Moria.

Kuma, you didn't take pity on those pirates because they were injured, did you?



Even if you let them escape, we will not stop pursuing them!

They're following the Log toward the Navy Headquarters as we speak!

Oh, that's right!

Tea

I brought fresh tea leaves!

Bring some rice crackers!

Damn it, Garp, shut up!

"Halfway Across the Grand Line! Arrival at the Red Line!"

What the heck is going on?

It's hopeless.

Oh, dear...

We're not catching a thing.

This is weird.

Times are tough...

Man, this is boring!

Now, let's be patient.

Hey, Nami!

Aren't we at Fishman Island yet? Huh? Huh?

Oh, give it a rest! I'm sure we're getting close!

Fishman... Mermaids!

Oh, beautiful mermaid!

Where is the mermaid I have dreamed of?!

Gah! I'm sick of this!

Sanji! I need food!

Is that...

Incredible! A huge school of fish!

You see? With some patience, everything works out!

Fish 'em all up!

They're coming this way!

Want to try it too, Nami?

What is it?

Something isn't right.

Huh?

Hey, wait up, fish!

That's...

This is...

What is that obviously foreboding look on your face?

Serpent Currents!

Serpent Currents?

Everyone, be careful!

It's almost like they're alive...

This looks a little dicey.

Well, this is quite...

Cool!

Sanji-kun!

Leave it to me, Nami-san!

It won't budge!

Weapons...

Left!

Hey! What are you doing?!

Steer the ship!

Shut up!

In these waves, it won't do what I tell it to!

Gum-Gum...

p*stol!

Are you all right?

Yeah! You saved us!

Serpent Currents...

They certainly do move like serpents.

They're very aptly named!

Hey, you! This is no time to be impressed!

Gum-Gum...

Gatling!

Star Shield!

We keep cutting them down, but there's no end to them!

How long are these currents gonna last?!

How much farther do they go on?!

Should we fly out of here with Coup de Burst?

Oh, yeah! That's one way!

It won't work!

I can't see any end to the currents.

Even if we fly away with Coup de Burst...

We can't escape them.

What?! No way!

Shall I play a song?

Huh?

At times like these, we need to boost morale!

All storms and currents will eventually recede.

Let's just be patient.

Sounds good, Brook! Go for it!

Then—

We're in the air!

Hey, we're...

...gonna fall!

Chopper!

I thought I was gonna die...

Hey, look!

That's...

I see it... I see it!

It's the Red Line!

The Red Line!

We finally made it this far!

There was a nasty storm that day, too...

I'm gonna find the All Blue!

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!

I'm gonna be a great swordsman!

I'm gonna make a map of the whole world!

I-I'm gonna become a brave warrior of the sea!

Let's go!

To the Grand Line!

Hey! I can see the Mystery Mountain!

It's gigantic!

The entrance to the Grand Line...

So that's the Red Line!

I-I can't even see the top through all the clouds!

It has taken me years...

Let's go, everyone!

That's...

It's huge!

Make sure you steer.

I don't want you giving me orders.

Should we use the paddles to retreat?

There's no time.

Sanji-kun! Get us on that wave!

You got it!

Wait, "get us on" it?!

Leave it to me!

I dealt with bigger stuff than this when I was on the Sky Island!

The Knock Up Stream, huh?

Yeah, that was really fun!

That wasn't fun at all!

Of course, there's no way this time is gonna be...

Go!

Now we can use Coup de Burst!

Lower the sails, everyone!

Here we go!

Coup de Burst!

Whew, we're saved!

Man, that was a close one.

We're here!

We finally made it here!

I can't see the top...

It's huge!

So this is the Red Line...

It's kind of nostalgic... Makes you feel really emotional, huh?

I wonder if we've grown a little since then...

I feel like crying!

So much has happened!

Anyway, we're halfway there now!

The Twin Capes, where we met Laboon,

are connected to this wall on the other side of the world.

I'm glad we all made it here together!

Apparently, I crossed Reverse Mountain from South Blue before I was old enough to remember,

but I guess that was more than years ago.

I entered this sea five years ago, from West Blue.

Once we go around the second half of the world,

we'll get to see this wall again, and when we do...

I'll be King of the Pirates!

We have to remain alert.

We're right next to Marie Jois, the holy land of the Navy HQ

and the World Government.

This surprise pool is the best!

I'm not good enough...

Just try it.

Hey, you're alive?

Where is he?

What happened here?!

Nothing...

Nothing... happened!

I have to get stronger!

I'm still weak!

I'm still...!

How does it look, Robin? Brook? Luffy?

Not good. It's pitch dark.

It's pitch dark!

Hey, I just saw something flash!

Y-Y-You think it was some monster's eyes?!

M-Monster?!

W-We're gonna die!

Wait, I'm already dead!

Oh, right. Nami-san, pardon me for asking, but...

What kind of panties are you wearing today?

Shut up! Be serious about this!

Scary!

He's got some guts.

Hey, you guys!

The Shark Submerge III can't dive deeper than , meters!

Be careful!

Hm? The hull seems to be creaking...

Yes, because...

We're more than , meters under.

Ah, so that's why.

Wait! That's a bad idea! The pressure will crush us!

Hey, that monster from before is still around!

It sure has a big mouth!

That was close!

It's gonna eat us!

It's coming again!

Looks like this isn't gonna go well.

I never want to ride in the Shark Submerge.

Ditto.

Nami-san!

My tart made of horror pears from Thriller Bark is done!

Wow, it looks delicious!

Behind us! Behind us!

Here it comes! We're gonna get eaten!

This is a problem, though...

Wow! This is great!

Yum!

Looks like another dead end, just like at the Sky Island.

That's right.

I know which way we need to go, but I don't know the means to get there.

How do we get to Fishman Island?

We're out!

That was fun!

Welcome back! Good job!

It was no good. We couldn't see the sea floor.

You sure Fishman Island is really here?

That was my first time riding a submarine!

If it's any deeper, we'll die before we get there.

I'm sure the Log Pose was pointing right beneath us...

What a problem. I should have talked with Lola about it more.

It's the thing from before!

It followed us back!

Don't think you can beat me when we're above the water!

Gum-Gum r*fle!

It actually didn't seem all that huge.

Yeah, since we've seen Oars. We're okay now!

It spit something out.

Huh? A fish?

A person?!

No, it's not.

That's a...

It... It couldn't be!

Nailed it!

You saved me!

That was awesome!

You're not supposed to be impressed!

We were about to be digested!

You just had to stroll right by that monster, didn't you?!

Well, I didn't see it there...

How do you miss something that huge?!

Hey, not that it matters, but you're sitting on something.

Huh?

Gah! I crushed a human!

I'm sorry! Are you okay?

Oh, no, it's okay... More importantly, are you...

Please snap out of it! Are you okay?

Is that...

...a tail fin?

No way... It's really...

A mermaid?!

Please save my friend, Hatchin!

Leave it to us!

We just have to knock out that guy in the mask, right?

He's the boss of the Flying Fish Riders, Duval!
I've been waiting.

I'll k*ll him.

I'll k*ll the man who ruined my life!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Hatred for the Straw Hats! Iron Mask Duval Appears!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x386 - Hatred of the Straw Hat Crew – Enter Iron Mask Duval
comment:
As Luffy and his friends continued their voyage in search of Fishman Island,

they finally reached the Red Line, the halfway point of the Grand Line.

It's the Red Line!

I can't see the top...

It's huge!

So this is the Red Line...

Anyway, we're halfway there now!

But the towering Red Line blocked their way,

and they lost their path to Fishman Island.

I know which way we need to go, but I don't know the means to get there.

Gum-Gum r*fle!

It spit something out.

Huh? A fish?

It... It couldn't be!

Stuck at a dead end with no options,

Luffy and his friends met Camie the mermaid and Pappug the starfish.

"Hatred for the Straw Hats! Iron Mask Duval Appears!"

Are you okay? You're not hurt, are you?

Sure...

That surprised me! Look at all the humans!

Wh-What?

We're the one who're surprised!

Thanks for saving me when I was about to be digested.

I'm such an easy target for sea monsters to eat...

That was about the twentieth time.

You get eaten too much!

I need to do something to thank you.

I know! Would you like some takoyaki?

Takoyaki?! That's my favorite!

Really? Okay, that'll be Berries per person!

What?!

You're trying to sell 'em?!

I messed up!

Mermaid! Mermaid!

Yes! The most admired of all races, the mermaid!

The jewel of the sea, the mermaid!

And yes! I got to meet one of them!

She's so cute!

It's my first time meeting a mermaid!

You're name's Camie-chan?!

It's not your first time.

You met the old woman Kokoro, didn't you?

Thriller Bark?

No, that doesn't scare me. It doesn't scare me!

If you want to know what scared me the most in my life, it was...

Uh, sorry, Sanji! Pretend I didn't say that!

It's your first time seeing a mermaid!

You guys are rude!

Huh? The old woman Kokoro was a mermaid?

But she was walking.

Oh, that's right, you didn't know.

It was while you were fighting Lucci.

Don't you...

...die!

I really don't want to think of Kokoro as a mermaid.

You're too blunt!

That hurt! What'd you do that for, Nami?!

I swear, when it comes to guys and their desires toward mermaids...

She is quite a cute mermaid, though.

This is my first time meeting a mermaid, as well.

Pardon me, but would you lend me some money?

Why should she?!

A skeleton!

Look at that! How could you scare her?! Go away!

I can open my head, too. Fun, right?

Damn little...

How fun!

She's quick to accept people...

By the way, do you poop?

What are you asking her?!

Sure, I—

She does not!

She really doesn't!

Camie, Camie?

That's strange. Aren't you missing someone?

What's missing from that little circle of fun?

The answer is me.

Oh, yeah, I've been wondering.

Hey, Camie, what's this talking glove thing?

Sorry, I totally forgot.

That's my pet, Pappug. He's a starfish, and my master.

Master?

Yep. My master.

This thing?

Yep!

Nice to meet ya!

Do starfish talk?

Isn't it weird to have a pet that's your master?

I let her keep me as a pet. I've got my reasons.

Camie always gives me clams...

Food, eh?

"Are you a person?" I'm a starfish, not a person.

What a brute!

I'm not a person, I'm a starfish.

"Are you busy?"

No, no!

I've got plenty of hands.

Yay! Thank you!

Laugh! This is where you laugh!

So, this T-shirt is by a brand called Criminal.

It's all the rage on Fishman Island.

Wow!

It's so cool!

Pappug is the designer.

I want to be a designer someday, too.

You could totally be one, Camie-chan!

Thank you, Sanji-chin!

Nobody's listening...

Hey, how can you talk, anyway?

That's a very good question!

He got over that quick.

When I was little, I mistakenly thought I was a person.

By the time I realized I was a starfish, I could already speak human language.

You can learn to talk because of that?

It's scary when you get on a roll!

That momentum drives the world!

So anyway, I'm Pappug the starfish.

I'm an up-and-coming designer.

Thanks for saving us!

I'm glad we met you, actually.

We had just lost our way, and I wanted to ask—

Hey, Nami! Takoyaki comes first!

Oh, right. I wanted to repay you with takoyaki.

Then we'll have to meet up with Hatchin somewhere...

Hatchin?

Ring ring ring... Ring ring ring...

Ring ring ring... Click.

Hello, Hatchin? It's Camie!

Sorry we got separated. Where are you now?

Hey! Is that Camie I hear?

Hatchin?

You don't know who I am? I'm not Hachi.

What?! You're not Hatchin?!

I'm Macro! The very same one, from the Dopey Macro Pirates!

Hey, I just said it myself...

Sounds like there's some trouble.

Why do you have Hatchin's Transponder Snail?

Because I beat up that Hachi punk, of course!

You're lying! Hatchin would never lose to you guys!

Yeah, normally we're no match for Hachi,

but this time, we've teamed up with the Flying Fish Riders!

The Flying Fish Riders?!

Camie, you're okay? Thank goodness.

Hatchin! Did they really beat you?

They sort of caught me off guard...

But you mustn't come here!

I'll wreak a little havoc and be back home soon, so it'll be fine.

Hatchin...

Hey, Camie, I'm about to sell off your buddy!

Octopus fishmen are rare, so he's worth a fortune!

If you want to come save him, you're welcome to.

We're five kilometers east of Grove # in the Sabaody Archipelago,

at the hideout of the kidnapping g*ng, the Flying Fish Riders.

No! Camie, don't come!

Shut up, you octopus!

Bye, now.

Hatchin...

Hey...

Camie-chan...

So, where's the takoyaki?

Is this really the time?!

Wait a minute...

The voice of that "Hatchin" guy on the Transponder Snail sounded familiar...

I must be imagining it. Surely it's not...

Sorry, Luffy-chin.

Can I treat you to takoyaki some other time?

I have to go save my friend right away.

Aww...

Hey!

Hang on, Camie.

I don't mean to butt in, but if you want to save your friend, we'll help.

Oh, my mistake. I meant these guys will help!

You little...!

So, what say you tell us how to get to Fishman Island in exchange?

Really? Are you sure, Nami-chin?

Of course!

Right, Luffy?

Huh? Yeah.

You'll help me rescue Hatchin, Luffy-chin?!

Sure, but who's Hatchin, anyway?

He owns the takoyaki place where I work!

His takoyaki is the best in the world!

Well, that's an important matter!

Okay, boys! We're gonna rescue the takoyaki if it means our lives!

Yeah!

Takoyaki! Takoyaki!

They agreed. Do you know where he is?

Yeah... Um...

Grove # is the easternmost island in the archipelago.

And he's five kilometers east of that...

So the Flying Fish Riders' hideout is around here.

And we're right here,

so it's a straight shot from here to the Sabaody Archipelago.

Let's start heading west!

From there, we can ask the fish for directions.

Yeah, sounds good. Let's hurry!

Hey!

Wow! The fish are sticking their heads out!

I need you to give me directions!

They're afraid of the Flying Fish Riders,

so they'll take us as far as the vicinity of their hideout.

That's amazing! You can talk to fish!

I had no idea mermaids could do that!

Camie, with you around, we'd have all the fish we could eat!

Watch your mouth! I oughta k*ll you!

But how can we follow fish if they're underwater?

Just watch.

Awesome!

Is that even possible? I can't believe it!

The fish are making an arrow on the water for us!

That's great! So we just have to follow that!

You're pretty amazing, Camie!

Aww, I still have a long way to go.

Nah, I'm really impressed!

All right! I'll steer!

To four o'clock.

Got it!

Let's go, boys!

Yeah!

So you see, Master Duval, I've lured a mermaid toward us.

Yes, all is going as planned.

Understood. Hey, you guys.

Yes, Head.

Go out and meet her.

Roger.

U-Um...

She's valuable merchandise, so please try not to harm her.

How encouraging...

Hey, Hachi! Your Camie is finished this time!

Well? Are you ready for that?

Oh, at a loss for words, are you?

Hey, Zoro.

Setting sail already? You're not going to Fishman Island?

Forget about that, just check her out!

She's Camie, a mermaid. A real mermaid! She's awesome!

Hello.

A mermaid?

First one I've ever seen.

He erased it! He just erased the memory!

We're just gonna make a little detour to save her takoyaki friend.

I'm worried, though. Hatchin sounded so weak.

I know they've done something awful to him.

Well, he's pretty tough. He'll be fine.

More importantly, you guys accepted this task so easily.

Are you that confident in your skills?

Yep! We're strong!

Just so you know, there are several kidnapping gangs operating around here.

The human trade is a booming business in the Sabaody Archipelago.

They buy and sell humans?

That's nasty business.

Mermaids are sold at particularly high costs,

so the three Macro Pirates are constantly out to kidnap Camie.

Hachi the takoyaki shop owner

probably doesn't realize we were eaten by that sea monster,

and thinks we were taken by the Macro Pirates,

which would be why he went after them.

That's probably right.

Hatchin is very kind and upright.

It's my fault.

Hearing about octopus and "Hachi" makes me think of that idiot fishman.

If it's really him, I'm not saving him.

Okay, I guess that's not true.

Normally, Hachi would wipe the floor with them easily,

but if the infamous Flying Fish Riders are involved...

What are they?

They're a kidnapping g*ng that's been throwing their weight around in this area lately.

Everyone says once they set their sights on you, you're doomed.

Their boss is a guy in an iron mask named Duval.

No one knows what he looks like under the mask.

I hear he's searching for someone,

so he checks every ship that goes by here.

Sounds like a pain in the neck.

Well, anyway, Camie, don't worry.

We'll save the takoyaki!

He's a takoyaki maker!

Okay! Thanks, Luffy-chin!

All right, then!

Brook, play something to cheer everyone up!

With pleasure!

H-Huh?

Hey! There's trouble!

What is it, Camie?

The fish said sorry, but this is as far as they'll go.

What? What's going on?

There they are! The Flying Fish Riders!

Where? I don't see anything.

Camie! Where are you going?

You have to hide!

No! Not in the sea! They're in the sky!

The fish are flying!

Cool!

This isn't the time to be impressed!

Damn! They're attacking!

Do flying fish fly like that?!

Hey! Did you see?

Yeah! There's no mistake! It's the Straw Hats!

Contact the boss!

Roger!

We came to nab one mermaid, but this is a huge catch!

Duval-sama is gonna be quaking with joy!

They're coming back!

Stay away!

Bombs?!

b*stards!

Gum-Gum...

Pound...

-p*stol! -Cannon!

That was close!

Be careful! Those flying fish can fly for five minutes out of water!

Damn!

Yes, there's no mistake, Duval-sama! It's them!

Right. Right... What?!

Go back! We're withdrawing for now!

What? Don't be stupid!

Duval-sama's orders!

Damn... Just when it was about to get good!

What happened?

Macro.

Yes, Master Duval?

It seems the mermaid you lured out is on a pirate ship.

What? Camie's on a pirate ship?!

I've been waiting. I've been waiting so long.

That pirate ship is the one I've been waiting for.

I'll k*ll him.

I'll k*ll the man who ruined my life!

Camie, run! It's a trap!

The voice we heard, and that silhouette...

Hey, what do you think?

Huh? Oh! So it was him?

Now that we know that, there's no way we're saving you, you octopus!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"The Fated Reunion! Save the Imprisoned Fishman!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x387 - The Fated Reunion! Save the Imprisoned Fish-man
comment:
As Luffy and his friends continued their voyage in search of Fishman Island,

they made it halfway to the Grand Line.

Chopper!

Coup de Burst!

I can't see the top...

It's huge!

They finally reached the Red Line.

There, they met the mermaid Camie

and the starfish Pappug, and became friends.

Thanks for saving me.

Camie, you're okay?

Camie asked them to save her imprisoned friend, "Hatchin,"

so they headed toward the hideout of the kidnapping g*ng, the Flying Fish Riders.

What? What's going on?

There they are! The Flying Fish Riders!

Hey! Did you see?

Yeah! There's no mistake! It's the Straw Hats!

I've been waiting. I've been waiting so long.

That pirate ship is the one I've been waiting for.

I'll k*ll him.

I'll k*ll the man who ruined my life!

"The Fated Reunion! Save the Imprisoned Fishman!"

The flying fish left.

They were obviously taking the offensive, though.

It looked like they received some kind of message.

Maybe they were ordered to retreat?

Though I don't know why...

I wanna ride one!

Those flying fish can fly for five whole minutes?!

That's so cool!

Anyway, those flying fish will be at the place we're heading for, right?

Then we'll need to be prepared to fight.

I never expected them to come from the sky, though...

Why don't we bring the cannons up on deck?

Then I can sh**t 'em out of the sky!

All right!

I hope Hatchin is okay...

You're the one Macro is really after.

You should be careful yourself.

You're right.

Duval-sama! The three Riders have returned!

Duval-sama, why did you order us back?

Yeah!

If you'd left it to us, we could've nabbed the mermaid and the pirates!

Fools!

You guys...

Yes, sir!

Do you know how I have felt as I waited for those pirates?

I'm sure you know the story.

Duval

When I think about that man,

the huge wound on my back throbs terribly.

Uh-oh... The Head is mad!

Day after day, I have continued to loathe that man...

Head, please calm down...

Shall I k*ll him here today?

What do you think?

That is the biggest question in my life!

Do you realize that?!

Y-Yes! In that case, you should not let him live!

That's exactly why I must be careful and thorough in eliminating him.

So do as I tell you!

Yes, Head!

Hey, Macro Pirates.

Yeah? You called?

What is it, Duva?

Gyaro, how could you call him Duva?!

And Tansui, "Yeah?" isn't right!

You're both being rude!

Ha, ha. "Duva" sounds funny.

Oh, damn it!

Hey, Master Duval! Hey, hey, you called for us?

Boss, he's too worked up.

Quiet! Shut your mouth!

I'm so sorry, Master.

They truly are idiots. They don't know how to speak properly.

That's fine, boys.

To me, you're like messengers from heaven who bring me happiness.

I'm so grateful, I can't find the words to thank you.

S'okay.

I told you to shut up, Tansui!

Thanks to you boys, I'll finally... finally... meet them.

I'll finally meet the Straw Hats!

Straw Hats? Huh? Who are they?

The Straw Hats... So I didn't hear that wrong.

The man...

...I have been praying...

...for a chance to k*ll is on that ship!

I will never forgive him!

Head, please calm down!

That's quite a grudge you're carrying.

I never expected to hear the Straw Hats spoken of here...

Hey, you! Big guy!

Gah! This is Duval-sama, you damn octopus!

Was Camie captured by the Straw Hats?

This is bad... Of all people, why them?

Are they coming here?

That's right. They're headed here.

Hey, does that mean your mermaid went to pirates for help?

I don't know the details, but she didn't seem like a prisoner.

Well, no matter who she brings,

as long as we're here, they'll all be captured and sold at the human shop.

As if that's possible! Those guys are crazy strong!



Man, this is a problem... Nami's probably with them, too...

She's probably holding a grudge against me.

Of course she would.

I did awful things to her with Arlong and the boys.

I've gotta get out of here before they arrive,

or they're sure to pulverize me.

This is a huge problem!

That's...

Duval-sama!

It's the Straw Hats!

Finally... they're here...

Hey, Macro.

Huh? What do you want?

I'll give you takoyaki, so please let me go.

I'm not letting you go, idiot! You think I'm that obsessed with food?!

Are you sure he's on the ship?

Yes! He's definitely there!

It's curtains for you now. I hope you're ready!

Hey, Gyaro, I'll give you takoyaki, so please let me go.

Who do you think is gonna fall for—

Hey! Just how obsessed with food are you?!

All of you, get in position!

Yes, sir!

Hey, Tansui, I'll give you— Huh?

Shut up! You come with us!

Hey, I see something!

Looks like that's the Flying Fish Riders' hideout.

So that's where this Hatchin guy is imprisoned?

Hatchin...

Hey! Let's hurry up and save the takoyaki!

We know! Just hold on!

We'll save him in a flash, Camie-chan!

Thanks, Sanji-chin!

Oh, but be careful, everyone!

The Macro Pirates alone have captured me times!

You get captured too much!

Well...

And eaten too much, too!

Looks like we've entered their territory.

Ugh, there's that "we shouldn't go to this island" syndrome again...

This isn't an island.

It's more like a living complex built on the sea.

My "we shouldn't go to this living complex built on the sea" syndrome!

Why would they go to the trouble to live here?

Who knows?

Sure is quiet, though.

I have a bad feeling...

Luffy! We should...

...go forward!

Hey! Come up with a plan or something!

Hey! Hatchin! Are you okay?!

Get out here, Macro!

Give Hachi back!

Oh, no! It really is the Straw Hats' ship!

Damn!

Nope, I can't get out...

Then I'll have to..

Takohachi Black!

There's someone in that cage.

What is that black thing?

What?! Let me see!

Could that be Hatchin?

We've got this, Camie! There are no enemies around!

It must be their snack time!

Yeah!

Are you being serious?!

No matter how you look at it, that's a trap!

They're all hiding nearby and keeping an eye on us.

What incredible insight!

I-I never thought of that!

That's why you keep getting caught!

I'm right here! Camie, I'm all right, so don't worry!

I knew it! Hatchin!

You're all black! What happened?!

Well... I had my own reasons.

More importantly, this is a trap! You have to turn back!

You know I'm strong, right? I'll be fine, so go!

That same voice, and that unusual silhouette...

What do you think, Nami?

I suspect... In fact, I'm almost sure...

Sure of what?

We could always ask him and find out.

Hey! How's Arlong doing?

Oh, Arlong-san?

Well, he and Chew and Kuroobi were all captured by the Navy!

I was the only one to break out,

and now I'm running a takoyaki shop like I always dreamed of doing.

Arlong?

I knew it...

It's you, octopus?!

Crap!

C-Crap!

You're that octopus from Arlong's crew!

So you're the takoyaki maker called Hatchin?!

What?

Well, some stuff happened...

Nami's hometown was controlled by a fishman

pirate g*ng called the Arlong Pirates.

They put Nami through all kinds of terrible stuff.

That octopus used to be an officer in their g*ng.

Nami, are you thinking of running away?

If you do that, everyone in Cocoyashi Village will be k*lled on your account.

Which one of you is Arlong?

Huh... So he's a known enemy?

Well, naturally, I took Luffy and the others there to

bust some heads, and the whole g*ng was annihilated!

Wow! You're amazing, Usopp!

Y-Yeah, well...

I thought all of those fishmen were dragged off by the navy...

But it looks like he escaped by himself.

I see. Every man has a history.

Hey, you octopus!

Now that we know it's you, there's no way we're saving you!

B-But...

I-I-Is...

Is your takoyaki really that good?!

Don't waver between your reason and your appetite.

This is stupid.

You mean...

You know Hatchin?

Were you friends with him before?

We were not friends!

Turn the ship around!

Nami-chin...

I'm sorry, Camie.

I wasn't expecting your friend to be him.

No...

Then you won't help me rescue him?

Hatchin!

Camie, that's fine! You should leave! This is a trap!

No way!

I will save you!

You always save us, Hachi!

Pappug!

Right!

I had no idea these people were so heartless!

Stupid! Stupid!

Shut up!

Just wait, Hatchin!

I'll never abandon you, Hatchin!

Here we go!

Camie-chan!

That idiot.

Will they be okay?

Given all that stuff they said, they must have some kind of plan.

I've got you, Camie!

You guys are the definition of "all talk"!

Now we're gonna be rich!

Look what happened to Hachi after he always came to save you!

You're not gonna get away, Camie!

I told you!

Camie! Pappug!

b*stards!

Camie-chan did nothing wrong!

Wait, Sanji-kun!

I'm coming to save you, Camie!

It's okay. We'll set Hachi free, too.

What?

Hachi's all right. He's actually harmless.

Besides...

This isn't what we promised Camie.

N-Nami-san...

That strong-willed attitude of yours is beautiful!

Hey, Nami!

You sure?

Yeah.

Luffy!

If it's okay with you, we have no choice.

We'll save the octopus, too.

Hey! Your eyes are takoyaki!

Are you ready,

Flying Fish Riders?

Of course! Anytime!

Gum-Gum...

p*stol!

And one more!

He has powers?!

A Straw Hat?!

That bastard!

Luffy-chin!

You did it!

All right! I got 'em back!

Thank you, Straw Hat! I owe you one!

Zoro! Cut the rope holding up the cage!

Got it!

Straw Hat! Be careful!

You're right in their trap!

The Flying Fish Riders have you surrounded from the air!

Get them!

Yes, sir!

Luffy-chin!

Whether it's from the sea or the sky, bring it on!

I'll go nuts on 'em!

Boys!

It's battle time!

Yeah!

Damn it! We'll have to move while we can!

Get Camie back!

Yeah!

Camie! Pappug! It's dangerous, so stay back!

Huh?

Stretch! You can do it, Luffy-chin!

Go! Go!

Come on, flying fish!

Go! Go!

They're coming!

Right!

I found you, "Black Foot" Sanji!

Does he know you, Sanji?

That man ruined my life!

He really has it in for you.

Go to hell!

What did you do, Sanji?!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Tragedy! The Truth Hidden Behind Duval's Mask!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x388 - Tragedy! The Truth of the Unmasked Duval
comment:
During their voyage in search of Fishman Island,

Luffy and friends met the mermaid, Camie.

To save Camie's friend Hatchin, who had been captured by

a kidnapping g*ng, the Flying Fish Riders,

the crew headed to the Flying Fish Riders' hideout.

Whether it's from the sea or the sky, bring it on!

I'll go nuts on 'em!

Boys!

It's battle time!

Yeah!

"Tragedy! The Truth Hidden Behind Duval's Mask!"

Well, now, which one's got the most fight in it?

Hey, hey, hey!

That's the one!

Gotcha!

Wha?

I'm takin' over!

H-Hey!

Whoo! This is awesome!

Yeah!

I'm flying!

Luffy's flying one of them!

Leave him be.

Eat this!

Bombs!

Damn!

Nami-san! Robin-chan! Are you okay?

That was close! They almost got us!

Damn them. If they'd hit the ladies, I would've had to k*ll them.

Hoist the sails! They're in the way!

Right!

We're gonna dive!

Roger!

Luffy!

Luffy-san!

Wait! You idiots!

What do you think you were doing in the middle of a fight?!

Sorry...

And why did you guys try to save him?

You've got powers!

Sorry...

I... I'm sorry for causing trouble...

Think of how we felt, having to save you three lumps who can't swim!

Idiot! Don't make more work for us!

The Macro Pirates!

Now's our chance! Get Camie!

Right!

Hey, Straw Hats! Pay attention to us!

Luffy-chin!

Camie! Pappug!

Camie! Pappug!

I'm free from the cage and the binds!

Thanks, Roronoa! You're a good guy!

Just following captain's orders, idiot.

Hachi!

Hatchin!

You guys took advantage of the fact that I couldn't move

to beat me up, didn't you?!

Yeah, yeah! I didn't get to do enough beating!

I'll use my Fishman Karate to finish you!

You really have no luck!

Since you kept mouthing off at us,

we're gonna pound you even more!

Let's go! I'll stain the sea red with the new Goldfish Fencing techniques

I developed just for you!

Hatchin!

Here we come!

Takoyaki Punch!

We'll let you off the hook for today!

Hatchin!

Camie! Pappug!

I'm so glad you're safe, Hatchin!

I'm sorry, Camie, Pappug!

I meant to come save you!

Don't worry about that, Hachi!

Look out!

Don't forget, this is our hideout!

The ones who are gonna sell you all are us,

the Flying Fish Riders!

Roronoa!

Zoro-chin!

You left the fight too soon.

Leave the rest to us and go hide.

Thank you for everything, Roronoa!

I'm really sorry for what I did back then!

Back then?

I caused you so much pain with my Six Swords Style.

Not one of those swords even hit me!

Really? They didn't?

Here they come, Chopper!

Take this, scum!

Fire!

Bullseye! Did you see that?! My condolences, suckers!

You're awesome, Usopp!

Would anyone like to try the Zero Fight?

Zero Fight?

Sounds fun! But if I'm gonna do it, I'm giving it all I've got!

You'll give us plenty of medical coverage, right?

How about a million?

It's a deal, Head! I'm going!

Outta my way!

Some huge guy is coming this way!

He's swinging an iron rod!

He isn't holding the handlebars.

He's not planning to charge us head-on, is he?

What?!

The ship won't withstand a crash from that monster.

Luffy, you go after the fish.

All right!

You're about to find out that a crash at this speed

is like being hit by a meteorite!

Sanji's right! He's charging right at us!

But the impact of that crash is gonna be just as hard...

...on you!

Gum-Gum...

Balloon!

This'll be dinner tonight!

You were both so cool!

Seeing it up close, it really is big.

Damn! The usual methods aren't working on these guys!

Usopp!

There are more of them flying around than I realized!

How many do we have to bring down to finish this?

Damn! I wanna ride one!

Don't think I've given up after last time!

Give up! I'm not saving you again!

How can this be?

What's wrong, Brook?

My first battle as one of the Straw Hats,

and I nearly drowned...

If I can't be of use now, I'm a failure as a man!

How many of those flying fish can I bring down?

I cannot say, but I can show you...

what I can do!

He can really jump!

What's that skeleton guy doing?!

I'll skewer him!

Lullaby Song.

Wow! They all fell... asleep...

You guys, too?!

Music is

power!

Pardon me!

Whoa! I fell asleep!

Damn that guy! What was that?

He must've used some kind of dirty trick!

It was no trick.

It was music!

Wait!

That Brook's pretty good!

It's getting fun now!

I'm going, too!

Wait, Luffy! Not again!

All right, gotcha!

If you try to go under, you'll pay!

Hey!

He's asleep!

Hey, you! Wake up!

That jerk! He dove in to the Head's room!

You saw, didn't you?

Hey! You're—

You know me, don't you?

Roronoa!

Zoro-chin!

I can't run any longer!

My legs are about to cramp up!

Uh, not that I have any muscles to cramp...

You really went all out, Brook.

You took out a lot of the flying fish.

I had to do something useful...

But... I need a break...

Zoro-san, you're still suffering from the damage you took at Thriller Bark...

It's not enough to let these fish bring me down.

Don't worry.

You let your guard down, Roronoa!

Six Swords Style!

Tentacle Sword Overload!

Huh... You saved me?

That's right. 'Cause you weren't paying attention.

Hatchin! You were so cool!

That's my boy, Hachi!

Really?

Die, fishman!

Pardon me!

I thought I was a goner! Thanks!

You're welcome.

I told you, you left the fight too soon.

Don't rush in individually! Formation!

Formation (Hentai)

Pervert?

Pervert (Hentai)

You talking to me?

Attack in flight formation!

Formation (Hentai) Flight (Hikou)

Perverted misbehavior?

Perverted (Hentai) Misbehavior (Hikou)

You mean me?

Not you!

Here they come!

Here! Over here!

Come on down!

A woman?!

Seems like a waste, but our orders were to k*ll you all!

You think you can k*ll me?

What?!

Too bad! That's Mirage Tempo!

Watch for thunder clouds ahead!

Dos Mano!

Clutch!

Carving Hoof Diamond!

Don't break formation!

You talking to me?

No, he's not!

Now!

Oh, they didn't mean me?

What the heck?! g*ns don't work on him!

Strong Hammer!

Amazing!

They really are strong, Pappug!

I never would've thought they could do all this.

I thought we'd just get Hachi and hightail it home.

Take this!

Damn!

Franky, dock the ship!

They have the advantage as long as we're drifting on open seas!

I know that. That's why I'm doing this.

These guys aren't giving us time to move the ship!

Luffy!

Run! There's a big one coming!

The Iron Mask?!

A guy in a mask, and a cow!

A cow?

That's Motobalo's voice!

The Head's here!

You just let them sh**t you down left and right?

What is that?! Something just burst out!

You're not mosquitoes or flies! You're Flying Fish Riders!

He trampled his own house down to make his appearance...

I don't need this hideout anymore.

Not if I get to k*ll the Straw Hats!

We're sorry, Head.

We'll sink all of these guys to the bottom of the sea right—

Move!

I have no need for fishmen, mermaids, or gloves!

If you want to run, then get out of here!

I'm a starfish!

I'm not in the human trade because I want to be.

You all know that very well, don't you?

Of course, Head!

Today is a joyous day.

The man I have wanted to k*ll so badly that I dreamed about it

is right in front of me!

I'm so grateful! There truly is a God!

The man who showed up that day and plunged me into the depths of Hell...

Hey, does it look like he's talking in our direction?



On this day, here and now, even if I go down as well,

I will k*ll you!

The pirate, "Black Foot" Sanji!

I have so longed to see you.

Crap! The Head's really mad now!

Huh? He wants to k*ll me?

Sanji, who's that guy?

Does he have some kind of grudge against you?

Maybe it's from when you worked at the restaurant?

Try to remember!

That was three years ago...

All I ever did back then was piss people off...

Just get shot! You'd get what you deserve!

Don't you play dumb, Black Foot!

It was just recently!

Watch it! Get down! They're harpoons!

But if it was recent, I'm even more stumped.

What is that? Something's weird about these harpoons...

These are Scorpion's Poison harpoons.

If one pierces you, you'll be dead in three minutes.

Feel my wrath!

Nami-san, look out!

Damn that bastard! I can't remember!

Who are you?!

I'll m*rder you and your whole crew!

I saw him without his mask.

You did? Who is he?

Don't be too surprised. It's a face you know, too.

Me?

That fool!

Duval-sama's iron mask!

That's fine. Take a good look at my scarred face.

Wha— Huh?!

No way...

What?!

He's...

Wow.

Oh, my...

I could cry!

I have waited for this day.

After I decided to k*ll you, I took to the seas.

But searching for you was not easy.

You look nothing like your wanted flyers, after all.

Even if the Navy or bounty hunters saw you, they might totally overlook you!

No, that's not true.

They do find you!

Head...

They find you, and they say...

"I found you,

Black Foot Sanji!"

And then I tell them...

"I don't know who that is!"

"I'm not even a pirate!"

Stop screwing around!

The Sunny's in trouble!

We're gonna get sunk!

Hey, relax! This week, I'm the most super I've ever been!

I'll show you the Sunny's true power!

Wow! The Sunny is amazing!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Unleash the Sunny's Super Secret w*apon, the Gaon Cannon!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x389 - expl*si*n! The Sunny's Super Secret w*apon: Gaon Cannon
comment:
On the way to their next destination, Fishman Island,

Luffy and friends helped save Camie's friend, Hatchin.



The Straw Hats fought a hard battle against the kidnapping g*ng, the Flying Fish Riders.

That's when they saw the true identity of Duval, who held a burning hatred for Sanji.

Stop screwing around!

Unleash the Sunny's Super Secret w*apon, the Gaon Cannon!

That face... Is that even possible?

Incredible...

There's actually someone who looks just like that scribble on Sanji's wanted flyer!

"Black Foot" Sanji, it's all your fault!

Hey, Sanji! Where are you going?

Do you know how scared I was when people suddenly wanted me dead?

Why? Why did I have to be chased all the way to Navy HQ?!



Why do I have to be nearly k*lled by famous bounty hunters?!

Why?!

Sanji?

All because you made a name for yourself as a pirate,

I've had to live every day in fear, running around and hiding!

What did I even do?!

Give me my life back!

"Black Foot" Sanji!

What do I care?!

Head!

How can you not care?!

Who else could be responsible for this but you?!

Shut up! I'm the one who's pissed about that wanted flyer!

I know how the poor guy feels...

But Sanji was really upset about that wanted flyer, too.

Who is this?

Are you gonna be depressed forever?

Shut up! Why is mine the only hand-drawn one?!

That's all you're worth.

Speak in actual words, would you?

They'll laugh...

All the ladies in the world will laugh at me...

I never knew stuff like this could happen...

What a shocker. The world sure is a big place.

Sanji must've been born under a star of miracles.

He's going to have such an interesting death someday.

I feel so sorry for that Duval guy...

Hey, they look just like each other!

Two peas in a pod.

Brook! I'm gonna pound you later!

Okay, Sanji, we're going on ahead.

You think this is my fault?!

If you don't want to look like the flyer, cut your hair or grow a beard!

There are plenty of things you could change!

Oh! I never thought of that!

Are you just stupid to the core?!

I'm not stupid!

You know, Black Foot, we...

You know, Black Foot, we...

We...

...used to be plain old mafia guys out in the country.

Hey, kid! What did you do to our leader?

Are you her dad?

I-I'm sorry!

Please forgive us!

Honey!

Daddy!

How are you gonna pay me back for this?

Huh?!
Daddy!

Honey!

We went around tormenting the village folk every day.

It was a happy life, in its own way.

But then, all of a sudden, tragedy fell upon my peaceful life...

What did he do?

That's a ton of money.

Shouldn't we report him to the Navy?

Here he comes!

It's dangerous to be around him!

We'll get in trouble, too!

Run!

What? Why'd everyone run away?

Ah!

At the time, I thought I had finally been recognized throughout the village.

But then...

We never expected you to escape this far to the countryside.

We're locking you up!

Why's the Navy after me?

Just do as we say,

"Black Foot" Sanji!

What?!

No way! There's a price on my head?!

A bounty of , , Berries... and "Sanji"?!

Apprehend him!

I'm not him! I'm not Sanji, I tell you!

Stop!

I'm gonna be k*lled!

Do you understand, Black Foot?

I've never done anything worse than shakedowns,

and suddenly I had a price of , , Berries on my head...

The terror of having Navy guys on a totally

different power level chasing me around...

I finally ended up with a huge wound on my back,

and donned an iron mask so my face would never be seen again.

My life was ruined because of you!

I will chase you to the ends of Hell itself!

If you don't want that, then k*ll me here and now!

I'm gonna be k*lled!

Why did Nami-san and Robin-chan have

to be put in danger just for your stupid baseless accusations?!

That's the ship that allowed you to make a name for yourself as a pirate.



That means its crew is included in my hatred for you, too!

You can all die!

Poison harpoons!

Assume formation!

Huh? Pervert?

I'm gonna skewer you, Black Foot!

Die!

That's enough, all of you.

You took the bait, Black Foot!

Crap!

Sanji-kun!

They're gonna drag him underwater!

Sanji! Break the net!

Damn it! An iron net?!

Suffer and drown to death!

Sanji!

Damn it! I'm coming to save you!

You can't, you idiot! I'll go!

Wait! Humans are too slow to catch them!

Leave this to me!

Fool! Even if you're a fishman, you'll never catch them!

Flying fish are among the fastest creatures in the sea.

And their riders are equipped with oxygen tanks,

so they can stay under as long as they like!

He's gonna suffocate and die for sure!

The next time Black Foot appears on the surface,

it'll be as a pathetic drowned corpse!

What'd you say?!

Feel the Head's wrath, Black Foot!

Can't breathe...

Don't worry!

Camie?!

Hey, cowboy, I think you forgot about someone.

It's true that flying fish are faster than fishmen.

They're among the top of their class.

But the race that sits at the very top of that class

is mermaids!

There's nothing in all this world's oceans

that can match a mermaid's swimming speed!

It'll be okay!

I'll save you, Sanji-chin!

She's that amazing?

They're not a race that can be caught unless they're completely spacing out, really.

Oh, okay!

Camie! Take care of Sanji!

What is that?!

A giant ship anchor? That's too huge!

Aim for the Straw Hats' pirate ship!

Hit it smack in the middle and sink it!

Some of them have powers! If we fight them underwater, victory is ours!

This is bad! We're gonna go down in one shot!

Dodge it! Use Burst or the paddle wheels! Is there time?!

No, it's too late!

Come with me, Usopp! Hurry!

O-Okay!

Stand by at the bow!

G-Got it!

We're using our emergency secret w*apon!

Secret w*apon?

The Sunny's in trouble!

This is very bad!

Drop it!

No way!

It'll be a direct hit from there.

Sink!

It's coming down!

Drop it!

The Sunny's in trouble!

This is very bad!

Have faith in this ship!

Whoa! Its mane is spinning!

Sink!

It's coming down!

Emergency escape secret w*apon: Chicken Voyage!

What?! They dodged it?!

No way!

I've never heard of a ship that can back up!

Usopp, get inside the bow!

Inside the bow?

Oh, you can go in!

Franky even made all this?

Don't think it's over just because we dodged that!

There's still more to this ship's strength!

Awesome!

Pour in the cola energy!

What now?

Charge complete!

Hey! What do I do now?

Get as much of them in the circle as you can?

The circle?

You mean this?

Got 'em!

Lock on with the button on the handle and pull the lever!

So this... and this!

What's that?

Gaon Cannon...

Fire!

Amazing!

You're too moved!

Did ya see what the Sunny can do?!

That took down almost all of the flying fish!

That was all Usopp's skill. Excellent for a first try!

What awesome power!

Sunny!

The lion is so amazing! I thought my eyes were about to pop out!

Not that I have any eyes to pop out!

To keep the ship from blowing out

of the water with three barrels of cola energy sent to the bow,

we pump two barrels of Coup de Burst into the stern at the same time.

This baby burns through cola, so I rarely use it.

I'm stuck in the net!

Damn that agile mermaid!

I'm almost there, Sanji-chin! Hang on!

Camie!

Thank goodness! Is Sanji okay?!

Everyone, it looks bad! Sanji-chin lost a lot of blood!

What?

They got him?

I thought I'd saved him, but then a bunch of blood flew from his nose...

Wha— A nosebleed?

Forget it. Just let him die there.

Yeah. He looks happy, anyway.

Hang in there, Sanji-chin!

Am I in heaven?

Damn... That bastard is alive?

You've lost a lot of men now.

Curse you!

Then I'll show you what makes Motobalo so terrifying!

To this day, countless men have fallen victim to these tough horns.

These horns even tore a hole in the village dam!

Put him in a cage, and he'll bust out!

It was thanks to his horns that I managed to escape my Navy pursuers with my life!

People call them "Heart-smashing Horns"!

All right. I'll stop him.

Go, Motobalo!

Look out, Luffy!

The horns had nothing to do with it!

Fighting you is a waste of time!

Hey... What's wrong, Motobalo?

His cow's acting weird.

What?

It fainted?

What happened?

Luffy, what did you do?

I didn't do anything!

Motobalo! How could this be, damn it?!

Luffy didn't sh**t anything at him.

It looked like he just intimidated him.

What does that mean? He won by pure intensity?

That giant thing just passed out!

Is that possible?

Curse you Straw Hats!

Wait just a minute, Luffy.

Sanji, I'm glad you're okay.

This all happened because of false accusations.

I'll finish it.

Finish it?

Black Foot, so long as you live as a pirate,

I will never live in peace!

I've had enough of being persecuted for nothing!

Shut up.

I never wanted to see the scribble on that wanted flyer.

It wasn't supposed to exist in real life!

Then you should die!

Œil!

Nez!

Joue! Bouche! Dents!

Menton!

P-Please, no more!

Parage...

Shot!

Enjoy the fine flavors produced by a weave of supreme techniques,

you bastard.

Attention!

I'll teach you clueless people how to get to Fishman Island!

First, you have to get a coating on this ship at a certain island!

That island is—

Look! That's the island!

Cool! A bubble!

Hey, I was still talking...

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Landing on the Way to Fishman Island! The Sabaody Archipelago!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x390 - Landing to Get to Fish-man Island – The Sabaody Archipelago
comment:
During their voyage to Fishman Island,

Luffy and his friends fought a fierce battle against Duval and the Flying Fish Riders.

Curse you Straw Hats!

In response to Duval's unjustified hatred,

Sanji's outrage reached its peak.

Œil!

Nez!

Joue! Bouche! Dents!

Menton!

Parage...

Shot!

"Landing on the Way to Fishman Island! The Sabaody Archipelago!"

Head! Head!

Where are you?!

Head!

Are you all right, Head?!

He's...

Damn, he's all beat up.

Head, are you alive?

Head!

Damn it...

I finally had Black Foot right where I wanted him!

Huh? What is it?

Why are you all gawking at me?

Head, please stay calm and look at this.

Th-This is... Wh-Wha—

What happened to me?!

Yum!

Mmm, this is great!

See? Hatchin's takoyaki is the best in the world, right?

I can't stop! I can't put them down!

This takoyaki is incredible!

Ow! Hot! Hot! Hot!

It really is good. What is this stuff?

The deep flavor of this sauce...

And it's impressive that he runs the business from a ship.

This is my first experience with the culture of takoyaki.

It is delicious!

I could stuff my cheeks with this!

Uh, not that I have cheeks...

You can eat all you like for free today!

This is to thank you all for saving us.

These are made with broth, and these have mochi in them.

Careful, they're hot!

So...

How about you, um... Nami?

Er, um... H-How does it taste?

This doesn't mean I'm going to forgive you for anything.

No, of course not! That's not why I asked!

I really just wondered how you liked the taste...

Nami...

They're really tasty!

I see, I see!

I'm glad! I'm so glad to hear that!

Okay, you guys, eat up! Have all you like!

Yeah! Keep 'em coming! We'll eat every last one!

Hey! You guys!

Young Master!

Who's that?

That voice...

Wait up!

You can't leave without saying goodbye!

Who's that?

I'm Handsome— Oh, my mistake.

I'm Duval!

Is that what he looked like?

I altered his bone structure.

Now he can't complain to me again.

Wow, Master Black Foot!

When I woke up after you kicked the crap out of me, were we ever surprised!

You made me this handsome!

I'm just enchanted!

The ladies won't be able ignore this!

This is truly...

seeing life through rose-colored lenses!

I'd love to head straight back to the country and relax,

but if I left without thanking my saviors, I wouldn't be able to sleep at night!

It's your first time in these waters, right?

If there's any way we can help you, just ask us anything!

Don't wink if you're not used to it.

Well, if you have no complaints, that's enough for me.

If I were to request something, it'd be that you never show up around us aga—

Beautiful. Too beautiful.

Are you listening?!

I should ride a white horse.

Hey, you!

Head, Head! You need to listen!

Oh, right...

What? Handsome?

I didn't say anything like that!

Want me to make you look like that scribble again?!

I'm embarrassed, but I accept...

your blown kiss!

Whoo, whoo!

I didn't blow a kiss! I just wiped sauce off my lips!

What kind of optimistic delusion are you seeing?!

Oh, mirror, mirror! Is the most handsome man of all me?

A single-choice quiz?!

We get that you're handsome,

but you were dumb to start with, so you're still hopeless.

Ah. You're jealous?

I am not!

Don't bother, Usopp! You're no match for his personality!

Well, Young Master, this is my Transponder Snail number.

Call me anytime!

I'll definitely help you all out!

I really caused you a lot of trouble.

Sorry you all got mixed up in this.

Just stop winking.

Bye, now!

Let's go, Rosy Life Riders!

Yes, Handsome!

So leave already.

Whew, thanks for the feast!

Man, I'm stuffed! This is bliss!

That was tasty!

I can't eat any more...

I'm exhausted.

You guys sure eat a lot.

I should've expected that of the Straw Hats.

I wish I had six more arms.

Good work, Hatchin.

Looks like everyone is happy.

Are they? Then I'm happy, too.

It's been a wonderful afternoon, Master.

I'm also more than happy with my first takoyaki experience.

Ah, pardon me.

Everything about that is disgusting!

Hey, octopus and starfish and Camie-chan!

If you're taking a break, come up to the deck.

I'll serve you tea, too.

Sure!

This tea is delicious.

We're on the right path.

Our destination is the Sabaody Archipelago.

Do we have to go there to get to Fishman Island?

We fishmen and mermaids can get there easily by diving,

but you're humans, so if you dive, the pressure will k*ll you.

Yeah, we barely held out even in the submarine.

The hull seems to be creaking...

Yes, because...

We're more than , meters under.

Ah, so that's why.

Wait! That's a bad idea! The pressure will crush us!

How are we gonna get to the bottom of the sea?

Okay, attention!

It looks like you guys don't have a clue,

so I'll tell you all you need to know about these seas.

What? Who's going to do that?

That would be...

Me!

Huh?

Um, please listen...

As I was saying, there are two routes that can take you to the new world.

But for outlaws like you guys, only one is possible.

Why?

Because...

One of them, at the request of the World Government,

involves crossing the city built on top of the Red Line, the holy land Marie Jois.

What?

Naturally, there's no way they'd grant permission for pirates to cross.

We'd have to walk over the Red Line?

What would we do with the ship, then?

You'd have to abandon your ship and buy a similar one on the other side.

Abandon the ship?!

Yeah. It costs money, and getting permission takes time,

but it's safe, so that's what most do.

However!

For the route you'll take, you can keep your ship!

It's called...

The Sea Floor Route Via Fishman Island!

But the Sea Floor Route has many dangers.

Huh? Camie? Camie?

What do you mean?

I didn't pass you the baton...

Many ships that use it are eaten whole by sea monsters and sea kings.

Camie? Camie?

I see. That is dangerous.

Can you hear me?

You see?

I don't think I want to go to Fishman Island...

Me, either...

Hang on, Camie. Did you say ships have been eaten whole?

Huh? Yeah.

What kind of ship do we use to get to the sea floor?

This ship.

What?

Hey, this ship can't go underwater.

No, it'll be fine.

And that big wall that goes around the world, the Red Line,

has a small hole in just one spot.

Oh, it's a big hole from our perspective, though.

That's where Fishman Island is!

It's basically directly below Marie Jois.

You dive about , meters down to get there.

That far?

It's a great place!

I think the sky island was , meters in the air, too...

But how do we get to the sea floor in this ship?

You'll get a coating on your ship at the island we're heading to now.

A coating?

You'll see once it's on.

All right, look ahead!

We're here, everyone!

Wow! It's beautiful!

What is that?!

There's stuff flying around...

My goodness!

It's like a fantasy.

Bubbles?

This is...

The Sabaody Archipelago!

Awesome!

There are bubbles flying everywhere!

So pretty...

Wow!

What is all this, though?

They're floating from the ground to the sky.

Who's blowing them?

They're emitted by the island.

Emitted? You mean...

Really? Why?

May I ask a question?

Sorry to interrupt.

Is the Log Pose all right?

Oh, yeah...

It's pointing toward Fishman Island now, but...

Hey, this island won't overwrite the Log Pose, will it?

No need to worry about that.

The Sabaody Archipelago is really a bunch of trees.

It has no magnetic force.

Oh...

So these aren't islands, then?

Well, have you heard of trees called "mangroves"?

Mangroves?

The kind that expose and cover their roots depending on the tides?

That's right.

Though, on this island, their roots are exposed all the time.

The Sabaody Archipelago is home to the world's biggest mangroves,

the Hustle Muscle Mangroves.

Hustle Muscle Mangroves?

Sounds like they've got a lot of hustle!

I do, too!

There are a total of trees.

Each one is an island with its own towns and facilities.

They are collectively called the Sabaody Archipelago.

There are numbers written on the trees.

Yes, each of the trees is marked with a number.

The one straight ahead, Grove # , is the commercial entrance,

so let's dock the ship a bit further in.

The roots are even bigger up close!

Wow...

It's pitch black inside them.

How remarkable!

Is that a bridge?

Yeah, all the islands are connected with bridges like that.

Ah, I see!

Okay, we're here!

This is Grove # . Let's dock here.

I'm first!

Okay, everyone, remember the number of this island!

As I said before, all the islands are connected by bridges,

so if you remember the number, you won't get lost.

I know someone who'd still get lost.

Yeah, me too.

Huh? What?

What?!

It popped out of the ground! Cool!

Amazing!

I'm on!

It's not popping.

That looks fun!

These bubbles really are mysterious.

How do they work?

The roots of Hustle Muscle Mangroves secret a special natural resin.

Gross! It's all sticky!

Don't wipe it on me!

That resin expands into bubbles when the roots breathe.

I get it...

So that's how they float up to the sky.

So this scenery is all natural?

Hey!

Whoa, Luffy! When did you get up that high?!

I can see an amusement park over there!

Let's go! I wanna ride the ferris wheel!

An amusement park?!

That's Sabaody Park.

A ferris wheel sounds fun...

It was always my dream to ride one.

Your dream? Why don't you just ride one?

Don't be a fool! You can't, Camie!

Yeah, I know.

I want to ride it, too... Can I not?

I'm really high up!

What's going on?

They're suddenly popping!

Luffy-chin!

Oh, no! Are you okay?!

It's fine, Camie-chan.

No need to worry about him.

Man, I was really stuck!

See?

By the way, Hachi, what did we come to this island for?

You said something about a coating for the ship earlier.

Right. We'll go see a coating craftsman

and have your ship coated in resin.

In simple terms, that'll allow your ship to go underwater.

For real?

That's the only way you humans can get to Fishman Island.

But if you get an unskilled coating craftsman,

the ship and its passengers will be crushed underwater, and that's the end.

I know just one craftsman that you can trust, so I'll take you to him.



When all is said and done, the octopus is a good man.

No, a good octopus!

In exchange...

I want you to keep one promise for me.

Sure! What is it?

Sometimes, there are World Nobles walking around in town.

World Nobles?

Who are they?

Residents of the holy land Marie Jois.

Hmm...

So, what about them?

No matter what may happen in town,

promise me that you will not defy the World Nobles.

Huh?

No matter what happens?

You mean...

Understand?

Even if someone is k*lled before your eyes,

you must pretend you saw nothing.

I'll say it once more.

You must pretend

you saw nothing!

The Sabaody Archipelago is fun!

There's so much stuff I've never seen before!

Hey! Here comes someone wearing a bubble on his head!

There's a dog with a bubble on its head, too!

Oh, no! Everyone get on your knees!

Don't look them in the eyes!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Tyranny! The Roles of Sabaody, the Celestial Dragons"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x391 - Tyranny! The Rulers of Sabaody, the Celestial Dragons
comment:
Having defeated Duval's Flying Fish Riders,

Straw Hat Luffy and company now head for Fish-Man Island.

So, umm...

What do you say, Nami?

This doesn't mean you're suddenly somehow forgiven.

No! Of course not!

That's not what I meant!

I was just wondering how it tastes!

It's really good!

Really?! It is?!

First, there are actually two routes that lead to the New World!

But for outlaws like you guys, there's really only one.

Just maintain course for the route you'll use,

which is known as Fish-Man Island's

"Sea Floor Route"!

The Red Line is a large barrier that stretches all around the world,

but there is one small hole in one part of it,

and that's where Fish-Man Island is!

In order to make their ship capable of submerging to the sea floor,

Luffy and company needed to visit a certain island first.

This is it!

Sabaody Archipelago!

Awesome!

Oh! It came outta the ground!

Neat!

I'm riding it!

That looks fun!

Say, Hachi.

What's our purpose on this island, anyway?

Oh, we're going to see a coating craftsman

and have him cover your ship in resin.

Simply put, that'll make it so your ship can go underwater.

Are you serious?!

And so Luffy and company landed on the Sabaody Archipelago

to find a coating craftsman Hachi knows.

"Tyranny! The Rulers of Sabaody, the Celestial Dragons"

Everyone's gone into town.

You guys aren't going?

Nah, we used up all the cola in that last sea battle.

The ship's maintenance is my job!

And I'm stayin' behind because I wanna help, of course!

Let's all three of us go when we're done!

This island looks like fun!

No,

I'm gonna wait for someone to come back and then go shopping.

Huh? How come?

Actually, you see...

It's because my beloved Nami-san said this...

Whatever will I do?

The ship is so full of treasure right now...

I wish there was a knight somewhere who could protect it for me...

Tadah!

It's me!

You sure know how to fall right into Nami's hands.

I'm a sl*ve of love!

Admitting it yourself saves me trouble.

Hey! Zoro!

Earth to Zoro-kun!

Where are you going all by yourself?!

Just for a walk...

Stop!

Don't you dare, you damn bastard! You always get lost!

This is an archipelago, you know!

We'll never be able to find you!

I ain't gonna get lost!

As if anyone could get lost on such straightforward islands as these!

All the trees are numbered!

Worst case, even a kid could make it back by asking for directions!

Oh!

I never expected you to have such street-smarts!

We underestimated you!

Sorry! Take care!

Make sure to ask for directions!

Don't trust yourself!

I dunno what the hell they're talking about!

I just need to remember this tree's number.

# . Okay.

They can mock me all they want;

I'll never get lost on these islands!

Unlike some other guy with no sense of direction!

The World Nobles are also known as the Celestial Dragons.

They act so high and mighty that they wear masks

to keep from breathing the same air as common people.

Whatever you do, don't defy them!

That's one thing you have to promise!

Sure!

There are a couple other things to watch out for, too.

Like I mentioned before,

people heading for the New World gather on these islands.

There are infamous pirates like you here,

as well as marines and bounty hunters who are out to catch them.

Not to mention kidnappers!

There's no law here at all against buying and selling pirates.

Do anything to stand out and they'll set their sights on you,

so be very careful what you do!

The marines here aren't pushovers, either.

Navy Headquarters is in nearby waters, you see.

Which is why the bounty hunters are all just as ferocious.

And one other thing!

Oh, come on!

There are too many things to watch out for!

Hey, when did you get hurt there?

Oh, this? Don't worry about it.

Camie and I aren't merfolk or fish-men here.

Treat us like we're human on these islands.

Huh? How come?

It'll make things a lot simpler.

When in a city, do as its citizens do, Luffy.

Let's do as Mr. Octopus says.

Harder! And push into it slowly!

I'm inside!

Neat!

How curious!

I can get in! I can get in!

It's not leaking at all!

All right, then!

Put this inside.

Like this?

Is that high enough for ya?

You'll go forward now if you peddle.

Oh! It's going forward!

Awesome!

This is fun!

Yahoo!

It really doesn't pop!

Convenient, huh?

They're Sabaody Archipelago's famous Bubble Bikes!

I wanna ride too!

Whadya say?

It's Berries a day to rent one, or , Berries to buy one!

Pretty cheap, huh?

I think we'll rent--

I want it!

I'll buy this one with my spending money!

Me, too! Me, too!

Forget it!

Let's just rent. There's no point in buying one.

Why do you get to decide?!

Yeah!

Urgh! I'll explain later!

We'll rent two more, mister!

Huh? You're from around these parts? What a bummer...

This feels so nice!

Doesn't it, though?!

They even have different kinds.

It makes me want to sing now!

I think I'm gonna buy a Bubble Bike after all!

Straw Hat.

You know how you first went up into the sky on those bubbles?

Why did you come falling down?

Oh! Actually, I went past the tops of the trees

and wondered if I could go any higher up...

...when all the bubbles around me disappeared

and the bubble I was on suddenly popped too...

Then I fell.

You must have left Sabaody Archipelago's climate area, then.

This place has a suitable climate for Hustle Mustle Mangroves to grow.

Outside that area,

the resin components in the bubbles lose a lot of their capabilities.

I see.

Then that means the bubbles can't be ridden outside of these islands?

That's right.

Newcomers here often buy Bubble Bikes and take them with them.

That's a dirty business.

Renting Bubble Bikes is all you need.

No! I'm buying one!

'Cause I can't agree with that explanation!

You just don't understand it!

Basically, the bubbles will pop outside of these islands,

mysteriously enough!

What?! They pop mysteriously?!

Why didn't you say so sooner!

We have been trying to tell you!

But you can use it on Fish-Man Island, Luffy-chin!

There's a bubble civilization on the sea floor, too!

I wanna go to Fish-Man Island right away!

I can't wait!

Then you should meet the Mermaid Princess!

She's a girl of matchless beauty!

I'm a panderer; shall I hook you up?!

That sounds splendid!

I love having an eyeful of beautiful girls!

Though I lack eyes, due to being a skeleton.

Wait, are you even listening?

Ooh, that smells good!

What's a "Grand-Bun"?

"Grand-Bun" "GR Famous Food"

"GR Famous Grand-choco!!" "GR Famous Grand-Bun!!"

Grand Line Manju buns! Commonly called Grand-Buns!

How about a taste test?

See how they say "Grandline First Half" here?

They're very popular as souvenirs for going into the New World!

They last for three whole months, so you can rest easy!

These are delicious!

Could I ask you to open the next box?

Are you planning to pay?!

Grove # .

There seem to be a lot of hotels here.

They're for the sailors who're waiting for their passes from Marie Jois.

Building hotels is easy, you know!

See, look over there!

Paint a giant bubble with a metal alloy and you have your foundation!

That's how round buildings are made!

Oh?

Robin!

Look! Is that a shopping mall?!

Come again!

Grand-cr*cker! Grand-choco!

Keychain!

Pennant!

You guys are all about the memories!

You really bought a lot!

It'd be tough to lug all that around.

Have 'im bubble pack it for you.

Bubble pack?

It's so light!

You don't need strength to carry stuff on these islands!

Upsy-daisy...

Huh? Where are Nami and Robin?

They went to the shopping mall in Grove # .

They left us in charge of getting the ship coated.

Oh? They did?

Okay! Leave it to us!

Where are we headed again?

Grove # .

It's still a ways away, even by Bubble Bike.

Let's go!

Camie-chan didn't come along when we invited her...

Yeah.

She's been a bit reserved ever since we landed on these islands.

I wonder what's up with her...

Who knows, perhaps this island has a bad history...

Bad history?

Yahoo!

It's so fast!

Huh? Where's Straw Hat?

Over here!

Straw Hat!

I'm in the lead now!

You won't beat me!

We still have a long way to go!

Go, Hatchin!

What?!

When did this suddenly turn into a race?!

I'm sorry!

U-uhh, umm...

I-I'm sorry!

Please stop!

Take it off!

Please! Take...

Take this off!

I...

I'm...

...going back home now!

What's all that noise?

Please! Hey! I beg of you!

Anyone will do!

Just lend me an axe or a saw

or anything!

Please!

I'm just going to break this collar!

I won't hurt anyone!

Please let me go!

I don't want to die!

I've given up on the New World!

I have a wife and kid back home!

Come on! Please! Help me out!

I wanna go home!

My kid was just a baby back then!

The bugger still doesn't even know what I look like!

I'm begging you!

Who's that?

I wanna go home! Please!

I beg of you!

Don't get involved, now.

He's probably a pirate who was caught by kidnappers and then sold!

His owners brought him to this island,

and then he ran away!

Even though he surely knows there's no escape!

W-What's that sound?

Damn this collar!

If only... If only it wasn't for this!

Damn it! No!

No! Stop!

I... I...!

Damn it!

Slaves always have leashes around their necks

that are set to explode if the slaves try to remove them and escape.

I'm gonna buy souvenirs and go home...

I'm giving up the pirate business...

It's an escaped sl*ve!

Get away!

Don't get involved with him!

H-Hey! We need to help that person!

You idiot!

You promised not to get involved, no matter what happens!

What's with this town?!

Hatchin! What should we do?!

There are Celestial Dragons nearby!

It's okay.

Just stay calm, Camie.

Straw Hat.

Come down from the Bubble Bike.

How come?

Just hurry!

Okay... Got it.

Here they come!

That's a Celestial Dra--?

You kneel down, too!

What's the big idea?!

Whoever comes, don't look them in the eyes!

Same for you guys, too!

Right!

Oh, my! How disgraceful, Saruu!

Is that them?

Yeah.

Dear me, Father.

Another one has broken down.

Did you remember to give it a sedative every day?

I most certainly did.

It has no effect on the poor fool.

Please buy me a new one.

Honestly, now!

You're terrible at taking care of them!

You keep breaking everything in my ship captain collection...

It's this thing's fault.

A grown man, always crying about family this, family that!

When he's nothing but a mere human!

Honestly, now!

He's not doing anything now...!

You make me sick.

--She's--! --Stop! Please!

I think I would like a giant for a sl*ve next.

No, you will start with a human child.

I don't like such weak ones!

Please! Just endure it!

It's the navy!

Outta the way!

We need to get out of here for now!

Would you like some tea?

It will help you relax.

I don't feel very good now...

That guy...

Do you think he'll survive?

Even if he does,

he'll probably go to prison, seeing that he's a pirate.

That pirate could've easily beaten that old man and lady!

So why...?!

Harm a Celestial Dragon

and a Navy HQ admiral will lead an entire army here!

An admiral?!

Aokiji?!

It could even be Akainu or Kizaru...

There's no way of knowing.

Navy Headquarters is very close by, you see.

What makes them so high and mighty?!

They share the Creators' blood!

Creators?

The twenty kings who created the huge World Government organization

years ago!

Their descendents are the Celestial Dragons.

With each passing generation, they grow more reckless with power,

which is why they act like that now.

Celestial Dragons...

That him?

Yeah.

No doubt about it.

Straw Hat Luffy.

million Berries!

Shakky's Rip-Off Bar?!

Monkey-chan, is it? Welcome.

You know about me?!

Of course, I would know of the million Berries, Luffy.

However, there are currently,

people with higher bounties than you.

Higher than Luffy?!

On the next episode of One Piece!

New Rivals Gather! The Supernovas

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 11x392 - New Rivals Gather! The 11 Supernovas
comment:
My treasure?

If you want it, you can have it!

Find it!

I left everything this world has to offer there!

And so men rushed onto the Grand Line in pursuit of romanticism!

The world has truly entered a Great Pirate Era!

Luffy and company, realizing that the Sunny will need to be coated

in order to reach Fish-Man Island , their next destination,

stopped off at the Sabaody Archipelago.

This is it!

Sabaody Archipelago!

At the seemingly enjoyable archipelago,

Luffy and company searched for a coating craftsman...

...but they encountered world nobles known as Celestial Dragons

and were witness to their domineering behavior.

Damn it!

If only... If only it wasn't for this!

Honestly, now!

You're terrible at taking care of them!

You make me sick.

She's...!

Stop! Please!

Please! Just endure it!

That pirate could've easily beaten that old man and lady!

So why...?!

Harm a Celestial Dragon

and a Navy HQ admiral will lead an entire army here!

They share the Creators' blood!

Creators?

The twenty kings who created the huge World Government organization

years ago!

Their descendents are the Celestial Dragons.

Straw Hat Luffy.

million Berries.

"New Rivals Gather! The Supernovas"

Gum-Gum...

...p*stol!

What's with this skeleton freak?!

Time to die!

Why, you!

Gavotte Bon en Avant!

Gotcha!

Watch out! He's quick as a monkey!

...I'll just take her hostage!

Gum-Gum...

...Bazooka!

Damn!

He's too strong!

million is too much to handle after all!

I think that girl might be a...

All these bounty hunters suddenly appearing out of nowhere...

I don't see any more taste-testing--

"Navy Keep Out"

so there are always places outside the government's watchful eye.

Marines can't go very far into the interior, either.

Look here.

A map?

For example, the area we've come through...

Your ship is docked at # ,

a tourism area filled with souvenir shops.

centered around Sabaody Park.

where the government comes and goes!

Here?

It's okay!

We're headed for # , the next one over!

Chopper-chin! You and Skeleton-chin were really cool!

I'm blushing so much that my ears are red!

"Sabaody Archipelago - Grove # "

All right! We're here!

We finally made it...

Oh, Pappagu and I don't know him.

"Shakky's Rip-Off Bar"

Shakky's Rip-Off Bar!

Hachi.

people with bounties over million?!

In any case, be careful, wherever you end up looking.

According to my information network,

including you, there are now people on the Sabaody Archipelago

people with bounties over million?!

you'd be # .

Capone "g*ng" Bege.

"From South Blue Captain of the Kid Pirates"

...

link: 11x393 - The Target is Camie! The Looming Clutches of a Professional Kidnapper
comment:
To reach Fish-Man Island, Luffy and company found themselves

looking for a coating craftsman on the Sabaody Archipelago.

world nobles powerful enough to hold sway over Navy Headquarters,

and formidable rookies headed for the New World!

if he's in such a rough town.

My husband will be fine.

After all, he's times stronger than you kids...

"The Target is Camie!! The Looming Clutches of a Professional Kidnapper"

Perhaps this is another case of rookie's luck,

but I believe Navy HQ

probably has its hands full with something else right now.

Unless something especially problematic happens,

they won't waste major military resources on things here.

So, to be more precise,

"Take care not to cause any trouble." Okay?

Gentle rides like this are more my style.

Wow! Look!

Spin! Spin! Spin! Spin!

Spin! Spin! Spin! Spin!

Spin!

Spin! Spin! Spin!

Spin!

Yeah!

Wow! Wow!

So high up!

Marie...

No!

Hospital?

I gotta take him there.

Huh?!

Ain't ever heard of that before!

I saw some bubble bicycle things flying around!

Let's buy some!

We'll need to see how nice they ride.

Oh?

Could that be Nami-san?

Hello, Nami-sa--!

Hello?! It's me!

Me, Chopper!

and we got so caught up in it all...!

Hey, why are you freaking out?!

Sanji?! It's really bad!

What?!

--Eh?! --Huh?!

A young mermaid!

This one will go for quite a price!

Let me go!

Rescue Camie The Archipelago's Lingering Dark History

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

years ago?!

 Alright, you criminals! Release  the Roswald family at once!

 Gum-Gum...



 ...Balloon!



 Repel!



 Room.



 Wh-What's this circle?!



 Shambles.

 "Break Through the Siege! The  Navy vs. the Three Captains"



 Rescue team has arrived at the back  entrance! Now entering the building!



 The rescue team has made it inside!



 All soldiers will commence attack  as soon as the hostages are secured!



 Yes, sir!



 Hurry! On the double!



 Rescue team has reached the stage!

 I can't believe mortars don't  work on any of them...!

 Like we can really wait that long.



 A head!



 Hey! Don't drop me!



 How are you talking?!



 I dunno! My body feels  hot for some reason, too!



 Body?! What are you talking about?!



 This guy's body is burning up over there!



 It's burning up! My body's burning up!



 Huh?! You can feel it?!



 Oww! Oww! Hot!



 Someone! Pour water on it, hurry!

 Watch out, guys!



 That guy! Don't enter the circles he makes!



 Room.



 Y-You mean this?



 Yeah, just like this!



 We've been cut!



 What in the world's going on?!



 Make yourselves comfortable.



 This'll be over before you know it.



 Third Gear!



 Bone Balloon!



 This is the arm of a giant!
