 ...are flying away!



 Wh-What?!



 What the...?!



 What's going on?!



 What is this?!



 What in the...?



 What is that guy?!



 This is no time to be admiring people.



 Wh-What the...?!



 Hey! Those are my legs!



 Then whose are those?!



 You have too many chests!



 Don't look at me!



 Giant p*stol!



 Eat this!



 Whoa, now! This, already?!



 Amazing! I don't believe my eyes!



 You sure know how to go berserk, Captain...



 They're quite reliable, indeed!



 What an impatient bunch.



 What's with that, Straw Hat-ya?  That's not a very good finish...



 Really?



 Their formations don't amount to crap now.



 Brigadier General! It appears all the  pirates have exited the auction house!



 They intend to escape! Don't let  these runts make mockeries of us!



 We have plenty more reinforcements!



 The three hostages have been  secured at the back entrance!



 Aim the mortars at those without powers!



 Firing squads to the rear! We're  now commencing our all-out attack!



 Take those pirates down!



 Here we go. They got no plan at  all. It's a free-for-all now.



 Oh! I'm back to normal!



 Alright, Straw Hat...



 I'm glad I got a chance to meet you.



 But next time we meet,  I won't show any mercy.



 But I'm going to find the One Piece!



 Hey, Kid! What're you  just standing there for?!



 You know, k*ller...



 On our journey up to this point,  we've been laughed at and ridiculed



 whenever we mentioned getting  our hands on the One Piece.



 And each time that happened, I  slaughtered everyone who laughed.



 But what lies ahead is a sea of death



 for those who don't got  the guts to mention it.



 Let's meet again in the New World!



 Let's go, men!



 Yeah!



 Trafalgar Law!



 How dare you toy with my comrades earlier!



 Bepo.



 Huh? You're going back inside, Captain?



 Hey, Luffy!



 Oh! There you are!



 Alright! It's time for us to go, too!



 Let's do it!



 Alright! Bring it on!



 Oh, Sanji!



 Luffy! Look over there!



 Hey! Young Master and friends!



 Flying Fish!



 Hey!



 Eh? Did you just say "handsome"?



 No. I didn't. Not at all.



 Anyway, we're all set to escape! Right, men?!



 Yes! Life is rosy!



 I wasn't expecting help from them again,  but I guess we are in a hurry...



 Alright! Let's go!



 Guess I have no choice...!



 Straw Hat's getting away!



 Lullaby Flanc!



 Escape while you can, you two!



 Yeah!



 Quit sleepin'!



 Are you guys with those pirates?!



 N-No, not us! We aren't pirates!



 Nueve Fleurs!



 Huh?



 Twist!



 Oh, that was scary...!



 Head!



 You have trauma from nearly being k*lled  by Navy Headquarters, and yet...!



 You endured it anyway!  What a fantastic person!



 Q-Quiet! This is no time to talk  about trauma or anything else!



 We owe the young master our lives! We  hafta help him out of this trouble!



 Multi-shot! Flame Star! Flame Star!



 Colonnade Rose!



 Old man! Franky! Go on ahead!



 Right! I appreciate it!



 Don't let 'em escape! After 'em!



 How many of these guys are there?!



 This is certainly exciting!



 You're one lively old geezer!



 Hey! Hurry, you three!



 Yeah!



 Don't let the Straw Hat crew escape!  They're the main criminals!



 Fire! Fire!



 What the...?!



 Thunderbolt Tempo!



 Why?



 He just freed Saint Roswald's sl*ve!



 How did he uncuff him?!



 Will you come along with me,  pirate captain Jean Bart?



 It's been a long time since  I've been called that name.



 If it means I can be free  from the Celestial Dragons...



 ...I'll gladly serve under you!



 Give half of your thanks to Straw Hat-ya.



 Don't let 'em get away! After 'em!



 After 'em!



 Alright! It's up to you now!



 Leave it to us!



 Yahoo!



 Don't let them escape! Fire! Fire!



 Damn! Can't this slowpoke cow go any faster?!



 Actually...



 ...this is his top speed...



 They've caught up?



 Can't we speed this thing up somehow?!



 They fled that way!



 Don't let them get away!



 They're still chasing us, even  after we demolished the bridge!



 Of course they are. There should  be soldiers back in town, too.



 Let's get the hell off these islands.



 Kid!



 Boss!



 There.



 Is that...?!



 What's...



 he doing on these islands?!



 What an agile bear! He's too much to handle!



 How is it even talking?!



 I'm sorry...



 He's weak-hearted!



 Hurry, Bepo!



 Crap! They destroyed the bridge!



 You're a new guy, which  means you rank under me.



 As long as I'm not a sl*ve,  anything's fine with me!



 Did we manage to lose them?!



 Alright! Let's go straight  to the amusement park now!



 Are you crazy?!



 Yahoo!



 How pleasant!



 You're quite skilled to be able to  remodel it in such a short time!



 That's for sure! You're  amazing! It's so fast now!



 I do what I can!



 This is where Peterman's hideout is...



 Peterman?



 Captain! Look!



 Eustass-ya and...



 That's...!



 What is a w*rlord of the Sea doing here?



 Trafalgar Law...



 You know my name?



 Captain!



 We're right next to Navy  Headquarters and Marie Jois!



 Just about anyone can show up here!



 Marines are coming up the rear!



 This guy acts at random!



 Trafalgar! Stay out of my way!



 Do you want to be destroyed? I told  you not to tell me what to do.



 We're running into unexpected  big-sh*ts today.



 I'd rather not add an admiral to that list...



 ...so you will let us pass...



 ...Bartholomew Kuma!



 You were on the Pirate King's ship?!

 Roger turned himself in.

 "Roger and Rayleigh -- The King of the Pirates and His Right Hand Man"

 The time is the Great Pirate Era.



 Countless pirates fight  desperately for the One Piece,



 the great treasure left behind by  Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



 Monkey D. Luffy, a boy  whose body turned to rubber



 after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



 also takes to the sea to become  the next King of the Pirates.



 As Luffy and his friends  overcome numerous adventures,



 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!



 What kind of adventure  is waiting for us next?!



 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 After landing on the Sabaody Archipelago,



 the Straw Hat crew succeeded in  rescuing the kidnapped Camie.



 However, a battle began  with marines lying in wait.



 We're all set to escape!



 The group then attempted to break  through the navy's siege and escape.



 "Roger and Rayleigh -- The King of the Pirates and His Right Hand Man"



 Are you alive, Peterman-san?!



 How dare they do this to our boss!



 Dammit!



 Damn them!



 Still...



 I never expected Duval to have such  a handsome face under that mask!



 Well, see ya! Feel free  to call us again anytime!



 We'll be at your beck and call until you  can safely set sail for Fish-Man Island!



 Okay! Thanks, you guys!



 No problem at all!



 Just quit winking.



 Oh, and one other thing...



 Don't forget this, Miss Mermaid!



 Oh! My backpack!



 That idiot Peterman had it!



 Thank you!



 Alright! Let's go, Life is Rosy Riders!



 Yes, Hand-Rose!



 Their shouts sure change a lot.



 They're probably trying  to find one that clicks.



 Now, then. Let us hurry inside.



 We need to get Hachi into a bed!



 "Shakky's Rip-Off Bar"



 Hey, Shakky! I'm back!



 Oh, welcome back, Ray-san. That  was sooner than I expected.



 I'm impressed you guys managed to find him.



 Ol' Hachi's been seriously hurt.  We need to get him into a bed.



 What happened?!



 This is bad! I'll get a bed ready right away!



 Oh, you said you had something  to tell me afterward, old guy...



 Eh?!



 On the Pirate King's ship?!



 Yes. I'm Silvers Rayleigh,  the ship's vice-captain.



 Nice to meet you.



 Vice-captain?!



 You didn't tell them, Hatchan?



 We only needed his help  with the coating, so...



 Oh? You didn't realize it?



 I know his name so well!



 It's in so many books!



 It's definitely a name everyone  hears at least once...



 Gold Roger...



 I seem to vaguely recall a rookie named  that long ago, but I'm not sure...



 How do such a big-shot and  an octopus know each other?



 Hachi rescued me over    years ago,  when I was stranded in the sea.



 He saved his life. He was still  a child at the time, though.



 Hachi and I remained close after that,  until he joined the Sun Pirates.



 You mean Arlong, right?



 Still...



 Even though Gold Roger was  ex*cuted    years ago,



 you didn't get your head chopped  off for being vice-captain?



 The navy caught the entire crew, didn't it?



 We weren't caught.



 Roger turned himself in.



 The government might've made it  sound like they had caught him



 as a way to show its power, though.



 The King of the Pirates  turned himself in?! Why?!



 Because we saw an end to our journey.



 About four years before the  day of his public execution,



 Roger caught a fatal illness.



 Not even Roger could avoid the suffering



 that this terminal,  incurable disease brought.



 But, there was one man with the  skill to ease his suffering:



 a man at the Twin Capes named Crocus,



 who was the most respected lighthouse  keeper and doctor in the sea.



 We asked for his help and brought him  on as ship doctor for our final voyage.



 Finally, three years later,  while managing to escape death,



 Roger achieved what was  said to be impossible:



 he conquered the Grand Line.



 C-C-Crocus-san?!



 At the Twin Capes?!



 Oh, that brings back memories!



 Huh?! That old guy wasn't  there for    years straight?!



 He was a member of the Pirate King's crew?!



 Come to think of it, he did mention  being a ship's doctor for a few years!



 So he was a pirate for  those three years, then?!



 The fact that you've met him  must mean he's still doing well!



 Crocus agreed to come aboard



 because there was a certain group  of pirates he wanted to look for.



 Brook! It was you guys he set  out to find, no doubt about it!



 Crocus-san...! You even  went to such lengths...!



 He was only a crewmember for three years,



 but he was unquestionably one of us!



 At this age now, it'd be  great to see him again...



 So, what happened after he conquered the sea?



 That's when it all began.



 The world started calling  Roger "King of the Pirates."



 He hadn't been King of the Pirates  the entire time before or anything.



 Titles hold no meaning  for a man about to die.



 But Roger was overjoyed.



 He loved doing everything in a flashy way...



 Whether it was celebrating or fighting...



 He even seemed to enjoy thinking  out a plan for the future,



 even though he wouldn't be a part of it.



 Eventually, as per captain's orders, the  Roger Pirates were secretly disbanded.



 One by one, everyone discretely left.



 As comrades, we all risked  our lives together,



 but I know almost nothing about where  they are or what they're doing now.



 Then, about a year after we disbanded,



 Roger turned himself in and was arrested.



 It was then announced that  he would be publicly ex*cuted



 in Loguetown, the East  Blue town he was born in.



 I hear that many of the young  faces in the town square that day



 went on to make names for themselves  on the high seas today.



 The world focused its attention  on the Pirate King's execution.



 I didn't attend it.



 The final words he said went like this...



 I'm not going to die, partner...



 The World Government and the  navy must've been shocked.



 With only one last remark from Roger,



 the public execution meant to serve  as an example to other pirates



 instead became the opening  ceremony of the Great Pirate Age!



 My treasure?



 If you want it, you can have it!



 Find it!



 I left everything this  world has to offer there!



 In his last few seconds, he  changed the dim flame of his life



 into a hellfire that spread across the world!



 I've never laughed as much  as I did on that night.



 Nor have I ever cried as much...



 ...or drank as much as I did on that night.



 Our captain lived one hell of a life!



 It's like we just heard something incredible!



 It's almost like a different story,  hearing it from someone who was there!



 Then it's almost as if Roger created  this Great Pirate Era on purpose!



 That... we still can't say.



 Roger is dead.



 Only the people living  now can create this era.



 I'm certain there are people who  inherited something from Roger



 on that day in the town square.



 Your good friend, Shanks,  is probably one of them.



 Eh? You know Shanks, old guy?



 Have you also heard of the East  Blue pirate known as Buggy?



 Buggy...



 The two of them were apprentices on our ship.



 Eh?! Shanks was on the Pirate King's ship?!



 What? He didn't tell you about that?



 I ran into him again on these  islands about    years ago,



 and he'd lost his trademark straw  hat, along with his left arm.



 When I asked what had happened,  he cheerfully spoke about you.



 It was a real shock, Rayleigh-san!



 There was a kid in East Blue who said  the same thing Captain Roger did.



 Those same words of our captain!



 And I've wanted to meet you--  Monkey D. Luffy-- ever since.



 Shanks!



 I'm afraid I can't, in good mind, babble  on about things Shanks hasn't told you.



 In any case, you've done  well to come this far!



 I'm sure he's eagerly waiting  for you in the New World.



 Really?! Do you think so?! I  can't wait to see him, too!



 Now, then. Let's get down to business.



 You wanted your ship coated, is that right?



 I should get back to my real work, anyway.



 That reminds me, coating  costs a lot of money...



 No, that's all right, Hachi. I can't  take money from friends of yours.



 That's a relief. Thank you, Rayleigh.



 I dunno why, but he's doing it for free!



 We appreciate it! You're one generous guy!



 It sounds like we just saved a ton of money!



 Rayleigh-san.



 I have a question!



 What exactly is the "Will of D"?



 Roger's name was engraved in ancient writing



 on Poneglyph I saw on a sky island.



 How was he able to use that writing?!



 "I made it here. I will guide this  text to the ends of the earth."



 "Pirate Gol D. Roger"



 Do you people know what happened to the world



 during the Blank Century  that began     years ago?!



 Yes. We know.



 We learned the entirety of history.



 But, Miss. You mustn't be hasty.



 Continue to move forward one  step at a time on your own ship.



 We-- and Ohara-- might have  hurried a bit too much.



 Even if I told you everything  about history right here,



 you still wouldn't be able to  do anything as you are now.



 Once you've taken the time to see the world,



 it's possible you'll be led to  a different answer than we were.



 But, if you still insist on hearing it,



 I can tell you everything  about this world right now.



 No, I'll pass. I'll continue my journey.



 It will all come into sight someday.



 I'm sorry for what happened  to your homeland of Ohara.



 However, Roger didn't decipher that writing!



 We're pirates.



 We can't possibly match  the intellect of geniuses



 like Clover and the scholars of Ohara.



 He heard the voice of the  universe, that's all.



 Whoa, are you sure, Robin?!



 Are you sure you didn't just  pass up an incredible chance?!



 Umm, old guy! There's one  more thing I wanna ask!



 The legendary great treasure, the One Piece!



 Is it really--?!



 Usopp!



 I don't wanna know where the treasure is!



 I don't wanna know if the  treasure exists or not!



 We've put all our lives on  the line and set out to sea,



 even though we don't know anything!



 I'd rather give up being a pirate than  have the old guy tell us stuff now!



 I won't go on a boring adventure!



 S-S-Sorry! I knew that, but it  just slipped out of my mouth...!



 I-I don't wanna know, either!



 Oh, I forgot! I have the "I'll Die If  I Learn About the One Piece" disease!



 Hold on, old guy! Don't say anything!



 Do you think you can do it?



 The Grand Line still far surpasses  anything you can imagine!



 Your foes will be powerful, too.



 Can you rule this mighty sea?!



 I'm not gonna rule anything!



 It's the freest person in this sea  who's the King of the Pirates!



 I see...



 I really am a fan of yours, Monkey-chan.



 Your ship is in Grove #  , was it?



 I think I'll head over there.



 What will you do?



 There could be an admiral on  these islands as we speak.



 We'll only be a nuisance if we stay here,



 so maybe we should go shopping somewhere?!



 What is this, "Laid-Back Life"?!



 We're being chased! We gotta hide, you idiot!



 Yeah. The people chasing us might  show up if we all stay together.



 It'll help him finish the work more  smoothly if we lay low in town.



 Then let's just split up and then  meet back there when he's all done.



 Who're you to talk strategically about  meeting up and stuff like that?!



 Shakky. Do we have any?



 Yes, there's one left.



 This is a Vivre Card!



 Oh, if you know what it is,  that simplifies things.



 Since I happen to be a bit notorious myself,



 I think I'll move it from Grove #   to  somewhere else before I start on it.



 I'll need three days to complete the coating.



 It takes three whole days?!



 Your life depends on this work.  It's the fastest I can go.



 I guess it's three days of  wilderness survival then!



 How frightening!



 Sundown in three days, let's say.



 I don't know what grove I'll be on then,  so wherever the Vivre Cards lead you,



 I'll be there finishing the  coating and waiting for you.



 You should probably also  buy whatever you'll need



 for your underwater voyage  to Fish-Man Island.



 Luffy-chin! Everyone! Thank you so much!



 Yeah! Thanks so much!



 I'm sorry I caused you so much trouble!



 I can't thank you guys enough!



 We'll show you the way to Fish-Man  Island, so don't worry about a thing!



 Watch out for the navy  for the next three days!



 Hachi! Get plenty of bed rest!



 Let's meet again in three  days. We'll see you off.



 See you later, lady!



 We're up against an admiral! We gotta  make sure none of us gets k*lled!



 Don't say unlucky things like that!



 Three days, huh...



 Alright! Let's go!



 To the amusement park!



 Hey, now!



 A navy warship's been  spotted from the harbor!



 The admiral's here!



 This is Kizaru.



 I've arrived.



 Please respond.



 Is the admiral really coming?



 I don't want to meet him!



 The one we met before, Aokiji, was crazy  strong with that freezing Devil Fruit power!



 Oh, dear! I bet the other  admirals have powers, too!



 I'm scared!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "No Escape!? Admiral Kizaru's  Light Speed Kick!!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 Room.



 Shambles!

 Commence attack! Cannons, ready!



 Open the gunports!



 Commence bombardment!



 What?!



 Fire!



 What the...?!

 It turned big--!



 What's going on?!



 He didn't do anything himself!



 Cavalry! Charge!



 Something else is coming  out of his stomach now!



 Troops keep coming out!



 I-It's horses this time!



 Capone g*ng Bege!



 What the hell power does that guy have?!



 Firing squad! Aim!



 What's this smoke?!



 Father! There's too much smoke!



 I told you you don't have  enough troop strength!



 Get outta here! Hurry!



 I still haven't eaten enough...



 I'm sure there'll be good food  on the next island, too!



 Hey! Did you hear?!



 A w*rlord of the Sea has joined the attack!



 Are you serious?! Who is it?!



 A w*rlord?!



 I was fully expecting an admiral...!



 I guess quietly passing by Navy  Headquarters is out of the question.



 But...



 ...I have my pride to think of, too!



 Please, just escape, Captain Hawkins!



 Captain Hawkins!



 Combat: Chance of Defeat:    %.



 Say, can you help me?



 Escape: Chance of Success:   %.



 I'm looking for a man named Sentomaru...



 Defense: Chance of Evasion:   %.



 Hey...



 I know no such man.



 Ask someone else.



 Well, actually, if I can't find him,  then that leaves me with spare time...



 And if I'm not busy,  I obviously can't let a wanted man go...



 Especially one like you,  with a     million bounty...



 ..."Magician" Basil Hawkins!



 Speed is weight!



 Have you ever been  kicked at the speed of light?



 Captain!



 We're ready to set sail!



 Alright! Let's scram!



 Wh-What happened?!



 H-Hey! What happened?!



 I don't know! He suddenly went flying!



 This guy's strong, all right...



 Whoa! He's still going!



 H-Hey! What happened?! He just suddenly--!



 Where'd the attack come from?!



 Captain!



 Impressive. You far surpass what I imagined.

 Hawkins, of North Blue, huh?

 "Red Flag" X. Drake!

 You, again?!



 Rear Admiral Drake.



 Crap! I hadn't planned  on running into Kizaru!

 but let's find out now if  I really have any hope left or not!



 I think I'll start with  a small counterattack.



 Look! Things are really crazy now!



 This is great stuff!



 This is really dangerous!  They're all going to die!

Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 We've left the established course



 Right now, we're rowing straight toward



 The borderline between the sky and the ocean



 In the dark depths of the ocean, adventure holds its breath



 Don't you have a good time just imagining it?



 Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 "That feeling" I get when embarking



 Is something I hope to remember always



 If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



 With our pulses racing, let's go on a trip now



 Shy hearts engrave the rhythm of adventure



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Life is "Adventurous"



 Be aware it's "Dangerous"



 Who's gonna be "One of us"



 And a trip goes on because



 We da pirate of the "Mass"



 To the West, To the East



 Gotta find my way, Sail away



 All the way to "One piece"!!



 Stuff a dream into your empty chest



 And spread your wings



 If the wind blowing through them dyes your heart



 Let's press forward



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 The time is the Great Pirate Era.



 Countless pirates fight  desperately for the One Piece,



 the great treasure left behind by  Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



 Monkey D. Luffy,  a boy whose body turned to rubber



 after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



 also takes to the sea to become  the next King of the Pirates.



 As Luffy and his friends  overcome numerous adventures,



 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!



 What kind of adventure  is waiting for us next?!



 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 Seeking a ship coating craftsman  to help them reach Fishman Island,



 the Straw Hat crew landed  on the Sabaody Archipelago,



 where they met Rayleigh, a craftsman and the  former vice-captain of the Roger Pirates.



 Luffy and company headed into town to  hide while Rayleigh coated the Sunny,



 but Admiral Kizaru, an assassin  dispatched from Navy Headquarters,



 has already arrived at the  Sabaody Archipelago...



 Hello? This is Kizaru. Hmm? How odd...



 Hello?



 --Now! Take this! --S-Stop...!



 Hello?



 Fierce battles broke out everywhere  between the navy and the rookies...



 It turned big--!



 What's going on?!



 He didn't do anything himself!



 Well, actually, if I can't find him,  then that leaves me with spare time...



 And if I'm not busy, I obviously  can't let a wanted man go...



 Especially one like you,  with a     million bounty...



 ..."Magician" Basil Hawkins!



 Speed is weight!



 Have you ever been kicked  at the speed of light?



 Captain!



 Captain!



 Impressive. You far surpass what I imagined.

 --Get back, Luffy! --He's one of the Warlords of the Sea!



 A w*rlord?! How come you guys know that?!



 Don't let that attack hit  you! It's a shockwave!



 What is this?!



 He can do this, too?!



 Hey! You lied about it being a shockwave!



 Second Gear!



 We know he's strong, so let's  go all-out at the very start!



 Something's off here...  He seems different from last time.



 He better hurry.



 They're going to...



 ...get rid of all the rookies!



 "Overwhelming!  The Navy's Fighting Weapons, the Pacifistas"



 Unbelievable...



 From his hands and his mouth...



 Frightening!



 Here comes another! Here comes another!



 Here it comes!



 Wh-What the hell are those things?!



 They're beams, obviously!



 Beams of light would make incredible  weapons, but that's just fantasy!



 Wait... what are you doing?



 Playing dead.



 He's already seen through that!



 Three-Sword Style...



 ...Gum-Gum...



 ...Diable...



 ...Mouton...



 ...Jet...



 ...    Pound...



 ...Cannon!



 Yes! Did they get him?!



 They're amazing!



 This is a w*rlord of the Sea.



 I don't think it'll be that easy,  judging from their expressions...



 He's that different?!



 Maybe he's a twin, then?!



 Yeah, it's a possibility!



 Anyway, the real one would've  teleported and dodged our att*cks...



 More than that, he doesn't use shockwaves,



 and doesn't got paws, either!



 But if this is a fake,  then that's the real problem.



 That'd mean there are  two guys who're this strong.



 You gave me quite a thrashing.



 Don't think I'm the same  as I was before, though!



 Karma Exposure!



 That must've hurt a little...



 Mad Monk Urouge, a man who has  continually escaped death to this day,



 has such power after growing in size...



 So how can this be?



 Hot!



 That was Kizaru's laser!



 Vegapunk! You've recreated  Kizaru's offensive abilities



 using Bartholomew Kuma's body?!



 I had no idea the Pacifistas  had already reached this point!



 This is no ordinary situation!



 Definitely not! Not even three  people worth over     million



 can survive against a  w*rlord and a navy admiral!



 Rear Admiral Drake.  Oh, I mean former Rear Admiral.



 Don't tell me you're here to  conduct surveillance on them?



 Go ahead, try fighting it.



 I think your inside knowledge will make  your despair all the greater, though.



 I suggest that you little  hatchlings exercise caution.



 I'm here too, you see!



 What another incredible sight!



 A rare ancient Zoan type!  I've never seen one before!



 Oh? I'm surprised red blood flows inside you.



 What a rare sight...



 As I said, I'm here too.



 All you people worth over     million  are monstrous and frightening...



 Demon-Conquering Form!



 He disappeared?!



 M-My eyes!



 Captain Hawkins!



 I... can't see...



 I don't know what power you have,  but you do have a physical form.



 You don't seem to be a Logia type...



 Captain!



 This is bad!



 He's going over his damage limit!  He's really gonna die!



 You'll be the first to go...



 You did well to journey all this way.



 Who is that?



 ♪ Yo! Yo-yo-yo! Yeah! Yo! ♪



 ♪ Is this music reaching you?!  If you can hear it, stay tuned! ♪



 ♪ Navy Admiral Kizaru! ♪



 ♪ Yeah! Yo-yo-yo! Yo! ♪



 He's "Sea Roar"...



 ♪ Everybody! Listen to  this fighting music! ♪



 ♪ Scratch! ♪



 What's this?



 Here we go!



 Check it out!



 Got 'em!



 Though I doubt that'd be  enough to beat a navy admiral!



 Whew, I managed to see  so much interesting stuff!



 Well, it's time for me to scram! So long!



 How terrible...



 What a shock that was...



 Yata Mirror.



 What's that?



 Hello?



 Huh? Hello?



 Oh, here it is.



 This is Borsalino.



 What the hell, Uncle!  You do have a Baby Transponder Snail!



 Why didn't you contact me?!



 Oh?



 Oh, Sentomaru-kun!



 Don't give me, "Oh!" What are you doing?!



 You're on the island now, right?!



 Oh, I wasn't able to get  ahold of you, you see...



 Don't tell me you were talking into  the Black Transponder Snail again!



 I told you before that the black one  on your wrist is for eavesdropping!



 Oh, yes...



 Whatever! Just get to work now!



 The culprits have split up!



 Straw Hat Luffy,  Captain Kid, Trafalgar Law...



 Which do we start with?



 Oh, you don't say? In that case...



     Pound Cannon!



 Concasser!



     Pound...



 You idiot! What're you doing?!



 Zoro!



 Hey, Zoro! You got hurt so  much you can't even move?!



 Forget about him, Luffy!



 We need to beat this thing first!



 Yeah...!



 He hasn't even had the chance  to fully heal from last time!



 Just standing up to him  must be pretty damn painful,



 judging by that look of his again!



 Bastard...



 If you ain't Bartholomew Kuma,  then who are you?!



 You look exactly like  the w*rlord of the Sea...



 What the hell's goin' on here?!



 Another enemy?!



 I got the toughest defense in the world!



 As such, my mouth is sealed just as tight!



 Who are you?!



 I have no reason to answer anything!



 I'm the most tight-lipped guy in the world!



 And my name is...



 You're gonna tell us, then?!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "An Even Stronger Enemy Appears!  The Battle Axe-Carrying Sentomaru"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 Omao-chan!



 Gum-Gum Bazooka!



 Boss! Franky-san and the others are...!



 Get Dr. Bluenose right away!



 Right!



 Hey, you alright?



 My head hurts...



 I'm bleary-eyed...



 I don't have eyes, though,  as I'm nothing but bones...



 I'd say you're too okay.



 I remember.



 Your memory is back?!



 Yes.



 I remember everything now.



 Wh-What's with that get-up?  Where are you going?



 I should not be here.



 This is because...



 ...I'm actually a member of Thriller Company.



 What?!



 Brook-san...



 Come on, now!



 That's not a very funny joke!



 Thank you for everything.



 Hey...!



"To Be Continued"



 What's with those Thriller Company guys?



 Destroying the portable shrines  so they can win without trying...



 That's beyond cowardly!



 Yeah! They won't get away with this!



 We'll win this fight!



 Everybody, attack!



 Do it yourself!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Feudal Era Side Story -  Defeat Thriller Company's Trap"



 I'm gonna be a detective!

 Previously...



 Boss Luffy and company entered  a festival's Great Portable Shrine Race,



 with the prize being a sacred treasure  passed down in Grand Jipang.



 Together with an amnesic Brook,



 they enjoyed their time before the festival.



 But, the night before the festival,



 everyone's shrines were destroyed  by Hogback of Thriller Co.,



 which is bent on having the sacred treasure.



 It's all over!



 We can't enter the race like this!



 Our only choice is to drop out now...



 If this was all meant to destroy  their portable shrine before the race...



 ...then ours is in danger too!



 I remember.



 Your memory is back?!



 Yes.



 I remember everything now.



 Wh-What's with that get-up?  Where are you going?



 I should not be here.



 This is because...



 ...I'm actually a member of Thriller Company.



 And so, with his memory returned,



 Brook disappeared into the dark night alone.



 "Feudal Era Side Story -  Defeat Thriller Company's Trap"



 That was a great rampage tonight!



 Perona-sama should be quite pleased.



 Who're you?!



 You have strayed from the path of humanity...



 Though you aren't human to begin with.



 I will punish you on Heaven's behalf!



 Oww, oww...



 There, that should do it.



 Thanks...



 The race is tomorrow,  but I let them destroy the portable shrine...



 I'm a failure as a carpenter!



 It's not your fault, Master Builder!



 So it's Hogback's cronies who're to blame...



 Brook...



 Where do you suppose Brook went?



 Would you like me to tell you?



 Who're you?!



 Just a city girl who's passing by.



 How beautiful!



 Again?!



 That skeleton was indeed a  member of Thriller Company,



 but he grew sick of its despicable  ways and left the organization.



 But he may feel responsible for  the shrines that were destroyed today.



 Boss Luffy...



"Thriller Company"



 Pinwheel members...



 I will make amends for how I have lived.



 Wait, Boss!



 Sheesh, he never thinks things through!



 Brook!



 Fool!



 I don't like hurting!



 Shut up!



 I never imagined you were still alive!



 Not after we hurt you so much  and sent you down the river



 when you left the organization...



 Why have you come to throw away  the life you managed to cling to?



 There is no point in explaining!



 You would never understand!



 Add another weight!



 Right! Another weight!



 You're acting unsightly!



 Enough! Finish him off!



 Hold on! Time out! I don't want to die yet!



 Wait, I'm already long dead...



 But I don't want this!



 Shut the hell up!



 Brook!



 Boss!



 What's the big idea, leaving like that?



 Come on! Let's go back!



 Not so fast!



 You're that policeman from earlier!



 Move.



 You guys piss me off, but I have  no business with you right now.



 We can't quietly let an enemy leave,  not even if he's a public official!



 Destroy him!



 You're annoying the neighborhood, dammit!



 Three-Sword Style! Tatsu-Maki!



 Gum-Gum Billy Club!



 Don't falter!



 Overwhelm them with sheer numbers!



 There's no end to 'em!



 They're...



 ...gone!



 Where they hell did they go?! Find them!



 We're back!



 My word...



 Boss! Brook! Welcome back!



 Welcome back!



 You must be hungry!  Have some special Stamina Rice Balls!



 Ooh! They look yum!



 What are you all doing?



 We're fixing our portable shrine!



 You can't be serious...



 The race is tomorrow, you know!  You'll never make it in time!



 Not if we can help it!



 Why? Why would you go to such lengths?!



 Pride!



 Turning tail and running  isn't our style at all!



 Yes!



 We're the exact same way!



 Rolling Express!



 I hear you're lacking raw materials!



 Please use any pieces you want  from our broken portable shrine!



 You're the Flying Fish Riders!



 We brought ours too, so you can use it!



 We're placing our spirit in your hands!



 Really?!



 Guys...!



 Now I can build a super portable  shrine just like the one I imagined!



 That's right!



 Let's do it!



 Looks like we're going to  need more food for supper!



 I'll go and make a lot!



 Sanji-kun! We're counting on you!



 Nami-swan!



 Just leave it to me!



 What's the matter, Brook?



 Don't just stand there, help!



 But how can I ever have the face to?



 Just come on!



 Not the knees!



 You're already one of the  shrine bearers, you know!



 Do I have to spell it out for you?



 He means you're our friend.



 Friend...?



 Thank you!



 Hey, you! There are no free meals, boy!



 Oh.



 Oh! I'll play a song to liven things up!



 Oh, I'm rarin' to go now!



 Alright! Let's do it!



 Yeah!



 What is that?!



 It's huge!



 It's enormous!



 None of the other entrants  even stand a chance!



 What other entrants?



 We destroyed everyone's shrines  and made them drop out of the race!



 It won't be long now!



 We only need to get this jumbo  portable shrine across the finish line



 and the treasure's all ours!



 Hold on, Cindry-chan! Why  are you in front of me?!



 It's almost noon.



 Let the victory parade begin.



 Please wait!



 The Pinwheel Eatery will  also be participating!



 What?!



 Thriller Company!



 The treasure is ours!



 You can do it, Pinwheel!



 Bring it on, then!



 The Great Portable Shrine Race for  the sacred treasure will now take place!



 Thriller Company!



 Pinwheel Eatery!



 Both teams will battle it out!



 Ready!



 You're in the way!



 I can't see!



 This is no time to be foolin' around!



 They've taken the lead!



 My Flying Fish!



 I'm borrowing this!



 Thief!



 This is too heavy, Master...



 You feeble fools!



 Now they'll catch up to us!



 Stay calm!



 The genius Hogback-sama's  portable shrine isn't on this low a level!



 So long!



 Huh?! What is that?!



 Looks like it's time to  show off our true power, too!



 Boss! Feed this cola to the shrine!



 Okay!



 Here?



 Wh-Whoa!



 Everyone get on the shrine!



 Here we go!



 Hey! That's against the rules!



 Like you're one to talk!



 Neither one is a portable shrine anymore...



 We're getting nowhere like this!



 Leave it to me!



 Try this on for size!



 That's a cannon!



 Look out!



 If that's how it's gonna be...!



 Victory is ours now!



 This can't be!



 Look!



 Support Paddle!



 I can't talk!



 Keep it as a pet.



 Guys! Keep moving along the river!



 It's a quicker route than on land!



 Got it!



 You're not going anywhere!



 Get them!



 They just keep coming...!



 I thought this might happen!



 You have a trick of your own?!



 Drive right, now!



 Talk and you'll bite your tongue off!



 Shut up!



    Pound Phoenix!



 It's the Grand Shrine!



 Boss! This is the last of the cola!



 Alright!



 What?!



 This sucks!



 They're not getting away!



 Look! It's the goal!



 Marry me!



 Go!



 This...



 ...is the giant portable shrine's...



 ...true form?



 Monkey! Monkey!



 What a huge spider!



 I commend you for forcing my trump card!



 However...!



 This is the end!



 Spider Sticky Net!



 We're stuck!



 Hey! Can't you do something?!



 I do have one last trick up my sleeve...



 ...but I'm out of cola!



 Cola?!



 Onami-san! Down there!



 This is the end!



 Monkey! Monkey!



 Boss!



 Win!



 Yeah!



 Gaon Cannon!



 Fire!



 No way!



 Th-This can't be!



 Hold on!



 Wait, where is Cindry-chan?!



 When did she...?!



 W-Wait! Let's discuss this!



 You ruined the festival everyone  was looking forward to!



 Now you're going to pay!



 We are?!



 And the winner is Pinwheel Eatery!



 Congratulations!



 Now, then...



 The million Ryo-Berry prize!



 I'm afraid I'm going to have to keep this.



 Huh?!



 Just look at the disastrous  state of this town!



 You can't be serious...!



 But...



 As promised, the sacred treasure is yours!



 Alright!



 We did it!



 I wonder what the sacred treasure is like!



 It's been     years since  its last exhibition,



 so this will be my first  time seeing it as well.



 Okay!



 This is the magical sacred treasure  passed down in Grand Jipang...



 "Instructions for the Maiden Panties..."



 "Make a wish with these panties on  and it will be granted forthwith."



 "Limited to beautiful women only"?!



 Wonderful!



 Omao-san.



 Do you think you could  put those panties on for me?



 Yuck!



 Huh? Where am I? Who am I?



 You've lost your memory again?!



 Brook-san!



 After being sent flying away from  Sabaody Archipelago by Kuma,



 Luffy lands on a unique island.



 In the jungle, Luffy eats the  wrong mushrooms and collapse.



 There, he is found by a group of beautiful  female warriors bearing snakes.



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Landing! The All-Female Island,  Amazon Lily"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 The time is the Great Pirate Era.



 Countless pirates fight  desperately for the One Piece,



 the great treasure left behind by  Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



 Monkey D. Luffy,  a boy whose body turned to rubber



 after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



 also takes to the sea to become  the next King of the Pirates.



 As Luffy and his friends  overcome numerous adventures,



 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!



 What kind of adventure  is waiting for us next?!



 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 Realizing their ship needs to be  coated to reach Fishman Island,



 the Straw Hat crew landed  on the Sabaody Archipelago.



 There they met Rayleigh, a skilled craftsman



 and the former vice-captain  of the Roger Pirates.



 However, Sentomaru,  captain of the Science Unit,



 stood before the crew.



 Ashigara Dokkoi Shove!



 Luffy!



 Navy Admiral Kizaru appeared next,



 and Luffy and friends found  themselves in a grave situation!



 Now you can have a nice, long rest...



 Zoro!



 You're getting involved in this...



 ...Dark King Rayleigh?!



 Don't be plucking these young sprouts!



 Their era is just about to begin!



 Old guy!



 Thanks to Rayleigh's help,



 it appeared the crew had escaped danger,



 but then Bartholomew Kuma,  a w*rlord of the Sea, also appeared!



 We will never meet again.



 Farewell...



 And so the Straw Hat crew  suffered a complete collapse.



 "Landing! The All-Female Island,  Amazon Lily"



 D-Damn...



 I can't seem to wink right...!



 Duval-sama! We found it! A bay by Grove #  !



 Got it! I'll be right there!



 Alright, men!



 Protect it at all costs,  in the name of the Rosy Life Riders!



 Yes, sir!



 Hurry, Motobalo! Grove #  !



 Still, what were those  island-shaking shockwaves?



 I hope they're okay...



 You still haven't caught them?!



 Admiral Kizaru is currently pursuing them,



 so it should only be a matter of time!



 Please have patience!



 You pathetic, dimwitted dogs!



 Not only did they do this  to my father and brother,



 but they also let all of our slaves escape!



 What do they take the blood  of this world's Creators for?!



 When I get my hands on them,



 I'm going to put them through  a living hell so horrible



 that they'll crawl on the ground  and beg for forgiveness!



 Duval-sama.



 What's taking Young Master Straw Hat  and the others so long?



 Maybe they're busy with  the people chasing ‘em?



 I heard the port's in a real uproar!



 Yeah. I saw it from the air.



 Marines and pirates were having at it.



 It was a real mess!



 Then that's all the more  reason to stay sharp!



 We don't want any idiots showing up  and taking off with this ship!



 Guard it well until the  coating craftsman arrives!



 Rosy Life Riders!



 Yes, Duva-some!



 I'm suddenly feeling uneasy.



 I hope Luffy-chin and the others are okay...



 What's with you, Camie?!



 Don't say worrisome stuff like that!



 But...



 They're strong.  There's nothing to worry about, Camie...



 I hope you're right...



 You "hope"? Knock that off!



 You saw for yourself how strong they are!



 They'll be fine!



 They're up against a navy admiral.



 Not even Monkey-chan's group  stands a chance strength-wise.



 The seas ahead will be rough.



 Giant waves they've never  seen before are coming.



 They mustn't let these waves do them in.



 There. Can you hear it?



 Little by little, the tide of  the times is beginning to change.



 Meanwhile, Monkey D. Luffy,  after being ejected



 from Sabaody Archipelago  by Bartholomew Kuma...



 Damn it!



 Zoro! Nami!



 Usopp! Sanji! Chopper!



 Robin! Franky! Brook!



 Where did you send all my friends?!



 Where did you disappear to, guys?!



 That bear-like w*rlord  of the Sea is gonna pay!



 How far am I gonna fly, anyway?!



 Oh, come to think of it...



 I don't know if it's true or not,  but they say that his paw pads



 can send a person flying through the  sky for three days and three nights!



 Then, could that mean that  instead of disappearing,



 they were all sent flying like this too?



 I wonder if that axe guy  was telling the truth...



 Three whole days of this...



 I'm dead if I fall into the ocean...



 I'm hungry, too...



 But... I'm feeling sleepy...



 Zoro... Nami...



 Usopp... Sanji... Chopper...



 Robin... Franky... Brook...



 Everyone!



 Through the sky he continued to soar.



 And then...



 I'm alive...



 I don't think my being rubber  is why I'm still alive...



 But what's this bear paw-looking thing?



 I just hope the others  were saved the same way...



 Anyway, I gotta get back!



 Where is this...



 ...and which way is Sabaody Archipelago?!



 Oh, yeah!



 I have my Vivre Card!



 Good thing we all got one!



 Alright! I gotta go back!  I gotta get back there!



 I'm sure I'll see everyone again!



 That way!



 Everyone focus on escaping!



 As we are now, we can't beat these guys!



 Just get out of here!



 You can think things over after you're safe!



 Go!



 What's wrong with me?!



 I couldn't save even one of my friends...!



 Ouch!



 Actually, that doesn't hurt,



 but oh, there's something in the way...



 Still...



 ...the card is pointing this way...



 Alright!



 Giant p*stol!



 N-No good...



 I'm out of strength...



 Sanji! Food!



 Oh, wait, he's not here...



"Stomach rumble"



"Stomach rumble"  "Stomach rumble"  "Stomach rumble"



 Thanks for the food!



 This brings back memories



 of when Grandpa would throw me  into the jungle when I was a kid!



 I don't wanna remember that.



 This place sure is quiet, though...



 Aren't these Laughing Mushrooms?



 Yeah! This is perfect for times like this!



 Now I'm having fun!



 Even though I'm all alone!



 There are some weird ones over here, too!



 Now I'm feeling mad!



 Laughing Mushrooms! Laughing Mushrooms!



 Oh! There are weird mushrooms here, too!



 Crying Mushrooms!



 Hurry! The smoke is rising from over there!



 They've been anchored offshore for a while;



 you don't think they secretly  made landfall, do you?!



 If so, then this is very serious!



 No! There's heavy security  all around the island!



 Besides, if by some chance  they did get through,



 it's hard to believe they'd do anything  to draw attention to themselves!



 Then who is it?



 I don't know.



 Let's split into two groups now!



 Got it!



 What is that?!



 Margaret! Margaret!



 Over here!



 What is it, Sweetpea?



 What do you make of this?



 Of what?



 What do you suppose this is?



 Wh-What the...?! This is a person!



 Is it someone from the village?



 I don't know.



 There are so many mushrooms  growing out of her body...



 Do you think maybe it was actually  a signal fire calling for help?



 This is it.



 Look! She ate this mushroom!



 A Parasite Mushroom.



 When eaten, mushrooms  grow out of your body!



 This is bad!



 If we don't do something, the mushrooms  will sap away her vitality and k*ll her!



 So it's a race against time!



 Aphelandra! Carry her to the village!



 Okay!



 To the village it is!



 Let's hurry!



 We have an urgent patient!



 Hey! Down in front! I can't see!



 What happened to her?!  She's covered in mushrooms!



 Have you seen her in the village before?



 No, never...



 Hey, who is she?



 The mushrooms are covering her face...



 Where do you think she came from?



 Is she even alive?



 She ate a Parasite Mushroom.



 What should we do, Belladonna?



 They come off when pulled,  so pull them out. All of them.



 They come off?



 They really do!



 But some of the roots are left behind!



 I'll get rid of them afterward,  so don't worry about the roots.



 You've certainly brought  a strange one home, Margaret.



 I couldn't help it!



 She was barely alive,  and she might be from the village!



 That's all of them!



 Okay. Now step back a little.



 Ouch! Hot! Hot!



 I-I-I'm on fire!



 Put me out! Ouch!



 Hold on, Belladonna! What are you doing?!



 This is the only way to keep  them from growing back.



 But isn't that a little excessive?



 She passed out again!



 Still, she was covered in injuries  before she was covered in mushrooms.



 Really?



 They seem like marks  from a tremendous battle.



 We'll need to treat her wounds, too.



 I hate to ask, Margaret,



 but could you go wash her off in the river?



 O-Okay! Sure!



 It sounds like she's not from  this village after all, Sweetpea.



 Yeah...



 Huh? Look here!



 What's wrong?



 There's still a mushroom  between her legs that we missed!



 There's one left!



 But doesn't this one seem  different from the others?



 It's oddly shaped!



 Huh? There's something  weird underneath it, too!



 What is this? A Sack Mushroom?



 Anyway, I guess we better pull it off!



 Alright!



 It won't come off! How come?!



 It's stretching!



 Hey, what's going on? What happened?



 She says it stretches...



 What does?!



 A mushroom!



 Seriously? Is it a Neat Mushroom?



 That's enough gawking, all of you!



 This isn't a freak show!



 You're watching too, you know!



 Look! There seems to be a problem!



 Still, she's not very well-endowed.



 She even seems sort of rugged.



 It's no use.



 Maybe Aphelandra can pull it off!



 Huh? Me?



 Yeah, yeah!



 I bet it'll come off if you  pull as hard as you can!



 Maybe we should all pull it together!



 No.



 If that mushroom won't come off...



 ...then we should simply  burn it off as Belladonna did!



 Oh! Yes! That's a good idea!



 Don't you agree, Margaret?



 Yes!



 What's this? What's this?



 What's going on?



 Oh, Granny Nyon!



 There's a mushroom growing  on this girl that won't come off!



 So we're deciding whether  we should pull it off all together



 or burn it off.



 Now, now. Wait. Just who is this?



 This is it here.



 Let's see here...



 Where is this mushroom?



 Oh, my!



 Granny Nyon!



 Are you all right?!



 Y-Yes, th-there's nothing to worry about...



 Th-This person...



 Th-This person...



 ...is a m-m-man!



 Th-This is a m-man?!



 I've never seen one before!



 Here sits the maiden island of Amazon Lily,



"Kuja"



 inhabited by the tribe of  female warriors known as the Kuja.



 May you never dream of it or step foot on it,



 should you still value your life.



 The imprisoned Luffy



 plans an escape so he can rejoin his friends.



 Fearful that the Snake Princess, Hancock,



 will find out that they brought  a man into their tribe,



 they begin to pursue him.



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Hurry Back to Your Friends!  The Maiden Island Adventure"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

"Maiden Island – Amazon Lily"



This is the all-female land of Amazon Lily.



 On occasion, women will leave  the island and return with child,



 but oddly enough,  they only give birth to girls.



"Kuja"



 Inside a tall mountain surrounded  by thick jungle is a large hole,

 Come on in!



 Oh, that ribbon!

 I found it!



 Step right up! We have  Sea King meat on hand today!

 I brought it!

 they truly are burly and large-hearted,



 but they also have an air of  elegance about them as well.

  ,    Gol on Poppy!



  ,    on Pansy!

 eradication is all that awaits him.



 "Prison"

 I'm naked!

 I feel breezy!

 Bag?

 Balls?



 Balls?



 Balls?



 Balls?

 Gorgeous!



 Family jewels!

 so I made new ones with the same design!

 Prepare to attack!



 What?!

 Wantonly yelling without any care  for the fact that we saved his life...

 Even so, Kikyo!

 Wait! Hold on!

 What happened?! Tell me!



 These girls saved you after you ate  a lethal mushroom and collapsed.



 Oh, really?! Thanks, you!



 Sorry for complaining about the clothes!



 Just don't sh**t me!



 Your apologies and excuses mean nothing!



 This is the woman empire of Amazon Lily!



 Men are forbidden!



 That has been the absolute  rule here for centuries!



 Never in history has it been broken!



 Woman empire?!



 Woman empire?!



 Now that you've regained consciousness,



 we have no sympathy for you!



 Yeah! Now that I look closer,  it's nothing but women!



 What a weird country!



 We'll put an end to that  disdainful way of talking as well!



 Hey!

 Aphelandra!



 When the Snake Princess returns,



 she will absolutely disapprove  of this situation!

 Margaret.



 Sweetpea.



 Aphelandra.



 This is for your sake!



 It is best that we cover up this incident!



 Wait! Let me go!



 I have to get to the place  my friends and I agreed on!



 sh**t!



 He broke through the roof!



 Don't let him escape!



 These arrows are really strong!



 Yikes!



 He's nimbler than he looks!



 Aphelandra!



 Right!



 Sorry for saving you and then doing this!



 He fell!

 Hmm, now what do I do?



 Take him down!



 Don't let him escape! After him!



 There he is!



 Only one meat chop left  until they're sold out!



 First come, first served!



 Hold on! You gotta pay for that!



 Treasure payment plan!



 Enemy on the loose!

 My food disappeared!



 What is that?!



 He went that way!



 My meal is gone too!



 k*ll him!



 Just give yourself up!



 I-Is it just me, or are  there a lot more of ‘em?!



 Get back here!

 Right!

 I can't stop!



 Sweetpea!

 The time is the Great Pirate Era.



 Countless pirates fight  desperately for the One Piece,



 the great treasure left behind by  Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



 Monkey D. Luffy,  a boy whose body turned to rubber



 after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



 also takes to the sea to become  the next King of the Pirates.



 As Luffy and his friends  overcome numerous adventures,



 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!



 What kind of adventure  is waiting for us next?!



 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 Luffy was ejected from  the Sabaody Archipelago



 by Bartholomew Kuma, a w*rlord of the Sea.



 He landed in the female-only  empire of Amazon Lily!



 "Everyone Falls in Love!  Pirate Empress Hancock"



 Sorry I can't pay you back for  everything you've done for me.



 Well, I should be going now!



 Men are so mysterious.



 Their arms stretch, they suddenly grow fat,



 their chests are flat,



 and between their legs they have...



 Hate to ask for help again,  but could you take these off?



 Your family jewels?!



 No! I mean these!



 I'm going to look for my friends now!



 But they'll laugh if they  see me dressed like this!



 I think it looks very nice on you...



 There.



 Thanks!



 Hating frills...



 Men really are strange creatures.



 Well, yeah, I guess so.



 Thanks for taking it off!



 Well, bye!



 I'll never feel relaxed  until I find my friends!



 You certainly are hasty...



 As long as the others are still alive  like I am, that's all that matters.



 As long as they're alive,



 I can keep fighting again and again!



 I'm gonna surpass all of those guys!



 Alright! I'm gonna walk on my hands  all the way to Sabaody Archipelago!



 That'll make me stronger!



 Could you give me a ship?



 You really are hasty...



 You don't have any ships?!



 This is a Calm Belt?!



 Yes. This maiden island is surrounded



 by a giant Sea King den known as a Calm Belt.



 Which is why sailors never dare come near.



 Castaways will sometimes  miraculously drift here,



 but most of the time only as corpses.



 But you said there's a pirate group here!



 The Snake Princess's pirate ship, the Yuda,



 is pulled by vicious, poisonous sea snakes,



 so Sea Kings can't attack it.



 It's the only ship on Amazon Lily!



 Now what do I do?



 There's no wind...



 Should I build a raft and  paddle all the way there?



 That's ridiculous!



 Okay! I'm gonna build a raft  and paddle all the way there!



 That's what you just thought up!



 It's done!



 That's terrible! It's already about to break!



 No way! I thought he was a pirate!



 I had no obligation to save you!



 Are all men unable to swim,  even if they're pirates?



 That was close!



 Darn it!



 If only Franky were here!



 I dunno what to do!



 I'm the one who doesn't know what to do!



 You could've at least escaped  to somewhere far away...



 If we keep this up,  I'll only grow attached to you!



 Whoa, now! Stop!



 What're you doing?!



 Oh, yeah! These arrows!



 They were strong enough  to destroy stone walls



 when I was being chased earlier!



 They don't seem like  special arrows, though...



 What are you talking about?



 The arrows possess "Haki"!  Their strength is only natural!



 Haki? What's that?!



 There she is!



 Margaret is all right!



 Everyone!



 The man is with her! k*ll him!



 Uh oh!



 Halt!



 Stop!



 Margaret! Are you alright?!



 We need to hurry and finish the man off!



 The Snake Princess has returned!



 You have real guts to lay anchor in  the middle of monster-infested waters.



 Yes. We were att*cked  only moments ago, in fact!



 The Sea Prism Stone in this warship  may conceal our presence,



 but staying anchored here for so long



 is bound to attract attention visually.



 It's not easy,



 but the agreement between  the Kuja and the government



 forbids us from getting any closer



 than three kilometers from your island.



 Consequently, we're forced to wait  in the middle of the monsters' den.



 Have you heard?



 They say the Kuja are specters  that turn people to stone!



 Get real!



 Did you k*ll that Sea King?



 Sea Kings are hardly rare in the Grand Line,



 but in the Calm Belts,  they're certainly larger...



 no, monstrous.



 Any sign of the Kuja ship?!



 Not yet, Vice-Admiral!



 There are no approaching ships at all!



 How long is she going to keep us waiting?!



 Or has the Kuja empress decided to...?!



 S-Sea King!



 Fire! Fire!



 Impossible! Not even cannons have an effect?!



 The ship'll be smashed to pieces  if we don't do something!



 What do we do?!



 There's no way to defend against it!



 Is it planning to eat the entire ship?!



 To think the very first to greet us  is this beast and not the Kuja...!



 That's...



 ...the vice-admiral!



 Allowing an entire warship  to be food for a Sea King



 would belittle the name of justice!



 Those cuts...



 Did you slice it from inside its stomach?



 I have not come to hunt Sea Kings.



 I would like to finish my business here  and leave these waters quickly.



 It looks like you have some skill.



 I was growing tired of waiting!



 At last you've returned, Kuja Pirates!



 I am Vice-Admiral Momonga  of Navy Headquarters!



 w*rlord of the Sea and  Pirate Empress Boa Hancock!



 Show yourself! I've come for you!



 So sorry, but the  Snake Princess isn't coming out.



 She's sent many replies now!



 That's men for you!  Such unsophisticated creatures!



 I haven't seen a live man in a long time!



 Pirates and merchants always escape  by boat when they see the Kuja flag!



 Stop. That's a crude laugh.



 We have received her replies of,



 "I will follow your orders  to convene at once."



 But she shows no indication  of coming whatsoever!



 This morning's newspaper.



 A place and date has been decided  for the public execution



 of Portgas D. Ace,  nd Division  Commander of the Whitebeard Pirates!



 There is no turning back now!



 The World Government has issued strict orders



 forcing the Seven Warlords  of the Sea to assemble!



 Refuse and the agreement is off!



 Your title of w*rlord of  the Sea will be revoked!



 Think about what that would mean!



 Until now, the World Government  has allowed you to do as you wish,



 but without the title, you would be  nothing more than ordinary pirates,



 and therefore adversaries of the  World Government and the navy!



 Do you hear that, Boa Hancock?!



 Who placed a kitten...



 ...in my path?!



 M-My deepest apologies!



 I'm the one responsible!



 Be more careful.



 Y-Yes!



 S-Stop that!



 So you've come out, Boa Hancock!



 Don't let your guard down, men!



 He's right!



 We're dealing with the boss  of a bunch of specters!



 There's no telling how terrifying she is!



 Don't let your guard--!



 Th-That's the Pirate Empress?!



 She's the definition of the most  beautiful woman in the world!



 Halt, man!



 These girls are terrifying!



 Nami's much better by far!



 Or not...!



 One direct hit from these  arrows and I'm a goner!



 Alright!



 Is that man a gibbon?!



 Damn! We lost him!



 We cannot have a living man  in this land whatsoever!



 We have to find him and k*ll him  as quickly as possible!



 Let's split up and search!



 All right! Find him and  k*ll him, without fail!



 Understood!



 Is it a good idea to be here?



 This is where I ran from earlier...



 No other choice!



 This is no time for that!



 There he is!



 Uh oh!



 I won't miss this time!



 Did you get him?!



 Not yet! He fell into the jungle!



"Amazon Lily Empress,  Captain of the Kuja Pirates w*rlord of the Sea –  ‘Empress’ Boa Hancock"



So you've finally come for me...



What meddlesome people.



"Youngest of the Gorgon Sisters –  Boa Marigold"



My recent replies were lies.



"Second of the Gorgon Sisters –  Boa Sandersonia"



I will not go to w*r!



 But...



 I want you to let me keep  my title of w*rlord of the Sea.



 And...



 I also want all of  the cargo on your ship.



 What nonsense is this?!



 You're not a selfish little child!



 Do you honestly think we'll accept  such outrageous demands?!



 Hurry and haul it over!



 What a beautiful woman!



 I'll give her anything!



 Why are you hauling our cargo?!



 Come to your senses!



 Oh no! I blindly listened to what she said!



 Portgas D. Ace's public execution  is in exactly one week from today!



 Fire Fist Ace's life will be ended  in the town square of Marineford,



 where Navy Headquarters stands!



 In other words, Whitebeard will  make a move within the next week



 to rescue Ace!



 Navy Headquarters, led by three admirals,



 is prepared to counter Whitebeard  with full military force!



 Will you lose the title of w*rlord,  or accept the orders to assemble?!



 Decide now!



 Time is nearly up!



 I like the title of w*rlord.



 I don't want it taken away.



 But I hate the World Government.



 I don't want to obey its orders.



 How does this sound?



 The marines who came to get me



 had a mysterious accident on the sea



 and were wiped out when  they all turned to stone?



 She's planning to do something!



 Don't let your guard down!



 I've heard about this before!



 A ship was att*cked by the Kuja pirate ship,



 and when it was discovered later,



 only strange statues were found onboard!



 H-Hey! Look at that!



 Wh-What are those?!



 S-Strange statues?!



 I already told you!



 Your childish selfishness  will not be allowed!



 Big Sis has a terrible personality.



 But she gets everything she wants.



 Yes. There is a reason for that.



 Do you know why that is?



 Because no matter what I do...



 ...even if I kick a kitten...



 ...even if I pull your ears off...



 ...or even if I k*ll someone,



 everyone in the world would forgive me.



 The reason for that is, yes...



 ...because I'm beautiful!



 Because I'm beautiful!



 Because I'm beautiful!



 Snake Princess!



 We'll let you do anything!



 After all, you're beautiful!



 Stop that, all of you!



 For being charmed by me,  your guilty consciences...



 ...will turn your bodies solid!



 Love-Love Beam!



 Hanco--!



 I'd expect no less from  a navy vice-admiral...



 I see.



 You used pain to block out the evil thoughts.



 You've much experience, indeed.



 However...



 I wish I could say the same about your men.



 Fools...!



 It looks like you're the only one left now.



 One and zero are not the same!



 We will now return to the  peaceful Amazon Lily!



 Yes, Snake Princess!



 Boa Hancock!



 I will wait here as long as I can!



 I will not return empty-handed!



 If you do not reappear in two days' time...



 ...the agreement is off!



 Do as you wish.



 Hoping to borrow a ship,



 Luffy makes his way into the Kuja Castle,



 but in his rush, he bursts in on  Hancock as she's taking a bath.



 As he sees Hancock's form through the steam,



 something on her back catches Luffy's eye...



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "The Secret Hidden on the Backs --  Luffy and the Snake Princess Meet"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!
