 Snake Princess!



 Hey! Let go!



 That said, I can't help but admire your zeal.



 You win.



 You agree to what I said, Snake Princess?



 It really does pay to talk things through!



 Thank you!



 You'll go, then?!



 I lied. Don't get cocky!



 Get out of my sight!



 Curse you, Snake Princess!



 S-Snake Princess...



 What have you done?! She's an old woman!



 I don't know what came over me...



 Yes! Yes! That sort of thing  happens to all of us!



 Clean up the broken window too!



 Yes, ma'am!



 Annoying woman!



 Granny Nyon!



 Aged as I may be, I am still a Kuja warrior.



 I have not grown decrepit!



 My hands are dirty.



 Is the bathwater ready?



 Yes, ma'am! I will issue  the advisory at once!



 The Snake Princess is about to bathe!



 Okay! Stay still now!



 Oh! Sorry!



 Leave the castle premises immediately!



 Come on! Let's hurry!



 I-I just started eating!



 Hurry outside!



 Everyone who's on duty today, to your posts!



 It's time for their bath!



 Get ready!



 The people in the castle are coming,  so it's about to get packed in here!



 "Bath"



 For the next several hours,



 entrance into the castle  is strictly forbidden!



 What are you doing?



 You're not allowed past here, you know.



 Say...



 Why does everyone make such a big deal



 when the Snake Princess takes a bath?



 How old are you now?



 Eight.



 Then I'll tell you.



 The Gorgon Sisters' secret?!



 That's right.



 You're in charge of keeping watch.



 Yes, Big Sis.



 Please take your time.



 Gorgon was the name of a monster  that once lived in the center ocean.



 Anyone who looked at this terrifying  monster would instantly turn to stone.



 At the end of an adventure,  the Snake Princess and her sisters



 managed to slay the Gorgon monster.



 But when the monster uttered its death howls,



 it placed a horrible curse  on the three warriors.



 The monster's large eyes  were etched onto their backs,



 and everyone nearby who's lured in  by their charm and looks at them



 is turned to stone and k*lled.



 The Gorgon Sisters never remove  their clothes in front of people.



 And when they bathe,



 they always post guards  like this to keep people away.



 Oww...



 Ouch!



 That's the man's voice!



 Have the snakes found him?!



 Ouch! Ouch!



 Let go, you!



 Where did he run to?!



 He went up the craggy mountain!



 Don't tell me he went back into the village?!



 He wanted a ship!



 What?!



 That hurt...



 Hmm, what do I do now?



 I'll get spotted again if I just sit here...



 She did mention this island  has a pirate ship...



 If I can just borrow it somehow...



 No, wait. Nami's not here.



 I'll end up drifting around  if I go all by myself.



 Oh, I know!



 Asking for a ride on the  ship is the best way!



 I'll ask if they'll take me to  Sabaody Archipelago!



 Which means...



 I'll have to talk to someone important,



 and since important people  live in tall buildings...



 I'm thinking so hard I might get a fever!



 Okay! I'll just go into  a tall building first!



 I'll try that one!



 Hurry to the village!



 The Snake Princess has  probably already returned!



 If she finds the man,  things will turn serious!



 It's brittle!



 What was that?!



 The castle tower's roof collapsed!



 What's happening?!



 The Snake Princess is taking a bath in there!



 More water?!



 Ouch, it's hot! Wait, this is bathwater!



 I'm gonna die! I'm gonna drown!



 My feet are on the ground. I'm safe!



 Is this a bath?



 A man!



 Hey...



 That thing on your back...



 It seems familiar somehow...



 You saw it, didn't you?!



 Luffy is captured by the women again  after seeing the Snake Princess's secret.



 Margaret and two other  Kuja warriors defend him,



 but the enraged Hancock turns them to stone.



 Seeing his saviors petrified  infuriates Luffy,



 but a terrifying executioner  approaches from behind him...



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Heartless Judgment!  Margaret is Turned to Stone!!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 12x412 - Heartless Judgment! Margaret is Turned to Stone!!
comment:
Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 We've left the established course



 Right now, we're rowing straight toward



 The borderline between the sky and the ocean



 In the dark depths of the ocean, adventure holds its breath



 Don't you have a good time just imagining it?



 Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 "That feeling" I get when embarking



 Is something I hope to remember always



 If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



 With our pulses racing, let's go on a trip now



 Shy hearts engrave the rhythm of adventure



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Life is "Adventurous"



 Be aware it's "Dangerous"



 Who's gonna be "One of us"



 And a trip goes on because



 We da pirate of the "Mass"



 To the West, To the East



 Gotta find my way, Sail away



 All the way to "One piece"!!



 Stuff a dream into your empty chest



 And spread your wings



 If the wind blowing through them dyes your heart



 Let's press forward



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 The time is the Great Pirate Era.



 Countless pirates fight  desperately for the One Piece,



 the great treasure left behind by  Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



 Monkey D. Luffy,  a boy whose body turned to rubber



 after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



 also takes to the sea to become  the next King of the Pirates.



 As Luffy and his friends  overcome numerous adventures,



 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!



 What kind of adventure  is waiting for us next?!



 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 After being ejected from the Sabaody  Archipelago by Bartholomew Kuma,



 Luffy was separated from  his friends and arrived alone



 at the female-only empire of Amazon Lily.



 After his capture,



 it appeared that Luffy had  successfully escaped, but...



 The Snake Princess is about to bathe!



 Is this a bath?



 A man!



 Hey...



 That thing on your back...



 It seems familiar somehow...



 You saw it, didn't you?!



 "Heartless Judgment!  Margaret is Turned to Stone!!"



 Big Sis!



 Big Sis! What happened?!



 Who is that? A man?!



 What is a man doing in this land?!



 What in the world happened?!



 Oh, I, uhh...



 He saw my back.



 Then he'll have to die.



 Huh?! H-How come?! I only saw her back!



 I dunno why,



 but I could swear I've seen it  somewhere before...



 We would rather die



 than let anyone see  what you saw on my back!



 That thing? How come?



 Who are you? How come?



 Take everything you saw to the grave!



 Love-Love Beam!



 Slow-Slow?!



 A Slow-Slow Beam?!



 Oh no!



 I'm turning slower! Slow...er...



 Love-Love Beam!



 Why won't he petrify?!



 Does he not feel any excitement  from seeing me in the bath?!



 That's not possible, Big Sis!



 The beauty of your naked body would  charm anyone of any age or gender!



 His fear of death must be  overpowering his wicked thoughts!



 He's a pathetic, yet lucky man!



 I dunno what's going on,  but I'm getting outta here!



 I just wanna talk to someone important!



 He jumped out from this height!



 He won't get away!



 p*stol Kiss!



 Huh?! They don't bounce off!



 They're not metal b*ll*ts?!



 That man is an intruder!



 Seize him, Kuja Pirates!



 Y-Yes, ma'am!



 A man?! What's a man doing here?!



 Let's just catch him for now!



 That hurt!



 It's in your best interest to do as we say!



 Ran! No man would ever try  to defy the Kuja Pirates!



 Besides, he looks weak anyway!



 It's a man!



 A live man in the village...!



 Are you the all-women pirate group?



 Do you know where your boss is?



 Why do you want to know that?!



 Your boss owns a ship, right?



 So I wanna find her



 and ask for a ride on her ship  and hurry onto the sea!



 What nonsense!



 Men are forbidden in Amazon Lily!



 Do you honestly think  you'll get to leave alive?!



 Stupid man!



 This is no time for me to get caught!



 Gum-Gum...



 Seize him!



 ...Rocket!



 What the...?!



 After him! Quickly!



 The Snake Princess's orders!



 Don't let him escape, no matter what!



 A man!



 There's a male intruder!



 A male?!



 The Kuja Pirates are chasing him!



 Let's help out, too!



 Alright! Let's go!



 Of all things, allowing a man onto the  island when the Kuja are in peril...



 This is unprecedented.



 I can't help but worry what  the future holds for this land.



 Catch the man!



 The Kuja Pirates!



 So he did return to the village...



 There he is!



 Over there!



 I would've thought she'd  be in a tall building...



 Where do I go to meet someone important?



 Those pirates caught up to me already?!



 Let's k*ll him before the  Snake Princess catches him!



 Oh, it's them again?!



 He fell off!



 There he is! The man!



 Crap!



 Halt!



 Wait, you!



 It can't be!



 Why would this rookie worth      million be in Amazon Lily?!



 There he is!



 Well, I gotta run!



 Wait! Let me see your face again!



 I said wait!



 Even the old ladies here are strong?



 There's no escape now!



 Oh no! The Kuja Pirates caught him!



 I guess there's nothing we can do now!



 This man really is...



 Damn! Come off, you stupid things!



 What are these iron rope-like snakes?!



 We were too slow.



 Let's just hope they don't  ask how he arrived here...



 He's going to be k*lled, isn't he?



 What's with this place?



 There really isn't even one guy here.



 Snake Princess!



 Marigold-sama!



 Sandersonia-sama!



 Let me ask you this, man.



 How and why did you come to this island?!



 Seriously, I don't know, either!



 I suddenly went flying through the sky



 and before I realized it, I was here!



 Lies.



 You can't fool me with that ridiculous story.



 You must be after something.



 Well, you could give me a ship!



 I'd appreciate getting a lift most of all,



 but anyway, there's a place  I need to leave for right away!



 If you're the most important person here,



 then please! I want to set sail!



 What nonsense is this?!



 The Snake Princess is right!



 He's obviously lying!



 He must be plotting something!



 You can't fool us!



 Oh, I've been thanking you non-stop!



 Is there anything I can do for you?



 As long as the others are  still alive like I am,



 that's all that matters.



 As long as they're alive,



 I can keep fighting again and again!



 How dare he speak so rudely and  tastelessly to the Snake Princess?!



 He's appalling!



 Don't think you can leave this place alive.



 Your death is inescapable!



 Please wait, Snake Princess!



 I-I don't think he's the  kind of person who can lie!



 Margaret!



 Snake Princess...



 Snake Princess.



 E-Everything this man says is sincere.



 He hardly seems like the type  to bring harm to our land!



 Oh! You!



 Yeah! Tell her for me!



 A defense warrior?



 My name is Margaret!



 Men are forbidden here.



 His death sentence was set in stone



 the moment he stepped foot on this land.



 Why do you protect him?



 I feel I owe him.



 The person who let him into this country...



 ...was I!



 Margaret! Why?!



 Snake Princess! W-We can explain!



 Yes!



 We found him in the forest  covered in mushrooms!



 We thought he was from the village  and carried him here!



 Sweetpea! Aphelandra!



 We're also responsible for  the crime of bringing him here!



 That's right!



 Stop, you two!



 I'm the one who suggested  bringing him to the village!



 Does she know what this means?



 Margaret is way too honest!



 Oh, you guys!



 You guys tried to k*ll me,  but you're actually nice after all!



 Only I'm guilty of letting  him into the country!



 Margaret!



 It's all right.



 Look up, honest Margaret.



 I like honest people.



 Tell me.



 Do you wish for forgiveness?



 Y-Yes...



 You may rise.



 Is the Snake Princess going to forgive  those three for their great crimes?!



 That's the Snake Princess for you!



 She's not only beautiful,  she's so compassionate too!



 Snake Princess!



 Love-Love Beam!



 What the...?!



 The fools...



 Hey! What happened to you guys?!



 What happened?!



 They turned to stone! How come?!



 Hey...



 Hey...!



 Hey, you! What did you do to them?!



 They saved my life, you know!



 Yes.



 They were punished  because they helped you.



 It's my fault that they...



 Wait! Turn them back to normal!



 Just who do you think  you're giving orders to?



 Turn them back now!



 Bring out Bakula!



 Bakula?!



 It's all over for that man now!



 I told you to turn them back!



 This is the warrior nation of Amazon Lily.



 The strong are beautiful.



 Fight your hardest and perish.



 We will watch and see you off.



 That black panther's name is Bakula.



 A carnivorous beast that  has served as executioner



 for this land's empresses for generations.



 After each execution,  not even a single bone remains.



 Bakula seems to be quite starved.



 Yes, Big Sis.



 I'm told it hasn't been fed  for several days now.



 Be happy, man!



 Bakula will gladly eat even  a scrawny monkey like you!



 Never mind that...!



 What about these guys?!  Will they go back to normal?!



 How dare he speak so rudely  to the Snake Princess?!



 Get 'im, Bakula!



 Bakula!



 Go!



 He's strong!



 He knocked out Bakula in one hit!



 He didn't use Haki!



 Then that was just brute strength?!



 You guys are screwed up.



 That woman...



 She turned your comrades into stone,



 so how can you all sit  there and laugh like that?!



 Th-The savage man is yelling at us!



 Unbelievable! What a vicious creature!



 I feel bad about those three,



 but the Snake Princess was  right to do what she did!



 They're the ones to blame!  They broke the rules of our land!



 Whatever I do...



 ...I will be forgiven.



 The reason for that is,



 yes...



 ...because I'm beautiful!



 Snake Princess!



 Wouldn't you agree, too?



 You piss me off!



 Big Sis! Stay strong!



 This can't be!



 No man exists that won't be my sl*ve!



 I cannot stand that man's existence!



 How dare you say that to the Snake Princess?!



 Hurry and execute him!



 Execution!



 Execution! Execution!



 Go! Marigold! Sandersonia!



 Take that man's head!



 Yes! Leave it to us, Big Sis!



 These guys have powers?



 Execution!



 Execution!



 Execution!



 Execution!...



 Sandersonia and Marigold transform  using the power of the



 Snake-Snake Fruit, in order to execute Luffy.



 Luffy does his best to  dodge and counter-attack.



 However, it proves useless.



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "A Difficult Fight for Luffy!  The Snake Sisters' Haki Power!!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 12x413 - A Difficult Fight for Luffy! The Snake Sisters' Haki Power!!

 After being ejected from the Sabaody  Archipelago by Bartholomew Kuma,



 Luffy was separated from  his friends and arrived alone



 at the female-only empire of Amazon Lily.



 Big Sis!



 Big Sis! What happened?!



 What in the world happened?!



 Oh, I, uhh...



 He saw my back.



 After seeing the secret hidden on the  back of Pirate Empress Boa Hancock,



 Luffy was caught by the Kuja Pirates  and taken to a fighting arena.



 Love-Love Beam!



 Hey...!



 Hey, you! What did you do to them?!



 They saved my life, you know!



 This is the warrior nation of Amazon Lily.



 The strong are beautiful.



 Fight your hardest and perish.

 so how can you all sit  there and laugh like that?!

 but the Snake Princess was  right to do what she did!



 They're the ones to blame! They  broke the rules of our land!



 Whatever I do,



 I will be forgiven.



 The reason for that is,



 yes...



 ...because I'm beautiful!



 You piss me off!



 These guys have powers?



 "A Difficult Fight for Luffy!  The Snake Sisters' Haki Power!!"



 Execution! Execution!



 Execution! Execution!...



 The younger sisters'  Snake Pit Dance is about to start!



I can't wait to see Marigold-sama's  "Salamander" with my own eyes!



"Youngest Sister, Marigold Snake-Snake  Fruit, Model King Cobra"



And Sandersonia-sama's  "Eight-Headed Serpent"!



"Middle Sister, Sandersonia  Snake-Snake Fruit, Model Anaconda"



 How magnificent she looks!



 She was a strong warrior  to beat the Gorgon monster,



 and this is proof of it!



 The cursed younger sisters are lovely too!



 Cursed? What're they talking about?



 They look like they've  eaten Devil Fruits to me.



 He's finished for sure now!



 I can't wait anymore! Hurry and start!



 Execution! Execution!



 Execution!...



 Perhaps I should swallow him whole...



 Or squeeze him to death...



 Don't tell me he's scared stiff!



 Just stand there and die!



 Hold on! Time out!



 What? Going to beg for your life?



 Apologizing now won't  make your crimes go away!



 No, it's not that.



 What's going on?



 Look!



 There!



 You're not cracked, are you?



 Wait here, you guys!



 Sorry you got turned  into stone because of me!



 If Chopper were here,  he could've examined you right away,



 but maybe you'll go back to normal again



 like when Aokiji turned  me and Robin into ice!



 Are you sure you shouldn't be  more concerned about yourself?



 Shut up! I can do whatever I want!



 That man...



 Is he trying to save Margaret and the others?



 That can't be!



 He's already been sentenced to death!



 Alright, then...



 So I just gotta kick your asses now, right?!



 What a joke!



 What did he just say?!



 He intends to beat the younger sisters!



 Hilarious! Making people laugh  after being sentenced to death!



 Men really are hilarious!



 Is that okay, beating you up?



 Yes, that's fine!



 If you haven't given up on your life yet,  then I'll warn you in advance:



 I wouldn't fall into the pit between  the seats and the ring if I were you!



 You can fall if you'd like,



 but the bottom is filled with blades, so...



 Are you ready to go now?



 Yeah! All set!



 Good.



 Then let's begin!



 k*ll him, Sandersonia! Marigold!



 Through combat,  give him the ultimate punishment



 for the great crime of sneaking onto  our maiden island and offending me!



 I've been waiting for this!



 I guess he has some skill...



 Get him, Marigold-sama!



 What the...?!



 Poison?! That was close!



 Wrong! It's powerful poison!



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Stamp!



 It bounced off!



 That hurts!



 How...?! I'm made of rubber!



 See! He really is all bark and no bite!



 But it's true that men stretch! How neat!



 Huh?! Am I not rubber anymore?!



 No, that's not it!



 Then why do impact blows hurt?!



 That's not fair, Mari!



 You're hogging him all to yourself!



 I want to have some fun with him too!



 Why does that hurt?! I'm made of rubber!



 Come to think of it, that axe guy also...!



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Gatling!



 Hoisa!



 Wh-What the...?!



 Ashigara Dokkoi Shove!



 It's exactly the same!



 But he didn't have powers!



 Does that mean it's not a Devil Fruit power?



 I take it you have powers, too.



 A Paramythia type, from the looks of it?



 I knew it!



 Why are you lying and saying you're cursed?!



 That's a secret we can't tell anyone,



 not even an opponent about to die.



 Damn!



 But I take it you can't use Haki?



 Most outsiders can't.



 That's why you're weak.



 Left kick...



 Over here!



 She read what I was going to do!



 Snake Slam!



 Yes!



 That one didn't hurt.



 Same as usual.



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Gatling!



 Snake Dance.



 What amazing moves!



 With Sonia-sama's Haki,  there's no attack she can't dodge!



 You're very straightforward.



 I can read you like a book.



 What's going on?!



 She's guessing my every move!



 Focusing entirely on offense  is nice and all, but...



 Snake Stick!



 Ouch!



 Don't forget that there are two of us!



 Not good!



 He's falling into the pit!



 Something seemed unnatural  about that just now...



 That man...!



 Th-That was close!



 So close!



 He should've just kept falling!



 However tenacious he is,



 he still doesn't stand a chance  against the younger sisters!



 They're at the very top of the Kuja Pirates!



 The Snake Princess put  her hair behind her ear!



 Her loveliness knows no bounds!



 This man is the very definition  of "nothing but talk."



 I can't help but laugh.



 Shut up, you dumbass!



 Oh, my!



 He spoke abusively to  the Snake Princess again!



 Unforgivable! Hurry and k*ll him!



 Sonia! Mari!



 End that man's life at once!



 To ensure there are no further outbursts...



 ...from his filthy mouth!



 I was hoping to have  a little more fun with you,



 but you heard our big sister!



 It looks like playtime is over now.



 Let's give the criminal despair and death!



 Margaret!



 Hey! What're you doing?! Don't touch them!



 What if she breaks?!



 She saved my life, you know!



 We are going to break her.



 You said she saved your life.



 Then that's all the more reason to.



 I feel bad for her,



 but this is your punishment.



 Don't be stupid!



 This duel is between me and you!



 Stop it!



 Above.



 Hey, you!



 Damn! Let go!



 You're the only one who  thinks this is a duel.



 This is a public execution!



 Just sit there and watch!



 The emotional trauma you gave our  sister goes much further than this!



 Everyone here looks up to the Snake Princess!



 She's strong, noble, and the most  beautiful woman in the world!



 The Pirate Empress, Boa Hancock!



 Hey! Stop it!



 She looked up to you guys, you know!



 Everyone in this land does.



 So I think this is what she would want!



 The hell it is!



 What are you, stupid?!



 Oh, my. What crude language.



 After her, we'll break the other two as well.



 Nice and slowly, too.



 That'd make it more painful  for you too, right?



 Here goes!



 Three...



 Hey! Stop!



 Two...



 Stop it! Do you hear me?!



 It's no use.



 One...



 Margaret!



 I said stop!



 The warriors are fainting!



 Could this be...?!



 What a relief!



 She isn't hurt anywhere!



 Oh, I guess you guys are sensible after all!



 That was the Conqueror's Spirit just now...!



 This can't be real!



 Only one out of a million  people can master that Haki!



 Only a chosen few can use it!



 I've never seen any person who  can use it other than our big sister!



 This boy has the "qualities of a conqueror"  to stand above others!



 He has the Conqueror's Spirit, just as I do?!



 How can this be?!



 Is he no mere boy after all?!



 Just who is that guy?!



 What's everyone blabbing about?



 What's the big deal?



 He doesn't realize he used Haki?!



 I guess he hasn't figured  out how to control it.



 Alright!



 You showed me you're strong!



 Now let's get on with the duel!



 Luffy activates Second Gear,



 and the sisters respond by unleashing  their true Snake-Snake powers.



 Sandersonia's hair turns into giant serpents



 while Marigold cloaks her body in flames,



 and the sisters continue their attack.



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "All-Out Special Power Battle!!  Gum-Gum vs. Snake-Snake"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 Gum-Gum...

 Second Gear!

 Smoke! He's giving off smoke!



 Full power?

 Monkey D. Luffy,  a boy whose body turned to rubber



 after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,

 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!

 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 Luffy was ejected from  the Sabaody Archipelago



 by Bartholomew Kuma, a w*rlord of the Sea.

 he arrived alone at the female-only  empire of Amazon Lily!

 Sandersonia and Marigold who had  eaten the Snake-Snake Fruit.



 How rude!



 Mari! Get him now!

 We are now... being protected...

 "Hancock's Confession  The Sister's Abhorrent Past"

 Sister Sonia!



 We're sorry, Big Sis!

 Are you up next?

 these people you turned to stone;  turn them back.

 Snake Princess. You are so...

 Big Sis...

 Margaret!



 Sweetpea!



 Aphelandra!

 Snake Princess!

 Margaret.

 What?!

 Oh!

 What kind of food is popular here?



 I bet it's some kind of meat!



 I should be thanking you.



 Thank you.



 No, please!



 "Thank you" isn't something I can eat!



 If anybody had seen what's on our backs,



 there is no way that we  could stay in this country.



 You may come in.



 Come inside, Man.



 Inside?



 Inside of the curtain.



 Oh, is that where the food is?



 I'm coming...



 Oh, we're not eating.



 Hey, what are you doing  with your clothes off?



 As always, you are reacting rudely.



 But that's okay.



 This is the mark...



 ...that you said...



 ...you had seen somewhere.



 Take a good look at it, again.



 Where did you see this?



 Do you know the meaning of this mark?



 Answer me, now!



 It's not something I want to show people.



 As I suspected, it's a bit different  from what I've seen before.



 I have a friend called Hachi  who is a fish-man...



 A fish-man?



 Yeah.

 I don't know anything about your mark.

 Granny Nyon!



 Where did you come in from?

 You!

 Dealt a blow to a Celestial Dragon?

 That bastard!

 T-Then...



 it is true that you punched  a Celestial Dragon.

 including the meaning of the symbol



 that your fish-man friend  has on his forehead.



 Hachi's mark?

 "The Claw of the Celestial Dragon."

 People who were fed by  the World Nobles all get...



 ...this permanent brand to  show that you are subhuman!



 Celestial Dragons?



 The three of us were...



 ...once...

 You were... slaves?!



 It happened when I was   ...



 Starboard, all clear.



 Port, all clear, too.



 Bow, all clear.



 High visibility, all serene!



 Don't fall into the sea!



 Don't make fun of me!



 I've become a warrior!



 Okay, okay.

 Hancock?



 Sonia! Mari! Where are you?

 From that point,



 all we have are terrible memories  that we don't even want to remember.



 We saw men for the first time



 and they were nothing but figures of horror.



 Sister Sonia, calm down!



 The memory haunts us.



 W-Wow! H-Hey! That's enough!

 It was awful.



 There was no hope.



 We kept thinking about death!



 Hey! You...



 But...



 ...one night four years later,



 something happened that made  the World Government tremble.



 "Nobody will challenge  the Celestial Dragons."



 That was the cardinal rule in their world.



 But there was a man who climbed  the Red Line with his bare hands



 and slipped into the Celestial  Dragons' Holyland of Marejois.



 He was an adventurer who  later led the Fish-Man Pirates,



 named Fisher Tiger.



 In order to free all the slaves



 from the town there his fellow  fish-men were being tortured,



 he fought with all his might.



 We are free! We are free!



 He disliked humans as a species



 but he was being fair to all slaves,



 and let thousands of slaves  of different species go free.



 We prepared to die and ran among the others.



 We owe him an immeasurable debt.



 Tiger released many fish-men to the sea,



 but ones who were slaves had  a mark that cannot be erased.



 Tiger has made the World Government his enemy



 and he formed the  Sun Pirates with former slaves



 and sailed out into the open sea.



 As though breaking a curse,



 he changed the Celestial Dragon's  emblem on everyone's bodies...



 ...into the symbol of the sun.



 What you thought was similar  to the mark on my back is



 the sun symbol of the Sun Pirates.



 Yeah, you're right.



 The one Hachi has on his  forehead looks like the sun.



 Does that mean he was a sl*ve, too?



 It doesn't necessarily mean that he was.



 The mark is made in such a way  that it is impossible to tell...



 ...whether they are former slaves or not.



 I'm pretty sure that he once was  a member of the Sun Pirates.



 In fact, Fisher Tiger is already dead and...



 ...the Sun Pirates have split  up into several groups.



 Hey, when did you get hurt there?



 Oh, this? Don't worry about it.



 He has a complicated past, too...



 So this is the reason  that the mark on our backs



 is similar to the fish-men's mark.



 Okay, I pretty much understand.



 Surprisingly, when we were slaves,



 we were forced to eat Love-Love Fruit



 and Snake-Snake Fruit  for their entertainment,



 and that enabled us to deceive our nation



 and preserve the secret.



 If you didn't cover up  Sonia's back at that moment,



 it would have been impossible  for us to stay on this island.



 I don't want to let anyone  know about our past!



 I won't stop at deceiving  our whole nation to hide it!



 We won't open ourselves up at any price!



 We don't want anybody to  take advantage of us again!



 I'm scared of being caught off guard.



 It terrifies me. I can't take it!



 Big Sis...



 Ho!



 But this is the first time in a long time



 that you've shown your emotions like that.



 Recently, I've thought  that the Snake Princess



 must have turned to ice or something.



 Shut up!



 You are a traitor who  left the country behind!



 You shut up!



 You three were miserable



 and didn't know how to  return to this island...



 ...after you ran away from  the Celestial Dragons!



 Who brought you back?!



 You should be thankful that  I was living outside of this country!



 What you are talking about was a small favor.



 What did you say?!



 Granny Nyon...



 I always keep an eye on  you three as a mother would!



 And you call it "small  favor", Snake Princess?



 Hey, get your hands off of me! Mari! Sonia!



 Are you going to...



 ...look down on me; a former sl*ve?



 Huh?



 What are you talking about?



 Like I told you - I hate  the Celestial Dragons!



 I like you!



 Didn't you say that you had one more wish?



 All right!



 Where do you want to go?  I'll give you a ride!



 For real?!



 The Kuja Pirates hold a banquet.



 When Luffy is mobbed by curious women,

 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Saving Ace!  The Next Stop: the Great Prison!"

 How far did I come?



 Oh, it's so cold! Is this the arctic?!



 Franky!



 Oh no! He's only in his  underwear in all this snow.



 Have you been robbed?



 Put this fur pelt on.



 Fur pelts?! You got to be kidding! No thanks!



 If I wore crap like that...



 Aw! Nah, man, it wouldn't be  fitting for a pervert! Aw!



 Hey, follow my lead!



 Shake your hip to the right!



 Right hand on your waist!  Stick out your left hand!



 Slide and left!



 Right! Left! Right! Left!  Right! Left! Right! Left!



 Repeat! Aw!



 One! Two! One! Two!



 Right! Left! Right! Left!  Right! Left! Right! Left!



 One! Two! One! Two! One! Two! One! Two!



 Right! Left! Right! Left!  Right! Left! Right! Left!



 Aw! One! Two! One! Two!



 Ha!



 Super!



 Woo-hee! Great!



 I'm still pretty cold! Where  the hell is this place?!



 What?! You don't know where you are?



 Why the hell would I know this place?!



 You're on Mechanical Island,   Future Land Baldimore,



 the birthplace of the genius.



 --Degenerate? --The genius.



 The... Degenerate?



 The genius.



 Mister!



 Geek! I mean, god!



 Let's take him to the hospital, Kitton!



 Okay.



 "OPERATION IN PROGRESS"



 So he is a cyborg.



 I can't believe that his  energy source is cola.



 What should we do?  We don't have any cola here.



 There's no time to lose. Let's just begin.



 Okay.



 Mister!



 Mister?



 Hello! You're the boy from earlier, right?



 I'm sorry to keep you waiting!



 S-Something's different about you.



 Yes! Unfortunately, they don't  have any cola here so...



 ...they used tea instead.



 It's Darjeeling!



 Tea?



 It has a super flavor!



 It makes me super relaxed!



 M-Mister!



 Oops! I'm sorry!



 Here you go!  Be careful, it's hot.



 No no! That's not what I was gonna say!



 Mister! You were funnier  before and I miss it!



 Oh yeah? What was I like?



 Like this!



 Super!



 Kid.



 --Aren't you ashamed of yourself? --How can you even say something like that?



 Franky becomes a gentleman  on Mechanical Island!



 Will he ever be the same again?!



 And what will happen to  the separated Straw Hats?!



 Chopper awakens on an island



 to find himself perpetually under attack  by giant birds and brawny natives,



 landing him in a nasty crisis.



 Meanwhile, Sanji awakens



 on Peachy Island, the island of dreams,



 where he has an encounter with  someone truly frightening.



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "The Friends' Whereabouts! An Island  of Giant Birds and a Pink Paradise!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 12x419 - The Friends' Whereabouts! An Island of Giant Birds and a Pink Paradise!
comment:
Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 We've left the established course



 Right now, we're rowing straight toward



 The borderline between the sky and the ocean



 In the dark depths of the ocean, adventure holds its breath



 Don't you have a good time just imagining it?



 Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 "That feeling" I get when embarking



 Is something I hope to remember always



 If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



 With our pulses racing, let's go on a trip now



 Shy hearts engrave the rhythm of adventure



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Life is "Adventurous"



 Be aware it's "Dangerous"



 Who's gonna be "One of us"



 And a trip goes on because



 We da pirate of the "Mass"



 To the West, To the East



 Gotta find my way, Sail away



 All the way to "One piece"!!



 Stuff a dream into your empty chest



 And spread your wings



 If the wind blowing through them dyes your heart



 Let's press forward



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 The time is the Great Pirate Era.



 Countless pirates fight  desperately for the One Piece,



 the great treasure left behind by  Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



 Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned  to rubber after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



 also takes to the sea to become  the next King of the Pirates.



 As Luffy and his friends  overcome numerous adventures,



 the World Government is less and  less able to ignore their existence.



 This is exciting!



 What kind of adventure  is waiting for us next?!



 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 Luffy is heading to the  Great Prison - Impel Down



 to rescue his brother Ace, who's  been captured by the navy.



 Meanwhile, his friends have  been sent to separate islands.



 "The Friends' Whereabouts! An Island  of Giant Birds and a Pink Paradise!"



 How many times do I have to tell you?!



 M-My shin! You kicked my shin!



 Why couldn't you get it, you blockhead?!



 I require at least      kilograms of food per meal.



 Anything less than that won't suffice.



 Do you want to be turned to stone again?!



 N-No! I'm very sorry! I'll be careful!



 Bring her another meal to replace this one!



 Here, Luffy! Bon appétit!



 It's extremely delicious!



 When I'm fed by you, the food tastes  sweeter than it actually is!



 Oh, I'm glad!



 ...A-And that's how it'd all play out!



 What're you doing over there in the corner?



 Aren't you gonna eat? This  Sea King ham is good as hell!



 I-I-I'm okay! You eat it!



 I'm totally satisfied as I am!



 Damn! I can't see anything.  The curtain's closed.



 Yeah, it's totally covered! Oh,  there's an open space here!



 Love-Love Beam!



 Something wrong?



 There were two bad-mannered rats  so I just taught them a lesson.



 I see!



 T-This is...



 This must be a warning!



 If we ever try to look into her  room, she'll do this to us!



 She's scary!



 Meanwhile, a few days ago...



 On an island in the South Blue...



 Luffy!



 Everybody!



 Oops!



 Why isn't anybody here?



 Did they k*ll them?



 That can't be it! I won't believe it!



 Everybody!



 Chopper!



 Luffy!



 Everybody!



 I wasn't scared at all when you guys  weren't there. I really wasn't!



 Ow!



 Ouch! Stop it, Luffy, Usopp!



 I said stop, damn it!



 Ouch! You jerk!



 What are these birds?!



 They're huge!



 Are you gonna eat me?!



 I-I can't move my body!



 I gotta run!



 Oww! Stop it!



 Oh, my head is spinning!



 No! Let me go!



 You bastard!



 What's wrong with this island!



 Is this a dream?



 Please tell me this is a dream!



 No, stop it!



 Stop it!



 I am not your toy!



 It's over... right?



 What is this place?



 Isn't there anybody here?



 Luffy!



 Everybody!



 I'm the only one on this island.



 What am I gonna do?!



 I'm thirsty and hungry...



 If only Luffy and everybody else were here,



 even on a deserted island like this,



 we'd have a banquet!



 Banquet, banquet!



 Maybe I'll never see them again...



 I can't take it!



 Where is everybody?!



 Luffy... Everybody...



 Oh yeah!



 There's this!



 We made a promise to meet up  where this Vivre Card leads us!



 Luffy and others will be there!



 I know that nothing can stop them!



 I will make it!



 This is no time to give up!



 I'd eat anything to survive  to see everybody again!



 This fruit is bitter!



 But it's juicy!



 This one's too sour!



 Gotcha! I need some meat, too!



 But this doesn't look so appetizing.



 No, I can't expect too  much on a deserted island.



 Wow! You can't run!



 You can't get away from me!



 Who the hell... hit me?



 Ouch!



 Why is it so hot?



 Am I gonna be dinner?!



 Wow, it's so rare to find a raccoon!  We'll cook raccoon hot pot!



 I rather get some birds  and do chicken hot pot.



 We would've done it, if it were that easy.



 We'll just have raccoon for now.



 Stop it! I'm a reindeer!



 Then it looks like we'll  have reindeer hot pot!



 Oh wait, did it just say something?



 Do reindeers speak?



 Let me go! Just let me go!



 I-It's a crisis! We tried to  sneak into the birds' nest



 but they caught us!



 The birds are coming!



 Let's shoo them away!



 --Let's go, everyone! --Let's go!



 H-Hey! Wait! Set me free before you go!



 Looks like the birds are stronger!



 Oh no!



 Augh! Ow! Ow!



 Ouch! Ouch!



 Those birds treated me like a toy



 and the humans tried to eat me in a hot pot!



 What's wrong with this island?!



 One legend suggests this  island is a treasure island.



 This is Birdie Kingdom,  where birds reign supreme.



 What is Chopper's fate?!



 Behold! A dream island in the Grand Line



 called Peachy Island.



 "Dear Nami-san, Robin-chan,"



 "how are you both doing?"



 "Right now, I'm... I'm..."



 - A FEW HOURS BEFORE -



 W-Where am I?



 Damn! This is all because of that w*rlord!



 Excuse me! Mister! Mister! Are you all right?



 Mister! Mister! Are you all right?!



 I can feel something...  and smell something sweet.



 I'm in the hands of a beautiful woman!



 Is it... Nami-san?!



 No, is it Robin-chan?!



 No, I must be dreaming.



 But it's doesn't matter. I  just wanna be here forever!



 Oh, w-wait a minute!



 What's this?



 You forgot your handkerchief! Oh?



 So it wasn't a dream?



 Elizabeth?



 Anyway, where the hell am I?



 Don't tell me that I'm in heaven!



 Her name is Elizabeth...



 If this is heaven,



 is she an angel?



 Oh, my heart aches!



 Why is my heart beating so fast?!



 This...



 must be love!



 I can see that romance is blooming!



 Sanji-san!



 Wait!



 Oh no no!



 Nami-san and Robin-chan are waiting for me!



 No but...



 I gotta say thank you to her!



 I'm not the kind of guy  to forget his manners!



 Nami-san! Robin-chan!



 Forgive me for being unfaithful!



 Elizabeth-chan! Oh?



 This house has the same  design as this handkerchief.



 Well then, maybe this is Elizabeth's...



 Is Lady Elizabeth here?



 My name is Sanji. You were  looking after me a while ago.



 I came here to return your handkerchief...



 Isn't that a bit cruel, Elizabeth-chan?!



 No, don't rush it.



 She's a shy, naive girl.



 I got to be cool - have patience.



 I'm really sorry about the  way I acted back there!



 Your hand was so attractive  I couldn't help it!



 Excuse me for being so forward but



 may I make it up by cooking  something for you?



 You can tell me whatever you want to eat!



 I may not look it, but I'm a good chef!



 Ah, this isn't working.



 Do you like to cook?



 Oh yes! I love cooking!



 Then, do you like clothes?



 Clothes?



 Yes, yes, of course!



 Unlike some stupid swordsmen,  I care about how I look!



 Really? You like clothes?



 Yes!



 Then what about dresses?



 Dresses?



 I got it!



 She keeps asking what I like because she...



 Maybe she has a thing for me!



 How's this dress? Do you like it?



 I like dresses! I like them! I love them!



 I'm really fond of it!



 How about flower prints?



 Flower prints! They're wonderful!



 They are really cute!



 All right...



 Finally, the door to  Elizabeth-chan's heart has...



 You have a good taste, Elizabeth-chan!



 Don't be shy! You've already  opened up the door of your heart.



 Sanji-san!



 Now, don't be afraid and  just come into my arms!



 Elizabeth-chan!



 I think...



 ...this will look good on you!



 Oh, ow, ow, ow...



 Despite your appearance, you're  very strong, Elizabeth-chan!



 I-Is this a dream? Then it must be...



 ...a nightmare!



 I thought that you were one of us!



 You were suffering, weren't you?  You don't have to pretend anymore!



 Yes, this is a free country!



 Now, put this dress on and open  up the door of your heart!



 I-I-I don't wanna open anything!



 Wait!



 This island is known as  the second Maiden Island.



 Everything is pink here.



 All people and animals  who come to this island



 have girlish hearts.



 This can't be heaven!



 Hey! Wait!



 --Aren't you one of us?! --You are one of us!



 Shut up! Don't come after  me! I told you I'm not!



 "Dear Nami-san, Robin-chan,"



 "how are you both doing?"



 "Right now, I'm..."



 "I'm..."



 "I'm..."



 "I'm..."



 --Wait! --Wait!



 Why don't you wait, man?!



 Why should I? Stupid!



 Welcome to Kamabakka Kingdom!



 "Right now, I'm..."



 "...in hell!"



 In a certain land where snow silently falls,



 the people have been forced to  work day and night for     years.



 What has Robin seen there?



 Around the same time,



 Usopp is about to be eaten  by mysterious plants!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "The Friends' Whereabouts! Bridging  the Islands and Vicious Vegetations!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 This is exciting!

 The crew, on its way to the New World,



 will speed along the Grand Line again today!



 Leaving the female-only island of Amazon Lily



 to rescue his brother Ace who  is waiting to be ex*cuted,



 Luffy stowed away on a navy ship with  the Pirate Empress Boa Hancock's help



 and headed to the Great Prison - Impel Down!



 Meanwhile, the rest of the Straw Hat crew,



 who had been ejected from the Sabaody  Archipelago by Bartholomew Kuma are...



 "The Friends' Whereabouts! Bridging  the Islands and Vicious Vegetations!"



 Love-Love Beam!



 Are we gonna survive this trip?!



 They'll never learn!



 Luffy, the food is here!



 Luffy?



 Hey, haven't we reached Ace yet?



 Yes, I'm afraid it'll take more time.



 I see.



 Oh! Yum-yum!



 Luffy.



 Do you want some tea?



 Yeah, please.



 Yes, please.



 Oh no!



 A-All right, I'll make some.



 Say, Luffy,



 tell me about your friends.



 Well, I mean, it's no big deal!  I'm just making conversation!



 It's not like I want to know more  about you or something like that!



 Well, which one of them should I start with?



 Zoro, Sanji, Usopp, Brook,  Franky, Nami, Robin...



 Nami? Robin?



 There are girls?!



 Yeah. You're spilling the tea water.



 I'm sorry, but I can't be with you.



 Why?! Why, Luffy?!



 Because I'm with them!



 No, I won't back off!



 What're you talking about?



 That's a person!



 I've never seen clothes like these...



 She's from somewhere else.



 She's alive!



 Are you okay?



 Well... I'm not sure.



 Where am I?



 You're in Tequila Wolf, a  country in the East Blue.



 Are you cold? Do you want  to come to our house?



 If it won't put you out,  yes, I would like to.



 Hey, hustle up!



 Soran! Did you go out without asking again?!



 You can't do that! You hid  from the officers, right?



 Yes.



 Who's that?



 Seems like she's from somewhere else.



 She was lying down in this snow.



 A drifter?



 Maybe, a wanted person.



 Anyway, she wouldn't come to the  place like this if she were sane.



 Looks like I'm not welcomed here. I'll go.



 I'll look after her.



 Don't be selfish!



 What would you do if the officers find  out that we're giving a stranger shelter?



 I'd take all the responsibility!



 She's hopeless!



 Where are you gonna hide her?



 In my room.



 In the loft?



 It'll be okay for a while there.



 Are you people serious? Shouldn't  we turn her in before it's too late?



 It's too late. She's already in our house.



 I don't wanna regret it later.



 Keep me out of it!



 Thank you!



 Don't get any ideas. She has to  leave as soon as her wounds heal.



 Even if she gets well, there's  nothing for her in this country.



 They are kind.



 Yes.



 Thank you.



 Something smells so nice.



 I didn't use any perfume.



 Maybe, that's the scent of the outside world.



 The outside?



 I haven't left this country since I was born.



 Are you a traveler? Did you  come from a hot climate?



 Yes, I've been traveling  around on a ship but...



 Is it a big ship? What kind  of island did you come from?



 Have you seen any beautiful  flowers or birds? And...



 Soran! The break is over!  Hurry and get ready!



 It's time to work.



 You work this late at night?



 We work all day and night.



 You can rest.



 Tell me about the outside world later.



 Okay. I'll be waiting for you, Soran.



 Yes.



 I don't think that I can make it in time.



 Oh, did I wake you?



 Soran, you're so dirty!



 I'm okay.



 What kind of work do you do?



 --We are making a bridge. --A bridge?



 This country is on a bridge.



 The bridge will connect  many islands together.



 This construction has been  going on for centuries now.



 That's what the officers say.



 For centuries?



 Tell me. Where are you from?



 I'm from...



 My home island no longer exists.



 But I traveled many islands and oceans.



 Soran?



 What're these?



 They're drawings of islands  all throughout the world.



 I've never left this place so I  drew them out of my imagination.



 But when I draw an island, it makes  me feel like I'm visiting that island



 and I can forget how difficult life is!



 These are wonderful!



 This is the Sky Island!



 Does the island in the sky really exist?!



 --Yes. --Tell me about your trip there!



 All right.



 Well... where should I start?



 Wow, that's wonderful!



 It seems like the outside world  is as much fun as I thought!



 Every day they push us around and  work us until we're exhausted but



 when I think about it, maybe  making a bridge isn't so bad!



 When it links to a distant island someday,



 anyone can travel freely  by crossing the bridge.



 Then I'll travel all over the world



 and draw pictures of actual islands!



 That's a great dream!



 Yes! So, tell me more!



 Okay.



 Can we join?



 Of course.



 The woman is in the loft.



 Good job. Let's go!



 Hey! Don't forget your promise  to get me out of this country!



 --Don't move! --W-What is this?!



 --Outta my way! --We're looking for the stranger!



 If you resist us, we'll k*ll you!



 What's happening?!



 Somebody must've told the  officers! They're here for her!



 What should we do?!



 What do you want?



 I heard that you're hiding a  suspicious woman in this house.



 These days, people opposed to the  construction of the bridge thr*aten the order.



 Turn her over!



 We don't know a woman like that!



 It's no use searching here!  We're tired so leave us alone!



 Watch your mouth!



 Auntie!



 If you don't cooperate, we have to arrest  all of you and question you one by one.



 You know what we do to get the  information we want, right?



 Captain, I found these!



 What is this crap?



 Islands?



 I drew them! Give them back!



 You drew islands?



 That's amusing! How silly!



 Give them back!



 Tell me where the woman is.



  Then you'll get your drawings back.



 I don't know!



 Once again, where's the woman?



 I don't know!



 If you cooperate, we'll get  you out of here someday.



 Then you can see the outside world for real.



 I don't know!



 One last chance!



 Where is the woman?!



 I don't know!



 You people won't leave this place  for the rest of your life anyway!



 Take all of them in!



 We're gonna t*rture them until they speak!



 And show no mercy to the kid!



 Come on, move!



 Lady!



 Clutch!



 H-Hey, guys!



 S-Stay away! P-Put your hands up!



 I-I'm sorry! Forgive me!  Please don't hurt me!



 I got you!



 It's her! I got her cornered!



 Hurry! Someone! I need backup!



 What're you doing? Didn't you hear him?!



 Isn't she the one that you're looking for?



 Just go and get her!



 You're not welcome here!



 Captain...



 What're you doing?! Go and cover him!



 Yes, sir!



 I'll let you get away for now!



 But I won't forget your rebellious behavior!



 We don't care!



 Are you all right?



 Lady...



 This is a country of laborers.



 Pull! Pull!



 The people who work here are  criminals from various countries



 or citizens of countries that refused  to be allied with the World Government.



 On your feet! Let's go!



 In other word, slaves.



 How long until the bridge is complete?



 I have no clue.



 It's been under construction for     years!



     years? For what purpose?



 You don't need to know that.



 You'll become one of laborers,



 so all you have to worry about  is making the bridge!



 This islands look like a flower blooming  in the ocean. It's called Bowin Islands.



 Let's go Usopp Exploring Party!



 Of course, I'm the leader!  Usopp the king of sn*pers!



 And here is my crew!



 They couldn't be here due  to unforeseen circumstances.



 Where am I?



 I wonder whether Luffy and others are alive.



 They can't do anything without me.



 I know that they're crying for me!



 Yeah, I'm sure!



 I gotta hurry to save them!



 Oh, just the wind.



 The crew of Usopp Exploring Party  should always be on the lookout!



 I'm Usopp...



 How can I get off this island? And...



 Hey! Is anybody here?



 Don't tell me this is a deserted island!



 Ugh! It's the My-Heart-Will-Stop-Beating-  If-I-Don't-See-Anybody Syndrome!



 Collapse!



 How sad!



 Hey! Isn't anybody here for real?!  Stop being shy and come out!



 Ah, there you are!



 How're you?



 You seem to be doing a little well!



 --Are you gonna eat that'n? --Yeah, right!



 But you saved me! Thanks,  Mr. Whoever-you-are!



 My name is Heracles'n!



 Wow! That's a cool name!



 Oh? You think so'n?



 I'm Usopp! Nice meetin' you!



 Is this good to eat? I've  never seen a fruit like this!



 It's fine'n! Usopp'n!



 And my name is Heracles'n!



 Yeah, OK, fine - that's cool.



 It sure smells delicious...



 Let's just lick it and see.



 Usopp'n!



 Boy! What was it?! Did  that plant try to eat me?!



 Of course, they're man-eating plants'n!



 Man-eating?!



 Where the hell am I?!



 This is the Swindling Forest - Glinston!



 H-H-Help me!



 And my name is Hera...



 Zoro arrives at an old castle,



 where he runs into Perona.



 Zoro wants to return to his friends,  but for some reason, Perona stops him.



 Around that time,



 Brook is being hailed as  Satan, the king of demons!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "The Friends' Whereabouts! A Princess  Negativity and the King of Demons!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

"Hancock & Luffy"

 to see the key figure of this whole  mess, Portgaz D. Ace, wasn't it?

 pirates are not welcomed here  even though you're a w*rlord.

 and we'll conduct a strict  body search before you go in.

 Luffy, they'll  search my body.



 I'll figure out a  way. Just go on.

 Vice Warden! Vice Admiral Momonga and  Hancock-dono of the Seven Warlords arrived.

 Take care!



 Hancock-sama!  Have a nice visit!



 Shut up, you idiots!

 Help me!



 S-S-Somebody!



 Get me out!

 You're my Empress  Hancock-dono?



 Oh no, I'm sorry! That  was over-ambitious!



 The dumb-ass-warden...  Oh, sorry!



 The Warden Magellan is in his office on  level   and I would like you to meet him.



 Vice Jail Manager Domino  and I will guide you.



 It seems like you are in a rush so  let me ask you to come this way.



 Vice Admiral-dono, you can go that way.  I'm afraid I have to conduct a body search.



 If you were a prisoner, we'd ask you to go inside  of this cell and take off all of your clothes,



 then we'd push you into an iron pot filled with  "the warm water of hell" boiling at     degrees



 to receive your baptism and get sterilized at  the same time and you would be ready to enter.



 There are different  classes of prisoners.



 Among all recent  newcomers, "Fire Fist" Ace,



 Jimbei of the Seven Warlords  and the former w*rlord Crocodile



 didn't turn a hair while receiving baptism  and entered prison very smoothly.



 Please come in. We search guests  in a private room so don't worry.



 I'd like you to take  off your cloak.



 Those are well-suited for hide  something inside so I'll take it here.



 It's not like I don't trust you but you  better not do anything suspicious.



 Surveillance Transponder Snails are  everywhere inside of Impel Down



 and they keep sending video  to the surveillance monitors.



 Wow! This is the  pirate empress!

 Snails! Let me see  Hancock-sama more clearly!



 Close-up! Zoom  in for a close-up!



 Wow! Cute!



 Now, let's just start.



 Let me put these Sea Prism  Stone handcuffs on you.



 I'm not a prisoner but  you put handcuffs on me.



 You couldn't be more careful.



 Public execution of Ace...

 Luffy parts ways with Hancock and  infiltrates the prison alone.

 iron-tight security.



 Just then, that man with  the red nose appears!

 "A Reunion in Hell?! The Man  Who Ate the Chop-Chop Fruit!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 Alright! I'm giving you this!



 It's a favor of Captain  Buggy-sama! Accept it gratefully!



 Yeah! We're free!



 We're out of the cells!



 Thank me, you idiots!



 Tell me who has set you free!



 Captain Buggy! We're indebted to you forever!



 Captain Buggy is our savior!



 Yes, I am! Don't you  ever forget my name!



 Now, unlock all the cells!



 I fell down here by chance, but if I start  chaos, it'll give me a chance to get out!



 --Alright, are you happy now? Now, it's my turn! --Let me go! Let me go! You fool!

 Is there any hole  like the last time?



 I don't know the  way to level  !



 How can I remember all floors  of this maze-like prison?



 Thank you, Captain Buggy!



 I can smell freedom...



 Ugh! Stop, Straw Hat!



 Why should I?! You said  that you'd lead me to level  !



 I lied, I lied! I wanted the  treasure so I lied to you!



 Those prisoners are gonna run  rampant on this floor and...



 You lied to me?!



 What's that?



 What're you doing?! It's your  chance to break out in chaos!



 We just had a dose of reality!



 There's no way to escape if the  boss of this floor is still here!



 Yeah, it's safer to be in a cell.



 O-Okay, Straw Hat! I'll  guide you to level  !



 You just said that you don't  know the way, Big Nose!



 What did you just call me?!



 If you're having trouble on  this floor, I can help you.



 Who is that guy?



 Long time no see,  Straw Hat Luffy!



 You helped me out  without noticing.



 I always pay back my debts.



 Who are you?



 Oh, that's  ! That means...



 Yow! Look at that weird hair!



 Shut up!



 And it's on fire!



 Take that! Candle Lock!



 Oh, this is perfect!



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Mallet!



 Now, can you tell  which is the real me?



 You're just a powerful fool who acts  only on instinct. You can't catch me!



 I am Mr.  ! I always get  the job done perfectly!



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Stamp!



 How did you know  where I was...?



 Instinct.



 You were on the island with  the Giants! You are San!



 No, I'm Mr. Three!



 On Top - Left,,    ,    ,    ,,"Prisoner Number D-     Former Baroque Works Agent Mr.  "



 Fleet Admiral Sengoku! We just got an  emergency report from Impel Down!



 Hmmm? What happened? Don't  tell me it's about Whitebeard.



 No, Straw Hat Luffy  has infiltrated.



 What?! Straw Hat?  What's going on?



 I thought that Bartholomew  Kuma took care of him.



 Yes, that's what we heard.



 But why would a pirate  sneak into Impel Down?



 What is he up to?



 Fleet Admiral Sengoku!



 I don't know what he wants but this  time, it's the end of the road for him.



 Because the place  he finds himself...



 ...is a prison that has held hundreds  of thousands of prisoners in the past



 without allowing even a  single breakout or escape.



 It's a truly iron-tight, great  prison - Impel Down!



 Of course, it's their blunder to  let him enter in the first place



 but there is absolutely no way that  the kid will walk out of there alive!



 Oh no! There was one guy...



 There was?



 Twenty years ago, he became the first and  only escapee in the history of Impel Down.



 He's a pirate named  Shiki the Golden Lion.



 Shiki the Golden Lion?



 Twenty years ago, one man



 became the first and only escapee  in the history of Impel Down.

comment:
Travel across the oceans of the world



Bellow a battle cry



Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



We've left the established course



Right now, we're rowing straight toward



The borderline between the sky and the ocean



In the dark depths of the ocean, adventure holds its breath



Don't you have a good time just imagining it?



Travel across the oceans of the world



Bellow a battle cry



Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



"That feeling" I get when embarking



Is something I hope to remember always



If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



With our pulses racing,  let's go on a trip now



Shy hearts engrave the rhythm of adventure



Snatch up the treasure here and there



While laughing out loud



As we dash by like a noisy party



Make some waves...



Life is "Adventurous"



Be aware it's "Dangerous"



Who's gonna be "One of us"



And a trip goes on because



We da pirate of the "Mass"



To the West, To the East



Gotta find my way, Sail away



All the way to "One piece"!!



Stuff a dream into your empty chest



And spread your wings



If the wind blowing through them dyes your heart



Let's press forward



Snatch up the treasure here and there



While laughing out loud



As we dash by like a noisy party



Make some waves...



 Impel Down - the great prison that holds



 villainous prisoners from all over the world.



 The world's greatest prison - so heavily  guarded - has just been breached!



 He has come to rescue his brother "Fire  Fist" Ace who will soon be ex*cuted.



 He is Straw Hat Luffy.



 However...



 twenty years ago...



 there was a man who had broken  out of the iron-tight Impel Down!



 This can't be real! He cut off his own legs!



 This legendary person is...



"Golden Lion"



 ...the captain of the Flying Pirates,



 Shiki the Golden Lion!



 This is a story of what  happened several days ago...



 ...before Shiki the Golden Lion  faced Luffy and his friends!



 "A Special Presentation Related to the Movie! A Gold Lion's Ambition on the Move!"



 Captain! Colt-san!



 Ah? What?



 We have word from Big Boss Shiki!



 Well, finally! We've waited so long!



 Bring a Transponder Snail here!



 Yes! Right away!



 Big Bro, we did it! If we  can join Shiki's party,



 it's gonna be our chance  to become successful!



 B-Big Bro? Why are you crying?



 Amore! My beloved brother Colt!



 I am very sad!



 If the plan of senor  Shiki is put into action,



 the world will be filled with sorrow.



 When I think about hearing  thousands of despairing voices,



 it makes me very very sad...



 Here is a Transponder Snail!



 Good! Put him through!



 Are you the captain of  Amigo Pirates - Mr. Largo?



 No, I'm a vice captain Colt.  Tell me what you want.



 All right.



 I called to let you know that we have decided



 to welcome Mr. Largo to Big  Boss Shiki's assembly...



 ...as our   st pirate captain.



 --No surprise there! --However...



 ...there is a condition to  your attending the assembly



 and we need to ask you to fulfill that first.



 Conditions?



 Nothing so far...



 No good at all...



 I'm hungry...



 You look pretty full to me.



 We've been having banquets  every night these days.



 So our stomachs have expanded and  we have to eat more to be satisfied.



 You're right! It feels like my  bones are bigger these days...



 Yeah, in your dreams.



 How's it going? Catch something?



 Not good! Not even a nibble!



 We're totally out of food!



 If you can't catch anything,  it'll be no food for you guys!



 What?!



 Don't "what?!" me!



 I told you it was a bad idea



 to have a banquet before  we got to the next island!



 But you guys were...



 Banquet! Banquet!



 Is that how we were?



 Don't even remember?!



 A bite! I've got something!



 Here it comes!



 Way to go, Brook!



 It's a big one!



 Great! We're gonna have  another banquet tonight!



 Catch that fish even if it kills you!



 --Banquet! --Hang on! It's coming!



 Looks like they're having fun.



 It's coming! It's coming!



 You gotta be kidding me!



 What the hell is that?!



 I-It's a...



 ...Beetle!



 Our fish...



 ...He ate it!



 Awesome!



 It's...



 ...a pirate ship!



 What shameless b*stards!



 Boss! Get them!



 I-It's coming back!



 That's a big beetle!



 I wanna ride on it!



 What?! Are you nuts, Luffy?!



 Hey, Usopp! Let's catch it!



 Alright!



 Where the hell did you get that net?!



 I'm not gonna let it destroy our ship!



 Coup de Vent!



 Franky's attack didn't work?!



 Can't be true!



 Leave it to me!



 Alright, come on, you giant beetle!



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Bazooka!



 They blew Boss away!



 That beetle breathes fire!



 He's gonna roast our ship!



 Luffy! You alright?!



 That beetle isn't just  huge - he breathes fire...



 How cool is that?



 Huh?



 He looks just fine.



 Okay! I'm gonna make him one of us!



 What?! No! Wait a minute, Luffy!



 Alright, you giant beetle! Join my...



 I got you!



 This can't be true!



 What is he doing there?



 They're coming this way...



 Yeah, they seem to be getting bigger...



 He's aiming at us!



 Help... Help...



 Help me!



 --Oh no, Usopp! --Damn it! You idiot!



 He's flying away!



 What were they thinking?!



 Hey, look! An island!



 Is that where the beetle came from?



 Boss!



 Watch out, Boss!



 H-Hey! We're gonna hit the wall!



 You can't get away now, you giant beetle!



 Just give up and become one of my crew!



 I don't take "no" for an answer!



 My boss...



 ...will never become...



 ...a pirate!



 Ouch! Ow, ow, ow!



 Ouch! Ow, ow, ow!



 Ow, ow, ow! What is this place?



 I didn't know there was an island like this.



 And for that matter...



 ...What the hell is going on?



 Yoko! What happened?!



 Be careful! He's a pirate!



 A pirate?! No!



 Show us mercy!



 Stop doing that!



 You people are Straw Hats, aren't you?



 Yes, we are.



 Oh yeah! He's a Straw Hat!



 Ah! He's "Pirate Hunter" Zoro!



 And he's "Black Foot" Sanji!



 And then he's...



 Who are you?



 Let me go! He tried to steal Boss from me!



 I'm gonna bite you to death!



 Yoko! Stop!



 Shut up and just let me go!



 Who are these people?



 Ouch! You are the owner of this beetle?



 The owner?! No way! Boss is my friend!



 Friend?



 Oh, you're already on someone else's team?



 Is there any way that you'd let me have him?



 Of course not! Over my dead body!



 Alright! I give him up!



 Huh?!



 Here we go!



 Hey! What're you doing?!



 Boss!



 I'm sorry if I hurt you.



 You think that you defeated him?!



 No, I didn't mean it like that.



 Boss!



 --Hey! --Stay away!



 These wounds mean nothing to him!



 They'll heal up overnight while  he's sleeping underground.



 Wow! That's amazing!



 Not only that! Tomorrow he will molt!



 He'll become bigger and stronger!



 Huh? Do they continue doing that  even as full grown beetles?



 Boss is different. He sheds  his skin once a month.



 That's why he's so big.



 You're gonna be stronger than you are now?



 Yes, he is! What do you say to that?!



 That's cool!



 Alright! Then, let's have  this fight again tomorrow!



 Let's make it clear which  one of us is stronger!



 That's so silly... Oh?



 Alright! So I have your word, then!



 He is an interesting young man as they say!



 Boss?



 This way!



 What a big cave! What is it for?!



 This is an escape route.



 Escape route?



 This cave is like a maze.



 We can escape through this  cave when pirates come.



 We are world champions at  running away and groveling!



 Y-You're proud of it?



 That's how we survive in the Grand Line.



 We don't have a military  and it's a remote island



 so the Navy always leaves  us on a back burner.



 Speaking about the Navy, that  girl was wearing a Navy coat.



 Is there any reason for that?



 She wears it in memory of her father.



 He was a good man.



 He couldn't stand by and see us  repeatedly att*cked by pirates



 so he stayed on this island separated from



 other marines in order to protect us.



 You said "in memory of" so I assume...



 It was exactly five years ago...



 he was fighting against some  pirates alone and died.



 Three years later,



 Boss came to us out of nowhere.



 He bonded with Yoko right away and became



 the guardian angel of this island.



 Maybe, Boss reminds her of her  late father who was strong.



 Is it okay for us to be here?



 We're pirates.



 You people are different! Now, we are here!



 Wow! A windmill! It's gigantic!



 It's so high!



 Oh! I thought that it was just a  crag but it's beautiful in the back!



 But then...



 How can I say this? The buildings  here are all different in style...



 It's a strange town!



 Can't you see?



 It was a deserted island when we first



 got here and that was just the beginning.



 Since then, for some reason, people  are coming here from the same ocean.



 That's what made this town.



 Welcome, Straw Hats!



 This is Kansorn Island where people  from the East Blue live together!



 It also known as Little East Blue!



 Yeah! I didn't expect to see the rookie  of great promise in the East Blue!



 Zoro-san! You're from  Frost Moon Village, right?



 We have a training hall for  people who came from there!



 Come and see it!



 A training hall?!



 Sanji-san, you grew up on The Baratie, right?



 Try the food at the local Baratie!



 It's pretty good!



 You have The Baratie here?!



 Anyone from Syrup Village?!



 I think Luigia is from there.



 Luigia?!



 Yeah. She's living in the most  luxurious mansion in this town!



 Mansion? The only mansion in  Syrup Village is Kaya's mansion.



 Humph! Everybody's so caught up in them!



 Pirates are all the same!



 I wonder how they're doing...



 Don't worry, Chopper! They'll call us soon!



 You think?



 We better get an insect cage fixed for them.



 You're right. If the beetle  joins us, we will need it.



 See? It's them!



 Hey, it's me! Is Nami there?



 Usopp? It's me! What's  wrong? Did you catch it?



 No no no, it's...



 Shut up! Calm down!



 I got it!



 Um... I'm wondering - can you come over here?



 Huh?



 There's a town on the  other side of the island!



 They say that they really wanna see you!



 Call her "Nami-sama"!



 What's going on?



 Anyway, just come over here! I beg you!



 Huh? Wait, Usopp!



 He hung up!



 Why do they want just Nami?



 I don't know.



 Okay! Let's just go!



 I'll leave the ship to you!



 Yeah! Count on us!



 There she goes...



 Is this it?!



 It's a rockbound and there  are reefs all around it



 so regular ships can't approach the island.



 Well, reefs are no problem with this ship.



 Alright! Let's go hunting!



 We're gonna get the big beetle that  took off from Shiki's hide-out!



 Let's go, guys!



 Yeah!



 The Straw Hats arrive at the island



 where immigrants from East Blue live.



 The scenery looks so much like



 their homeland that they  can't help but reminisce.



 But the Amigo Pirates are also heading  toward the island in pursuit



 of the giant beetle!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "A Special Presentation Related to the Movie! Little East Blue in Danger!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 Luffy and his friends  chased after a big beetle

 "A Special Presentation Related to the  Movie! Little East Blue in Danger!"

 Ready?



 Nami-sama!

 L-Look at her! Nami-sama in  person is there in front of us!

 I can't help crying! I'm  so happy to be alive!



 Yeah, yeah!



 W-Who are you people?

 Orenami?

 O...!



 V...!



 E...!

 Yes, it's our pleasure, Nami-sama!



 For God's sake...

 Yes, Nami-sama!



 Ah! Feels great!



 This is awesome!

 Hmmm...

 Against me?

 My     st win.

 Lunch break is over! Let's  start afternoon lessons!



 Okay!



 Ouch! Please!

 Hey! He's not a challenger!

 --Usopp-san! --Hey, Kaya!

 So what adventure are you  going to tell me today?



 Hmm, let’s see…



 The story of when I fought the  giant goldfish at the South Pole



 when I was five!



 Goldfish?

 I wonder how she's doing...

 built this in the style of the  mansion that she used to live in.

 if she used to live in the mansion  that means she's a relative of Kaya?

 This must be...



 Ouch!

 Gee... even the cook seems happy!



 So tiny...



 Shut up!



 So you're from Syrup Village?



 Huh? Yeah.



 You must be Yasopp's son.



 You know him?!



 Sort of. We had a lot of  troubles with his lying.



 Dad? Oh, by the way,



 did you really live in the mansion there?



 You must know if you're from there!



 That mansion is not only  the symbol of the village



 but it's everybody's dream house!



 Y-Yeah!



 I always wanted to live in a mansion  like that since I was a kid.



 I finally made my dream come after  I ended up being on this island.



 So that means you're not  related to Kaya at all.



 I'm known as a cranky princess here so don't



 tell anybody if you don't wanna die!



 Yes, Ma'am!



 Damn, even the granny is bonding with them?!



 Oh, please watch your step there!



 It's a strange place to walk through.



 This is a maze made by nature!



 Hmm.



 It connected to different  parts of the island!



 That's nice but, are we there yet?

 W-W-What the hell is this?!

 It was hard because we only  had the poster to draw from!

 Sorry...



 Boss...

 Órale!



 Okay, it's done! We have a  steel cage for the beetle!



 Amazing! It only took you a minute!



 Huh! It's a piece of cake for me!

 Yeah! They might be back  with it at any minute!



 Awesome!

 Everybody, dig in!



 Cheers!



 So good!

 Oh no!

 A Devil Fruit eater?!



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Whip!



 Zoro! Sanji!



 --Alright! --We got it!



 They're coming!



 Do you wanna fight more, Fancy Hat?!

 Mucho Needle Net!



 Ow, ow, ow... Ouch!



 Luffy!



 Amore! My beloved brother Colt!



 What a shame!



 Even if you are a rubberman,



 I will not let you get away with it, senor!



 Yeah! That's my Big Bro!



 Boo-hoo-hoo, so melancholy!

 Luffy is captured by Largo.

 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "A Special Presentation Related to the Movie! The Fierce Onslaught of the Amigo Pirates!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 hours?!

 years of your life.
