 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed,let the signal to set sail ring out



 We've left the established course



 Right now, we're rowing straight toward



 The borderline betweenthe sky and the ocean



 In the dark depths of the ocean,adventure holds its breath



 Don't you have a goodtime just imagining it?



 Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed,let the signal to set sail ring out



 "That feeling" I get when embarking



 Is something I hope to remember always



 If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



 With our pulses racing,let's go on a trip now



 Shy hearts engravethe rhythm of adventure



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Life is "Adventurous"



 Be aware it's "Dangerous"



 Who's gonna be "One of us"



 And a trip goes on because



 We da pirate of the "Mass"



 To the West, To the East



 Gotta find my way, Sail away



 All the way to "One piece"!!



 Stuff a dream into your empty chest



 And spread your wings



 If the wind blowing throughthem dyes your heart



 Let's press forward



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



The time is the Great Pirate Era.



Countless pirates fight desperately for the One Piece,



the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned to rubber after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.



As Luffy and his friends overcome numerous adventures,



the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.



This is exciting!



What kind of adventure is waiting for us next?!



The crew, on its way to the New World,



will speed along the Grand Line again today!



Separated from the rest of the Straw Hats,



Luffy has snuck into Impel Down to rescue his brother, Ace,



who has been captured by the Navy.



Now with Jimbei and Crocodile, they're battling on level !



There's no need to hesitate!



I'm...



...on the Government side!



I'm on level .



I've just taken care of the fools running wild here.



I blocked all the exits on this floor!



I don't know why Blackbeard is attacking us...



--...but I already did something about it.--Nice!



It's not something that I wanted to do but I have no option under the circumstances!



I decided to release Shiryu against my will!



You did?!



Shiryu, how do you like being out of the cell?



Yeah, I really learned a lesson.



The eternal boredom makes you long for death.



But you're not gonna use me as a pawn



and then ask me to go back into the cell, are you, Magellan?



You're a condemned prisoner! And this is a deferred sentence!



This is your only chance!



Yeah, I bet.



I'll keep that in mind!



I have the right...



...to cut you down!



"The Dangerous Encounter! Blackbeard and Shiryu of the Rain!"



They broke into the jailers' room and took the keys!



Let's set more prisoners free and let chaos free in the prison!



Then, we can divide our opponents forces and we will have a higher chance of survival!



If you wanna run, come on and get out!



It's your chance to break out! Come with us!



Wow! Are you gonna release us?!



Go Blugoris!



Go wild!



Damn, the Blugoris!



Chief Guard Saldeath, we'll leave them to you!



Blugoris! Get that q*eer king with a gigantic face!



It's not a "gigantic face," it's Face Growth Synthesis!



Blugoris! Get him!



Hell...



...Wink!



Heehaw!



He finished off the Blugoris with a single blow!



N-No way!



I don't get it! What was that?!



Straw boy! You can't stop running!



Leave them to us and...



...you better keep going forward and up! Now, go!



I got it!



Thanks!



--It's the demon guards!--There're three of them!



Finally! We got our backup! Sadie-chan's are here!



They aren't gonna let you...



...go any further beyond this point!



Let's go, Luffy-kun! I'll assist you!



I'm not good at fighting on the land though!



Yeah? You're strong enough!



Alright, let's get them, demon guards!



Gum-Gum...



Wait a minute!



We'll save you two the trouble!



Like Ivan-san said, you need to keep going, Straw-san!



We'll take care of the demon guards!



You guys?!



People call us...



...The New Kama's Six Forces!



Oh! Are they formidable?!



These babies have a lot of friends...



...who got k*lled in the fire and brimstone of Impel Down!



They hold grudges against especially the merciless demon guards and...



their commander and the chief guard!



Humph! Take care of them already!



Take this!



Even a demon guard is just a big oaf without his eyesight! Get them!



It was an eye-crusher!



Attack them at once!



Don't underestimate... mmm... these kids!



Even if they can't see you, they still can smell you and feel you!



That's how Impel Down's... mmm... demon guards are!



How about this?!



You can't fight back this time!



Okay, everybody, pull!



How dinky they are!



--No! They're too strong!--g*ns and cannons won't do!



--Help me!--It's impossible! Don't fight! Get back!



--We're all gonna die!--They're way stronger than Blugoris! Run!



I can't resist! Those screams!



--Help me!--Those demon guards are formidable!



Third Gear!



Fish-Man Karate!



Get them all, demon guards!



Gum-Gum...



...Giant...



 Brick...



Sables!



...Fist!



...p*stol!



--No, the poison is...--Damn! Get back!



Dammit! We can't even get closer to it!



That turd, Magellan, he's no fool!



What should we do?!



As long as this block of poison is here, we can't get to level .



No way! Nothing will counteract Magellan's poison!



It's impossible to break out of Impel Down as I thought!



Shut up! We can't give up after coming this far!



That's exactly what Magellan wants!



Have you got any insights?



Oh! Um...



Mr. ! When we're in trouble, we can depend on your wax!



Use your power and...



W-Wait a minute!



It's not as easy as fooling Transponder Snails or Manticores!



Oh wait! I see!



Candle Coating!



I can cover the poison up with wax! What was I thinking?!



You're good, Buggy! It was a great idea!



I wasn't thinking about anything!



You came up with the great idea so quickly!



You're a tower of strength!



I almost fell in love with you!



Of course! I'm not just a flashy guy!



You need to think carefully sometimes!



Do you get it, you fools?!



Now we're safe from the poison but it's still blocking our way out!



That's true. It's not time to celebrate yet.



Don't worry! We got Captain Buggy with us!



He definitely has our next move planned!



What?!



You're right! There's no doubt about it!



What?! What?!



I mean...



Tell us!



W-Well...



--I'd do anything!--What's next?!



--D-Don't ask me what t'do...--"Wax'd do?"



Wax would do!



Let's use my wax power again!



We're gonna do it like when Straw Hat beat Minotaurus!



"It?"



Ready, Straw Hat?! Candle Lock!



Alright! Gum-Gum...



...Mallet r*fle!



That was when we were in level  - the Starvation Hell!



I wanted to go up but I had to go down to level  because of Straw Hat!



After that, it was a pain to get back to level  again!



Are you ready, Buggy? Candle Lock!



I-I gotta do what he did?!



I'm not ready yet...



Damn! There's no option!



Chop-Chop...



Go, Captain Buggy!



Release Wax-Wax and Candle Lock!



...Flashy Mallet!



--That's Magellan's infamous poison!--It's like a creature!



Hey, wait! Gimme back my hand!



Ouch, ouch, ouch...



Ouch, ouch, ouch...



Oh my butt!



It didn't go like it did with Straw Hat. That's all we had!



Damn! Magellan the turd!



Maybe you're the warden of Impel Down - the greatest prison in the world!



But you're just a turd with the runs!



You've got no friends other than the toilet seat!



--Buggy-san lost it at last!--Magellan-chan, how's your seat doing?



We're stuck. No wonder!



You fools! Why can't you see it?!



Captain Buggy's not giving up yet! He's still fighting!



Here's your bowels forecast!



He tries to fight the venom with his venomous tongue!



As they say "Poison quells poison!"



You're gonna have loose bowels all night long!



--What a man!--That's the indomitable pirate spirit!



--He's a natural born captain!--I will follow him forever!



Alright, Captain Buggy! We'll fight with you!



Poop, poop, diarrhean Magellan!



Raise the drawbridge! Don't let them cross it!



 Hurry up!



THE UNDERWATER PRISON IMPEL DOWN LEVEL  CRIMSON HELL



 Only five of them! Stop the Blackbeards!



S-sh**t!



sh**t! He's a w*rlord but we're pretty sure that he betrayed us!



Blackbeard is not on our side!



Pirates can't be on our side in the first place.



Jail Manager Shiryu! When did they let you out?



There are five of them...



Who's that? Here comes trouble!



Is he Magellan?!



I'm Marshall D. Teech. You're Blackbeard, right?



Yes, I am! Who the hell are you?!



I blocked the exits on level .



Buggy the Clown and the others are trapped.



And I know that Shiryu can handle Blackbeard on level .



That leaves us Straw Hat and the others on level .



They've got Crocodile and Jimbei with them and have become quite a force!



In Impel Down, we won't tolerate a riot...



...let alone a break out!



I'll be there soon!



You must hold Straw Hat and others back until I get there, Hannyabal!



Vice Warden, we have a problem!



What's wrong?



According to the report from level ,



the demon guards got beaten in the blink of an eye!



T-That can't be true! The demon guards can't be beaten!



Don't panic, stupid! Tell them that I'll be there soon!



I'm gonna hold them back at any cost until the Warden gets there!



I'll definitely fulfill this duty that the Warden left to me!



Warden!



Hey, hey, Warden! Yes, yes, Warden!



Hey, Warden! Our great Warden! Go for it, go for it, Warden!



Hey, Warden! It for go, it for go, Warden!



Vice Warden! The crisis on level ! Can we go now?!



This is it! We can't fight them without the demon guards!



Break away! There's nothing to fear anymore!



Damn! They're multiplying, too!



Dammit!



--That's Chief Guard Sadie!--Who cares! Push her away!



Shut up! You better call me Sadie-chan!



Manifesto of Excitement--Red Viper Whip!



How dare you...



...beat my sweet...



...minions!



Damn you!



Wait!



I told you to keep moving!



Heehaw!



I'm gonna be your match!



Don't call me "you!" Mmm... I told you to call me Sadie-chan!



Emporio Female Hormone!



Get out of our way! Eccentric girl!



Shut up! Now you became a woman, Ivankov?!



You're just a confused anarchist!



For now, I...



...really feel like a woman!



Level ! What's going on? Have you gotten Blackbeard?



Answer me! What's wrong? Answer me!



It seems like fortune favors us now!



There's no response from level ! Maybe they got wiped out!



That's ridiculous! Vice Warden told me that...



...Warden Magellan has released Jail Manager Shiryu and let him fight Blackbeard!



Even if the enemy is one of The Seven Warlords of the Sea,



it's not so easy to beat Jail Manager Shiryu!



Humph! Maybe it's interesting to hear the scream... mmm... of the q*eer king!



Women's weapons are not just their beauty!



These...



...lithe and soft movements are weapons, too!



And maybe you don't understand it because all you do is snap a whip but...



...women care for others tenderly!



May his spirit rest in peace!



Ivan-sama! Stop mourning! I'm not dead yet!



Oh no!



In addition to that, women are sometimes far stronger than any man!



Shut up! Red Viper Whip!



I will get you!



I can just pluck your head away



but then I don't get a chance to hear your whimper so I'll wait!



I'm gonna take time and make you suffer so let me hear you scream!



Now!



How stubborn you are! Let me hear it!



Let me hear the q*eer king - Ivankov's final scream!



All of my bones shattered...



I-Ivan-sama!



Oh! I can't resist this!



...Or not!



Then why did you say it?!



No way! How come?!



By injecting Emporio Female Hormone,



my body got very lithe and soft!



So it absorbs any kind of shock!



How dare you!



Hey! That was too hard!



Heehaw!



Who is it?! She talks like Ivan-chan!



Hurry up! We're close to the staircase to level !



I'm gonna open the door!



Alright, let's go!



Why's that?! The door's opening by itself!



Who cares? It's our luck! Let's go up to level !



This is the great fort of hell! No one may pass!



Who are you?!



Magellan arrives on level , and makes his way to Luffy and the others.



Having eliminated the forces,Luffy and the others attempt to reach level ,



but Hannyabal stands before them



and finally reveals his true power.



On the next episode of One Piece!



"No Price Too High! Serious Hannyabal!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

who has been captured by the Navy.



Now with Jimbei and Crocodile, they're battling on level !



This is the great fort of hell! No one may pass!



"No Price Too High! Serious Hannyabal!"



Who is that?! Why did he open the door so wide?!



He is Hannyabal - the vice warden of this prison!



sh**t!



Look!



We have a thousand Cage Shot bazooka troops on the stairway to level !



There's no way out for you guys!



--Vice Warden got all fired up!--Maybe somebody's posing as him again!



This is for the bright future of all innocent people!



You, the worst pirate in the history, Straw Hat!



I impose the death penalty on you on the Warden's behalf!



He's really out of character!



Outta my way!



No way!



Outta my way!



I can't believe it!



Hey! Look at that halberd!



That's the Bloodsucker!



You bastard!



Don't underestimate me!



--Looks like he's serious!--Then we can depend on him because he's strong!



Hannya! Hannya! Hannya! Hannya!



W-What's going on here?



As you may know, it's the Hannya Hustle Dance: Inferno Hell Wheel!



Ouch, ouch, ouch...



If you don't move, I'll move you myself! I gotta save Ace!



That's hilarious!



If I moved away that easily, I wouldn't be the vice warden!



Second Gear!



Gum-Gum...



...Jet...



...Gatling!



We've been waiting for you!



Warden Magellan, please hurry!



Where are the ringleaders?!



In front of the staircase to level !



That's the opposite side of this floor! We have to hurry!



Vice Warden Hannyabal and the others are managing to keep them there for now!



Vice Warden!



That was too easy! I'm not a very good vice warden!



If he were here...



THE WARDEN'S OFFICE YEARS AGO



T-This is my first day as a jailer!



My name is Hannyabal!



You look like a viper as they say.



What?! No! That hurts!



You're the only person who can look out for him as I thought.



Magellan!



I got it, sir!



Damn Magellan!



Why should I be assigned to level ?



On top of that,



I'm only in charge of the security check for new prisoners!



--The next one has come!--Oh, okay!



She has a  million berry bounty. A pirate--Ms. Olive!



She's a vicious criminal! Take extra care with her!



She's so my type! Oops, I shouldn't have said that!



He was so easy! Like all other men!



I gotta strip all my clothes off, right?



It's embarrassing, so can you turn away?



S-Sure!



Are you ready yet?



Not yet!



How foolish is he?



Quite.



L-Let me go!



Don't let your guard down!



Ouch!



It doesn't matter if it's level  or ! All duties are equally important!



You gotta keep in mind what's going to happen if any one person fails!



Let me go!



It's not over yet!



You can't go through here!



Follow the Vice Warden! Don't hold back!



Bring it on!



Outta my way!



I'm gonna save Ace!



So what?! It's not over yet!



Outta my way!



You...



You can't go through here!



Gum-Gum...



...Jet Stamp!



Stop!



Quit bothering me!



Dammit! I have to hurry to make it on time!



You can't go through here!



You're the King of Diarrhea!



Why don't you wear a toilet seat instead of your hat?!



He's been cussing for more than  minutes!



That's our Captain Buggy!



Your mom's got an outie belly button!



I don't have anything more to say!



I can't ad-lib anything else!



A-Are you alright?



Magellan's kind of tough, huh? Let me just go to the bathroom!



D-Don't tell us...



...that you got diarrhea, Captain Buggy?!



No, I just wanna pee! Ha!



Then, we'll go with you!



What should I do?!



If nothing happens,



we can't break out and my reputation will be ruined!



I gotta come up with something!



What shitty fortifications!



That didn't help them avoid their destiny!



Liberation!



That's a long leak!



You gotta hear this, Captain Buggy!



What's wrong?



The wall...



...is gone!



What did you just say?!



W-What happened?!



The block of poison's really gone!



My attack finally worked!



What a pain in the butt!



So you were really fighting the venom with your venomous tongue!



Was the peeing part of it?!



Cool! I knew that you were in another league!



Oh no. This doesn't make sense at all.



Alright! The block is gone now!



Come and follow my lead, you guys!



Stop bothering me! Get out of my way!



No, I won't!



--I said "Outta my way!"--I won't let you go a single step!



There's no time!



I said "Outta my way!"



I... I gotta save Ace!



"Wanna save my brother?"



You're the dreg of society so just cut the crap!



You guys are all pirates and rebels who earn only infamy!



--Vice Warden Hannyabal!--Don't stand up! You're gonna die!



With you on the seas,



people can't even sleep at night from fear of losing their loved ones!



That's why we lock up all the vicious criminals to make them feel safe!



This is the great fort of hell!



If we let prisoners out of here, the world will be filled with terror!



So as I said, I won't let you take...



...even a single step!



Vice Warden!



The only thing I care about is saving Ace! So just move!



You're too stupid to understand...



V-Vice Warden, help me!



Hey, what's the matter, you guys?!



Cut it out!



All this arguing about right and wrong!



Search the ends of the earth,



and you'd find no answer!



So, cut the crap!



I met him at Jaya!



Wow! Wow!



How interesting to see all these faces at once!



Looks like you were in middle of something!



Teech! Why the hell are you here?!



Or should I call you Blackbeard now?



Jimbei!



Hey, that's not nice! Why don't you loosen your fist?!



Oh yeah! You're close to Ace, aren't you?



But you're barking up the wrong tree!



Blackbeard!



I'm chasing a certain man.



His name is Blackbeard.



People's dreams...



...have no end!



I heard a pirate called Blackbeard...



...became a w*rlord by defeating "Fire Fist" Ace.



Blackbeard...



So you're...



You're...



...Blackbeard?!



Huh? Oh yeah, I never gave you my name.



Long time no see, Straw Hat!



I was surprised, too, when I heard you were my commander's brother!



Are you sure you want to be here? You're gonna miss it!



Your brother's public execution!



I found out later that the former w*rlord right there...



...Crocodile was defeated by you, Straw Hat Luffy!



At that time, I was trying to take his place as a w*rlord so...



...k*lling you was the most effective way to show my ability to the Government!



Teech, let's cut the idle talk!



You should know the rules, having lived through twice as much as others.



Whitebeard's reign is over! I'll become the next Pirate King!



For starters, I'm gonna k*ll Straw Hat Luffy who is in the Water Seven...



...as a gift to the Government!



Luffy? What did you just say?



Oh! You know him?!



Another reason I can't let you go free!



He's my brother!



But fate has saved you instead!



Ace who has been chasing after me for the crime on Whitebeard's ship...



...happens to be your brother!



When he faced us - we, who were going to k*ll his brother -



he had his retreat cut off!



If I yield to power, there's no point in being born a man.



I'll never leave anything to be regretted later in my life!



Do you understand, stupid?



The sun or the darkness - there'll be only one winner!



I'm gonna make Whitebeard the king!



Do you get it?



If he let us get away, not only would it disgrace Whitebeard's name



but he'd allow his brother's death!



There's no coincidence in fate! That means...



Yeah! You're so lucky! Burp...



Our captain became the w*rlord and made his name



so you're useless to us now!



Your brother fought bravely!



Pay your respects at his grave!



If it weren't for him, you'd be the one who...



...would've been k*lled, Straw Hat!



Then why don't you...



...try to k*ll me now?!



Gum-Gum...



...Jet...



...p*stol!



While attempting to escape during the choas, Luffy is confronted by Blackbeard.



Blackbeard tells of his involvement in arranging Ace's execution.



After hearing this, Luffy fights him out of anger.



On the next episode of One Piece!



"Jet p*stol of Anger! Luffy vs. Blackbeard!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

sh**t him from the other batteries!

b*tch!

but they said that the elderly are useless and put me in here.

I...

Lady!



Lady!

all teams went to break it up so it didn't become serious!

Lady!

Clutch!

so I told him where his sword was but that was  days ago already...

toy with him and leave him on this island at the end!

Is this the right way?

So fast!

You b*stards!



 {\fad(,)}"Lazy Bones IslandThe Land of Poverty - Hungeria"



 This is Lazy Bones Island



 the land of poverty "Hungeria."



Brook was mistaken as Satan, the king of devils-- by its residents.

Luffy-san...



I wonder if they are all looking at the sun like this...

there was an altar and dolls for some kind of rituals,



uncanny tapestries and posters on the wall,



and macabre-looking mural decorations.

When I think about it, it's kind of weird!



Have you awoken?



We were just going to visit your room bringing breakfast.



Is that for me?



Yes, of course!



How generous you people are! You don't even know me!



Oops! I haven't introduced myself yet.



I'm the head of this country Pekkori.



Pekkori-san! Well then, I gratefully accept the food.



Young lady.



Could I look at your panties?



Panties! Hurry and show him your underwear!



Oh no no, um... I don't need to see the guys' underwear!



You don't need to hesitate! Enjoy it as much as you want!



What is that?! Augh!



Thank you for the big meal!



I'm so full that I can barely move!

Be patient for now!



Well, Satan-sama, did you say that you wanted to ask us a favor?

N-No! Have we done something that made you upset?



No.



Hey, everybody! Show your underwear for his dessert!



Enough with the underwear! Wow!

No, that's not the point.



I have to get back to my friends at any cost!



Get back?



Yes.



A-At any cost?!



Yes, I feel bad because I've been treated so nicely.



We're over!



If underwear won't do it, there's nothing we can do to keep you here!



It's the end of this country!



It's come to this, we have no choice but to take our lives...



W-W-Wait a minute! Please relax!



What?!



Well, it seems like you have a story there.



That's why you call me Satan and...



...you said something about Longarm Tribe last night.



Why don't you tell me about it?



This country has been overrun by the Longarm Tribe for too long.



Not only money and goods and food...



...but they also take men and women in their prime from us.



And as you see, our country is devastated



and suffering extreme poverty!



Then, those meal were...



I'm ashamed to say this but we made them from what little food we had.



No way!



In order to get out of the situation,



we kept praying to all the gods and goddesses.



Not only that but we have invited famous psychics from around the world...



...to curse our enemies to death!



But when it didn't work, we resorted to black magic



and finally, we got you, Satan-sama - the king of devils, to be summoned here!



Satan-sama! You're our one and only hope!



Please deal the Longarm Tribe a bloody blow!



--We beg you!--We beg you!



M-Me?!



Yes! Will you please curse them to death for us?!



--Satan-sama!--Satan-sama!



Well, I mean...



It's Longarm Tribe!



What?!



No! Help me!



Do you wanna get hurt?!



Give us back the girl!



Quit messing with us, jerks!



Let my daughter go!



We'll give you hell!



Huh?!



No! Help me!



Um, do you see that they're taking the young lady?



Yes!



Put a curse on them now!



I beg you!



Huh? I mean, we got to help her now!



Satan-sama!



T-They took her!



But why weren't they doing anything...



...though someone was taking their friend or family?!



Why didn't they try to fight and take her back?!



Satan-sama!



I beg you! Please give them punishment!



We beg you!



They're really dependent on other people!



But that young lady is a victim! She doesn't deserve that!



Alright! I owe you for the place to stay and all the panties I saw so I'll do it!



Yeah!



Satan! Satan!



Satan! Satan!



Satan!



"Luffy-san and everybody!"



"Right now, I'm surrounded by a lot of underwear-- and am being called Satan-sama."



"I'm sorry but could you wait a little?"



"I owe them and if I don't pay them back, it'll spoil my skeleton-hood!"



"So give me some time."



"As soon as I finish this, I'll get to wherever you are!"



It's been almost an hour since we left Impel down.-- If the wind is right,



we should have reached to Navy Headquarters already!



Aren't we moving too slowly?



I don't wanna get there after everything has finished!



Crocodile!



The Navy is not the one that will beat Whitebeard! I am!



You still feel that way?



I can beat you first if you want!



Luffy-kun!



I'm on my way! Wait for me!



Ace!



Luffy and the others continuesailing on the Tarai Current.



It won't be long before they reach Marineford.



Luffy watches the Vivre Cardto make sure Ace is still safe,



whiel he reminisces over his past with his brother.

"A Special Retrospective Before Marineford!The Vow of the Brotherhood!"

 million!



 million? For you?

Ace! Why don't you join my crew?!



Let's dominate the world together! The way is all planned out



Whitebeard's reign is over! I'll become the next Pirate King!

Oh! You know him?!



Another reason I can't let you go free!



He's my brother!



And of course...



...I'm not gonna become one of...



...your crew.



Fire Fist!



I know what you want, Ace. You want to k*ll me.

Yes, I k*lled Thatch - the commander of the th Division!



According to the ship's rules, the one who finds it can eat it.



I remembered how they looked from seeing all the fruit in a book.



I noticed this was the one I'd been looking for.



That's why you k*lled Thatch? To steal it?

The power chose me, Ace!



With that fruit, I've become the world's strongest man, Ace.



Look! This one is different from all the other Logia type.

Mine's made out of darkness!



Firefly! Fiery Doll!



Ouch! Ow, ow, ow...



Ouch!



But it's odd.



If it was a Logia type fruit, you could fend off these att*cks.



I told you. Darkness will drag in everything.



b*ll*ts, blades, blows, fire, even thunder!

My body will absorb even pain more than a normal person's.

Vortex!



The gravity of the darkness will pull in Devil Fruit eaters...



The gravity?!



...And my body will...



How's this? You get it already, don't you?



Ace!



No way!



You haven't been hit by somebody for long time, have you?



Ace.



I think that you got it when I grabbed you!



Another thing that my darkness drags in is...



...Devil Fruit powers!



That means as long as I touch them, Devil Fruit eaters can't use any of their powers!



Logia, Zoan, Paramecia...



All the Devil Fruit eaters in this world who put too much confidence in their powers...



...can't protect themselves from my striking power!



Then I won't let you touch me!



Vortex!



St. Elmo's Fire!



Ace!



Nothing can compete against darkness.



Even your strength.



But your power is such a valuable one.



Ace! You got to join my crew!



If I yield to power, there's no point in being born a man.



I'll never leave anything to be regretted later in my life!



Do you understand, stupid?



This world is worthless if you can't survive.

Flame Emperor!

"Ticking Down to the Time of Battle! The Navy's Strongest Lineup in Position!"



Stand up.



Climb.



"South Blue"



It's in  hours now! I wonder if Whitebeard has arrived yet.



I don't know. Do you think he's really gonna be there?



He's a big deal but isn't he too old?



You think so?



He was around before the Great Pirate Era. He must be senile by now.



We haven't heard his name in any big news for years.



How can you guys take this so lightly?



Because he's unignorable, the Navy HQ has called up its elites and...



...is expecting him with all their forces.



I'm almost certain that Whitebeard is going to appear.



And then what's gonna happen?



I don't know. How am I supposed to know?



"East Blue"



He's a pirate of a different era.



Is it possible for him to beat the Navy HQ?



It's not possible for any pirates to attack Marineford.



That's not true. I think it was  years ago,



a pirate called Shiki the Golden Lion invaded Marineford



and left the Navy HQ half destroyed.



This time it's going to be worse.



No matter who wins, a lot of people will die.



It'd be better if he didn't appear.



If nothing besides the execution happens, that'd be for the best.



"North Blue"



Hey, we want drinks, old guy!



Are you asking me to open the bar on a day like this? We're expecting a big w*r in any minute!



Go home! If the world's still here tomorrow, I'll open it!



Then just sell us some drinks! It feels like we're the ones who're on the scaffold!



We can't do without drinking!



He's not just another old man.



"West Blue"



He hasn't lost it at all!



It was just a year ago, when we saw him sitting right there...



...we thought we were dead.



"Grand Line"



Is Whitebeard that outrageous?



Even those kids know it. They're singing as they jump rope.



The pirate Whitebeard is scarier than a devil!



Oh, God!

On the island of Marineford home of the Navy Headquarters,



lies a huge city mainly populated by families of the Navy.



An evacuation order has been issued to all residents at this time.



And at Sabaody Archipelago at the evacuation site,



residents are watching the proceedings of the execution on monitors.



Reporters and cameramen from various places are...



...standing by here to break the news quickly to the world.



That's really the best of Navy HQ.



I assume that Whitebeard knows about this.



But still, will he venture to be there?



Every look-out ship that the Navy sent has been swiftly sunk



and there has been no report of a sighting of Whitebeard.



So the tension at Marineford continues to rise.



And there is less than  hours left until the looming execution.



"Navy"



I have problem with that. Is that really necessary?



This public execution is not just an execution of a pirate.



It has great significance for the future of the world.



That's why it's necessary to...



You are responsible for this matter since you are one of the parties involved.



Don't forget that, Garp.



"Marineford Navy Headquarters"



Hurry and get ready!



Hey you, don't lag behind!



Don't slacken your pace!



No matter what happens, it'll last only  hours!



Then it's all finished!



Elite soldiers are summoned from all over the world--totaling almost one hundred thousand.



The crescent-shaped bay area and the whole island are surrounded by  Navy ships



and numerous cannons have been set at the bay area.



And in front of all the marshaled forces that can be seen from sea...



...stand  ruffians who hold the key to the w*r. Pirates--The Seven Warlords!



"Bartholomew Kuma"



"Gecko Moria"



"Don Quixote Doflamingo"



"Dracule Mihawk"



"Boa Hancock"



It's...



...the admirals!



I don't know why but I find them so intimidating!



Guarding closely below the scaffold are...



...the Navy's greatest powers...



...the three admirals!



"Navy AdmiralAokiji Kuzan"



"Navy AdmiralAkainu Sakazuki"



"Navy AdmiralKizaru Borsalino"



Every force of justice imaginable is...



...now waiting for the Whitebeard Pirates to stop them from rescuing Ace!



Listen, Luffy.



We have to live without leaving any regrets.



Uh-huh.



We gotta go out to sea someday...



...and live as we like.



Freer than anyone else.



I see it!



Hey! Jimbei!



I see the Gate of Justice already! That was fast!



No, it wasn't! If the wind were right, we could have gotten here faster.



However...



I warn you.



As long as we don't open the Gate of Justice, you guys can't get to Marineford



or even get out of the Tub Current!



There is no sea for you all to get away to or to live on!



So now, how can we get through the gate?



You guys! It's almost time for...



Huh? What is it?



Time for Captain Buggy to conquer the world!



That's right!



The Navy HQ is nothing!



Whitebeard is nothing!



Who is the next King of the Pirates?



Captain Buggy!



That's right!



Buggy! Buggy! Buggy! Buggy! Buggy! Buggy!



Ace!



Hey, look! "Fire Fist" Ace has come out!



This is the man...



...who may trigger a w*r that will shake the world!



And he is the one who holds the fate of the world now!



Okay, Garp? I'll tell them everything!



So be it. I'll be downstairs.



--Step aside for a minute.--Yes, sir!



--Fleet Admiral Sengoku!--What's going on?



--Give me a Transponder Snail.--Yes, sir.



I have something to tell you all.



Portgaz D. Ace...



It's about the great significance of his death today.



It's not your fault.



Women are very sweet at times like this, Tsuru-chan.



Ace, tell them the name of your father.



Father? Why is that important now?



My father is Whitebeard.



No!



Yes, he is! Whitebeard is my only father!



We looked for you with our eyes wide open at that time.



Because we heard that there might be a child of that man on some island.



Based on a small amount of reliable information from Cipher Pol,



we checked all newborns...



...and preborn children...



...and their mothers but we couldn't find you.



No wonder.



Your mother risked her life to bear you.



She used a trick that can be called mother's pride.



That has misled us... Indeed, the whole world.



There is an island called Batelira in the South Blue.



Your mother's name is Portgaz D. Rouge.



She did something that completely defied natural law...



...for the love of her child.



She kept her baby inside her womb for  months!



No way.



And as soon as she gave birth to you,



she lost all of her strength and passed away right there.



A year and  months after the father's death,



the child was born with the blood of the world's most heinous man in his veins.



That was you!



You know it, surely?



They can't blame a child whose not born.



Garp!



Look after my child!



Your father is...



...the King of the Pirates -



Gold Roger!



"Fire Fist" Ace is a son of Gold Roger?!



This is huge news.



Call the head office! Let's issue an extra!



Does it continue?



Still?



The bloodline of the King of the Pirates?!



The secret of Ace's origin has been revealed.



His father Roger's feelings, and his motherRouge's strong resolve lay behind it all.



At Marineford, Whitebeard's fleet silently approaches.



On the next episode of One Piece!



"A Vast Fleet Appears! Here Come the Whitebeard Pirates!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.

the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.

will speed along the Grand Line again today!

gonna happen to you after messing with the Navy?!

and he turned into a complete human w*apon at last!

Pad Cannon.

Heehaw!

I'm not gonna go easy on you anymore!

My face!

if you can't remember how scary I am,

...way!

Keep going, Straw Hat!



Thanks!



Ace!

That's...



..."Hawk-Eye!"



Now, I wonder if fate...



...will end the life of the child of the next generation here.

Dracule Mihawk,



one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea, stands before Luffy.

How will Luffy fight back



against such immense strength?



On the next episode of One Piece!



"The Great Swordsman Mihawk!



Luffy Comes Under the Attack of the Black Sword!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

he has the most formidable ability!

the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned to rubber



after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.



As Luffy and his friends overcome numerous adventures,



the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.



This is exciting!



What kind of adventure is waiting for us next?!

will speed along the Grand Line again today!

Luffy made it to Marineford to rescue his brother, Ace who will be ex*cuted!

but the Navy stands in their way.

the allies of the Whitebeards to exterminate them!

Pops! Don't push yourself! Your health is...

I know about your deal with the Navy!



You have their assurance that the Whitebeards and Ace will remain safe!



What is he talking about?



What's going on here?!



Everyone, listen very closely!



We've all been trapped!



You never told me...



...that Ace was a son of that hateful Gold Roger!



When you first found me, I was all alone...



Squard is out of control again!



He's dangerous! Stay away!



Again?! Please!



We can't do anything about it  when it starts!



Isn't there any strong man?!



Hey! Bring it on!



Bring Gold Roger here!



What? Are you all scared?

Because Roger k*lled all my precious crew who had fought alongside me for so long.



I despise Roger and...



...you know it!!

and you want to make him the next King of the Pirates!



Don't mind the Whitebeards!



Back down to the plaza immediately!



The old man wants Ace to be the King?



Whitebeard is the greatest pirate I know.



I wanna help him to be King of the Pirates...



You were already betraying me at that time!



But I didn't know. I even befriended Ace!



I must've looked so stupid!

With the Whitebeard Pirates all inside the bay



and we allied pirates on the outside.

and the Whitebeards and Ace will be safe.

Ace is Roger's son?!

Whether you like or not, there's only one truth



and you all will die in vain.



Silence! I won't fall for your line!

Soon you will know that I'm not lying.

Our converging attack will start soon



and only you--the allied pirates--will be att*cked.

We didn't know anything about it



and we followed you here sacrificing our lives to save Ace and help you



and this is what happens!

Those monsters approach from the back and the ice is blocking us on both sides



and we have no way out now!

It's a miracle that I could s*ab you once.

The wall of ice is blocking us! There's no place to go!

Run!

Old buddy!



Old buddy!

Whitebeard and the Navy made a deal?

...Are betrayed and will be k*lled by the Navy?!

tricking the one man who would be most angered by that fact.

There'll be no win or lose?!



Turned off!



What's wrong?



Is it broken?



Activate the encircling walls!



That bastard!

Shame on you, Whitebeard!



I've no recollection of being beaten by such a weakling!



Croco boy...



Crocodile.



It's true,



he could've fended off that attack if he was the same guy he used to be.



Even if it was a surprise attack or the attacker was one of his fellows,



he could've avoid it!



That's the problem!



Are you telling me to draw their sympathy by putting these on?



Pops!



He allows himself to get out of shape!



You know what you have done, right, Squard?



You thrust a sword into your father's body.



You're such a stupid son!



But I love you, son, even if you are a fool.



Cut the crap...



You sold our lives to...



Who pulled your upright and loyal heart into the darkness?



Tell me.



He's an insurgent in the Navy.



I'm opposed to this plan.



People who don't know the truth



are calling him a legendary pirate and honoring him



but that's not true.



He's just a scumbag who offered a secret deal to the Navy



just to protect his own interests



and betrays and sells out his allies.



They made up all his legends.



The one that we have to k*ll in this w*r is Whitebeard!



It's absolutely unthinkable not to!



If you're gonna help me, I'll save you all--the allied pirates.



s*ab Whitebeard.



He said he would save us allied pirates if I slew you.



So that's what Akainu told you.



I know how much you hate Roger...



...so much so that I can feel your pain.



But, Squard,



it's ridiculous to lay the blame on a child for the sins of his father.



Did Ace do something to you?



You and Ace have weathered agony, joy and pain together...



...so many times along with the others, isn't it right?



I don't give a damn who Ace's father is.



We all met each other on this wide sea by chance!



Not only the two of you but all of you, I take as my sons!



So, Squard, treat him kindly.



I don't love him any more than any other.



You are all family to me!



Anyway...



...he has never...



...changed at all, Sengoku.



He shook us up very well.



How ridiculous to say that I sold my sons!



He gave the pirates the way out.



I should never underestimate that guy.



The wall of ice has broken down.



This Navy ship is in good condition!



We can get away at any time!



If you are a pirate, you pick what you want to believe on your own!



I knew that it was a lie! That was the Navy's plan!



Damn! They fooled us!



Old buddy would never betray us!



I'm sorry! I will never lose trust in you, old buddy!



Me too, old buddy! I'm so sorry!



I'll follow you to the end!



Old buddy!



Did you call me a weakling? Please, Croco brat.



I'm just a human with one heart.



People would call me a devil or a monster



but I can't continue to be the strongest forever.



If I can save this one young man's life,



I will earn my right to retire from the world.



Those of you who'll follow me, lay down your life for it!



Be ready! He's gonna run wild!



He's the strongest man in the world!



Let's go!!



The world's strongest pirate, Whitebeard, has joined the battle himself.



Unleashing his Tremor-Tremor fruit powers to the max,



he decimates the Navy's forces one after another.



In response, Sengoku finally enacts the greatest counterattack plan



in Navy history!



On the next episode of One Piece!



"The Encircling Walls Activated! The Whitebeard Pirates backed into a corner!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

Not in a million years! I'll tell you why.



Your father Gold Roger conquered the Grand Line



and opened the door to the new era called



the Great Pirate Era by sacrificing himself.



As a Navy admiral, it's not my place to say so,



but he was true to his name: the King of the Pirates!



In contrast, what has Whitebeard done?



I wonder if he really had the intention to fight .



I assume that he established a large family someplace



and was satisfied being a big fish in a little barrel.



There are some fools in the world



who'd say that his name is keeping peace on various islands



but if you ask me, he's just keeping lightweights in fear of him



and he thinks that he's a hero which makes me laugh!



When Roger was alive, Whitebeard had second billing



and even after Roger's death, he couldn't become a King.



That means he'll never better Roger and he'll be a loser forever!



That's who Whitebeard is and that's the truth.



He's a poor man when you think about it.



He gathered some punks who call him Pops



and roamed around the sea with his fake family.



Stop it.



And although he reigned the sea for years,



he couldn't become a King and gained nothing



and at the end, he was stabbed by a fool,



one of his sons who fell for my line



and he will die to protect that son.



Don't you think that his life is so empty?



Stop it!



Don't do it, Ace, come back!



Ace!



Pops gave us a place to live!



You can't understand his greatness!



People don't deserve to live if they can't live justly!



Punks like you guys don't deserve a place to live!



Stop it!



Whitebeard will die as a loser! It's fitting for a big fish in a little barrel!



Whitebeard is a great pirate who shaped this era!



Don't make fun of the man who saved me!



Don't do it, Ace!



The name of this era should be "Whitebeard!"



Both Whitebeard and you guys who call him Pops



are the same after all--losers!



Ace has been burned!



Are you careless because you ate a Logia type fruit which



is the most powerful of all?



You're just fire but my magma can even burn fire!



My power is far stronger than yours.



Ace!



Hey, Luffy-kun, you should not fight anymore!



Ace's Vivre Card!



Gold Roger the King of the Pirates, Dragon--the revolutionary.



I was amazed to hear that sons of those two are step brothers.



You two have bad blood in your veins.



I don't care if the others get away as long as I get you two!



Watch what I do.



Wait!



Luffy!



This is certainly a Vivre Card.



But I haven't told you that this card



also tells you how much vital energy the owner has.



This card belongs to someone who you care for, right?



Yeah, it's my brother's!



Hold onto it, always.



That paper will lead us to one another.



Ace is pierced by Akainu's fist while protecting Luffy.



Jimbei and the Whitebeard Pirates try to save him,



but Ace, realizing he is about to die,



finds the voice to convey his feelings to his friends one last time.



On the next episode of One Piece!



"Looking for the Answer! Fire Fist Ace Dies on the b*ttlefield!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!

The time is the Great Pirate Era.



Countless pirates fight desperately for the One Piece,



the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned to rubber after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.



As Luffy and his friends overcome numerous adventures,



the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.



This is exciting!



What kind of adventure is waiting for us next?!



The crew, on its way to the New World,



will speed along the Grand Line again today!



Separated from the rest of the Straw Hats,



Luffy made it to Marineford to rescue his brother, Ace who was to be ex*cuted!



In the midst of the Navy's onslaught, Luffy finally freed Ace! However,



Admiral Akainu landed a fatal blow against Ace!



Pops!



Everybody!



And you Luffy.



Thank you...



...for loving someone like me who is good for nothing...



...and who has such bad blood in his veins...



...up to today.



Thank you!

we're brothers!

Ace!



Ace!!



"Fire Fist" Ace is dead!

it's a dishonor to the Whitebeard Pirates!

I told you that I won't let the brothers get away!

Akainu-san!

Hell Hound!



Pops!

Pops!!



Pops!



Pops!



Pops.



Pops.



Pops!

You bastard!



Whitebeard!



Admiral Sakazuki!



--Don't fall!--Hang on!

Pops!

We are completely separated from Pops!



Pops!



Pops!



He still got this much power after his torso has been charred?



You haven't seen anything yet.



From now on,



I'm the only one who you have to deal with!

Pops!

Cry after you get on the ship!



--Pops! Ace!--Hurry up!



Bring all able ships alongside the bay head!



We won't let you get away!



Hurry up, everyone!



Salome! I can't stop worrying about Luffy!

whose existence has been erased because of their brutality!

"GREAT BATTLESHIP" SAN JUAN WOLF

"Corrupt King" Avalo Pizarro!



"CORRUPT KING" AVALO PIZARRO

"Heavy Drinker" Vasco Shot!



"HEAVY DRINKER" VASCO SHOT

don't you think?



Fleet Admiral Sengoku-san?

and an unidentified ship passed through a while ago!

and I didn't hear about any unusual circumstances!



How did they get here?



I'm sorry.

Before we, the Blackbeard Pirates, set off for Impel Down,



I hypnotized the Navy soldiers in the control room...



...to open the Gates of Justice for any Navy ship that approaches.

Straw Hat and the others?



If I were regarded as an enemy by the Government,



the Gates of Justice won't open



for me and I couldn't have sneaked into Impel Down!



That's why I wanted the title of The Seven Warlords!



But I don't need it anymore!



So you just wanted to free your crew members!



Yes, indeed! That's all I wanted from the beginning!



And that's all that matters!



You'll see why!



I don't give a damn about any of this!



Teach!



Look out! Captain!



That was close! That was close! We had a narrow escape!



You have no mercy, huh?! Of course you don't!



You're the only one that I refuse to call my son, Teach!



You broke the one and only iron rule on my ship and you k*lled your mate!



I will avenge the th division commander--Thatch



by taking this fool's life thereby ending the matter!



Pops!



Marco!



Pops!



Keep yourself out of this!



Pops!



Do you hear me?!



Let's get it over with, Teach!



I'm looking forward to it!



What is that black stuff coming out of his body?



Smoke?!



Black Hole!



This is the power of the Devil Fruit that I stole from Thatch by k*lling him!



The most dominant Dark-Dark Fruit! Enjoy it to the fullest extent!



Hey, Pops! Thatch died and then Ace died, too!



I looked up to you and longed to be like you but you got old!



You can't even save your man from getting k*lled now!



I tried not to k*ll Ace at the Banaro Island for you!



That bastard!



Oh no no, it's no use!



There's no Devil Fruit power that works against me!



Vortex!



Do you like my darkness, Pops?!



It drags in and nullifies even the powers of Devil Fruits!



Which means you can't create earthquakes anymore!



I can't believe Pops got hit like that!



Oops!



Don't you get it yet?!



How do you like my power?!



It's no use!



What a poor sport, Pops!



Ouch! Damn!



It hurts!



Arrogance, thoughtlessness... Those are your weaknesses!



Hey, don't!



Pops, don't!



I'm your son!



How can you k*ll me...?



You did it! Pops!



No, look at that!



Damn! I can't believe it! He's tough!



A final blow! Give him a final blow, Pops!



--Just one more hit!--Finish him off!



Pops!



Pops! What's wrong?!



He isn't moving!



I don't think he's frozen by choice!



On top of his worsening health,



he's taking a lot of damage from all this fierce fighting!



Pops' body is already beyond...!



Y-You damn monster!



You useless old man!



Shut up and die!



Pops!!



k*ll him, guys!



Pops!!



sh**t him! Riddle him with b*ll*ts!



Pops!



Pops!



Pops!



Did you say that you're gonna die soon, Roger?



Yeah, it's only a matter of time.



Do you want me to tell you how to get to Raftel, Whitebeard?



I'm not gonna go there anyway because I've no interest.



Do you know what people of the World Government call me these days?



"Gold Roger."



What? Is that your real name?



No, no!



My name is Gol D. Roger.



I meet people with "D" in their names sometimes.



I have a crew member who has it. His name is Teach.



What does "D" stand for?



Ah, do you wanna know that?



Alright, I tell you.



It's a story from way back...



Whoa, I'm out of b*ll*ts! Hey, give me another g*n!



You don't need it!



Whitebeard is unconscious now!



He's gonna collapse if you push him with your finger!



It's not you!



You're still alive?!



The man that Roger is waiting for...



...is not you, Teach, at any rate!



Like there are people who will inherit Roger's will,



some people inherit Ace's sometime in the future!



Even if you break their blood bond,



you'll never be able to extinguish their flame!



That's how it came down unbroken throughout the ages!



And someday in the future,



carrying hundreds of years of history on his shoulder,



someone will fling down the gauntlet in front of the world!



Sengoku! You and the World Government are afraid of...



...the gigantic w*r that will embroil the whole world in one day!



I've no interest in it but...



...when someone finds the treasure, the world will turn upside down!



And I'm sure somebody will find it!



And that day will come!



The One Piece...



...is real!!



You bastard!



What great last words!



--Pops!--Pops!



Pops...



Forgive me, my sons.



I raised such a ridiculous fool.



You guys gave me everything.



This is it for me.



I've been traveling a very long time.



Let's sail out!



It was a great voyage!



That's odd! What kind of pirate doesn't have interest in treasures?



What is it that you want?



Hey, Newgate!



There is something that I've wanted since I was a kid.



Oh, you have something? Why don't you tell us?



A family.



"A family?" What is he talking about?!



I have deep appreciation.



Goodbye, my sons!



Good old man...



He-He died...



...standing!



Whitebeard passed away!



Although he's dead, his body doesn't collapse!



And the way he mowed down enemies with wounds all over his body...



...was certainly monstrous!



The number of sword wounds he received in this w*r is indeed !



The number of g*n wounds: !



And he was shot by a cannon  times!



Yet,



on his proud back...



...or in his whole pirate life,



there is no scar that he got while running away!



The Navy sweeps in to



wipe out the pirates as the loss of Whitebeard slows their retreat,



and Akainu stands once again in front of the unconscious Luffy.



Meanwhile, Blackbeard prepares to reveal



what he's really plotting to the whole world!

the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.

also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.

the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.

will speed along the Grand Line again today!

You guys gave me everything.

Extra! Get ready to issue an extra!



Here is the breaking news!



Whitebeard died shortly after "Fire Fist" Ace! I repeat!



--At Marineford...--Whitebeard is...



...Dead!



Then this is it for the Whitebeard Pirates!



--The w*r will be over soon!--We can live in peace finally!



People who witnessed with their own eyes



the historic event which is being reported...



...stand transfixed, words frozen on their lips.



So Whitebeard's gone now...



He was  years old.



He stood even against the King of the Pirates in his day.



He was the captain of the Whitebeard Pirates



and was the great pirate Edward Newgate...



...aka Whitebeard.



He died in the decisive w*r at the bay of Marineford between...



...the Whitebeard Pirates and the Navy Headquarters



and their ally The Seven Warlords.



This is great!



Things are really gonna change in the world!



But even before that,



I don't think that things will settle down that easily here!



With the most heinous criminals and the jail manager of Impel Down,



I wonder what Blackbeard is up to.



What's gonna happen?



Is this really the end of the w*r?



Also, the thing that Whitebeard said before he died...



The One Piece...



...is real!!



It's a matter of time before the world finds out!



I wonder how the pirates will react!



But even before that, can we say this w*r is really over?



Why did Blackbeard come to Marineford?



That bastard!

But you better hold your tongue for now!

Okay!

Captain Buggy!



I couldn't do it!



Black Hole!

--Let us help you!--Oh no, wait...

Whitebeard was scary!



The man at the top is scary, even if he is dead!



I don't care if you think that I'm hopeless! I say goodbye to you fools!



Captain Buggy!

I know why! "Yesterday's enemy could be today's d!"



He felt pity for his rival Whitebeard as a human without even noticing!



He could've k*lled that guy!

more important than k*lling Whitebeard!

all the fame he was surely going to get!

You're way too cool, Captain Buggy!

Fire!

Navy!



I'll show you what I'm capable of!



We'll turn against each other again!



Black Hole!

And now...



...this is...!



That pose is...!

...the power of Tremor-Tremor Fruit!



W-Why does he possess the late Whitebeard's power?!



You did it, Captain!



We're not gonna disband then?



It looks like I made the right choice by teaming up with them!



Pops' tremor power?!



What did he do, that bastard Teach!



The gravity of darkness brings total annihilation!



And the power of tremor destroys everything!



I possess them both! No one can compete with me now!



I'm the strongest man in the world!



I don't know how he did it but...



he acquired Whitebeard's power!



How is it possible?!

If I'm correct, it's impossible to have two Devil Fruit powers at the same time!



It's impossible for average people, that's for sure.



But Teach is a little different, as you guys know.



His body structure is irregular compared to common people's.



That's why he was able to do it!



Hey, did you guys see that?!



Tell all the people in the world! The boring people who love peace,



Navy soldiers, the World Government, and pirates!



This must be a bad dream!



The future of this world is determined!



Yes, here comes the era that I conquer!

I thought that the w*r would be over soon!

Blackbeard freely uses the power he stole from Whitebeard to wreak havoc.

chase down the pirates in the name of justice.



The battle shows no sign of coming to an end,



but only increases in intensity!



On the next episode of One Piece!



"The Insatiable Akainu! Lava Fists Pummel Luffy!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

I'm gonna call the Kuja's ship so we can go



across the Calm Belt even with this submarine.



If the Government finds out that Luffy's alive, they're gonna come after him!



Let us harbor him at the Maiden Island!



What?!



If they still see me as a w*rlord, Luffy can rest safely!



Luffy...



At Hancock's suggestion,



Luffy is taken to Maiden Island so his wounds can heal,



and there he finally regains consciousness.



But as his memories of the battle return,



Luffy is overtaken by deep despair.



On the net episode of One Piece!



"Landing at the Maiden Island! The Harsh Reality Falls upon Luffy!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

To the future I believe in...



The time is the Great Pirate Era.



Countless pirates fight desperately for the One Piece,



the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned to rubber after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.



As Luffy and his friends overcome numerous adventures,



the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.



This is exciting!



What kind of adventure is waiting for us next?!



The crew, on its way to the New World,



will speed along the Grand Line again today!



Separated from the rest of the Straw Hats,



Luffy made a raid on the Navy HQ to rescue his brother, Ace who was to be ex*cuted!



But his struggle ended in vain



and the historic w*r of the Best in Marineford has ended.



"Landing at the Maiden Island! The Harsh Reality Falls upon Luffy!"



WEST BLUE



A pirate ship is approaching Lascamp, West Blue!



But bases in that area have no ships!



The nearest bases outside of that area are...



The th division will send back-up!



This is South Blue checking the location of the site!



Dammit!



I thought pirates would be



afraid of us after k*lling Whitebeard and gaining victory!



Instead of laying low, they are going wild everywhere!



What's gotten into them?



Pirates have made a raid on Lascamp!



We lost touch with the site! Send back-up!



I repeat, send back-up to Lascamp!



Load supplies! Let's head for the Grand Line!



Two weeks after the w*r of the Best,



people start to seeing effects around the world.



Y-You can't come any further! Don't come into our town!



You heard the news, didn't you?



Then you know that this island is no longer Whitebeard's territory.



This symbol is meaningless now!



That's right! Whitebeard is dead!



Listen, and engrave this in your mind!



The man who takes control of this island from today is me -



the pirate Brownbeard!



The w*r ended with the death of Whitebeard and the victory of the Navy.



But contrary to what the Navy thought,



the situation has grown tense all over the world.



Meanwhile, a short time ago,



Hancock, Jimbei and others decided



to head to the Maiden Island to harbor the unconscious Luffy



and joined up with the Kuja's ship.



--Big Sis!--Big Sis!



Snake Princess-sama!



Sorry that I made you worry, Sandersonia, Marigold, and everyone!



Thank you for your warm greeting!



We are all so grateful for your great work as a w*rlord!



Alright then, this is it for my role in supporting Straw boy.



Heehaw!



Do you mind if I leave the rest up to you, Jimbei?



Yes. I can't swim as I want yet.



The least I can do is stay here until he gets well.



I don't know how I can help him, though.



It was a curious turn of fate to meet you.



I agree.



Although we were both locked up in



the greatest prison in the world - Impel Down,



if it weren't for Luffy-kun,



we would have never met each other at all I suppose.



We both tried really hard to keep up with Straw boy at Marineford, didn't we?



It's hard to say goodbye to you



but I have sweet candies waiting for me to come back to the kingdom.



Please take good care of Straw boy!



Bye, Straw Hat! Thank you for letting us out!



My dream can come true because of you!



Say "hi" to him when he wakes up!



--See you again if we have a chance!--Hang in there!



You can't die, Straw Hat!



Okay, let's go!



To the New Kamas' home and our mecca!



To the Kamabakka Kingdom! Heehaw...



We have to head for the Maiden Island, too.



And the pirate ship that Luffy is on arrived at the Maiden Island - Amazon Lily,



the female-only empire where men are prohibited



and Kuja, the tribe of female fighters, lives.



--Snake Princess-sama!--Welcome back!



I'm so glad that the princess is safe!



There are men on the strange ship in the back!



--Look! There are only women!--It's true that it's a female-only island!



--They snuck into the ship! Unforgivable!--W-Wait!



--Smells nice!--I feel lightheaded!



This must be heaven!



Hey, you guys.



You gotta go back in, otherwise you'll die.



People, stop! They're not our enemy!



Snake Princess-sama!



Luffy is in that ship!



He suffered greatly, mentally and physically, during the battle at Marineford



and he is hanging between life and death now.



Luffy's here?!



Ladies, carry Luffy to the Kuja Castle as soon as possible!



--I'm gonna look after Luffy...--Wait a minute, Snake Princess!



Granny Nyon!



It's fine if it's just Luffy.



But we can't allow those men on that strange ship



to step foot onto the Maiden Island.



It's against our country's policy!



Then, let's just allow the doctor to come with him so...



No!



We can't allow any men to come onto the island, even if he is a doctor!



We have so many good doctors on this island!



Well, I don't care either way but...



...do you have the same medical equipment and technology as my ship?



If his wound opens up, he's going to die.



Take Straw Hat-ya if you don't care about it.



Luffy's gonna die?!



If that happens by any chance... Oh, I'm gonna... I'm gonna...



It's obvious that we can't save Luffy-kun without this man.



If he can't come in, we have no choice.



We must go somewhere else.



Impossible! We'd be att*cked by the Sea Kings!



Even if we get away from them, the Navy could find us at anytime!



What should we do?!



Oh, well... We only do it as an exception but...



...you can stay in the area of the bay.



The Sea Kings won't attack you there.



Then, I'll stay with them to look after Luffy...



No!



Damn Granny Nyon! You just keep saying "no" to me!



Luffy! I hope you'll get better soon!



Looking at Snake Princess-sama,



I can tell that Luffy is in critical condition.



Luffy...



Two weeks have passed.



Law and others are staying in the bay...



...to provide Luffy with treatment.



How much longer do we have to stay in such a small space...



Yeah, the only thing to look forward to is...



--Guys, sorry to keep you waiting!--It's a meal time.



Finally!



Here it is.



--The only consolation is that the food is good!--I agree!



--Here you go!--Thank you...



Please don't push and wait for your turn.



Aphelandra!



Don't talk to men!



Luffy is the exception because of the princess' orders.



Don't forget!



Okay!



Come on, it's no big deal! Right, Aphelandra-chan?



I'm not gonna say it again!



We're sorry!



Excuse me.



Is Luffy awake?



I see.



It's up to Straw Hat-ya's spirit.



Whether he's willing to live or not.



--Margaret, let's go already!--I'm coming!



I'm sorry! Take good care of Luffy!



Margaret, how many times do I have to tell you not to talk to them?!



I'm sorry!



Big Sis...



Luffy...



You've always been like this, Luffy!



You've never even listened to me...



...and always done such crazy things!



Don't do it...



Don't do it!



--Stop it, Straw Hat!--You wanna destroy the ship?!



Ace...



Luffy-kun!



Ace...



Ace...



Where's Ace?!



This is dangerous! Calm down, Straw Hat!



What is going to happen if we leave him like that?



Well, it's simple. Like I said when we got here,



if his wound opens up, he will die.



Yes, now is the chance!



--Let me go, dammit!--Stay still, Straw Hat!



--Shut up! I'm looking for Ace!--I told you that "Fire Fist" is...



I said "let me go"!



Where's Ace?!



--Ace!!--Damn! He's out of control!



--It's Luffy!--We got to tell Snake Princess-sama!



Snake Princess-sama! Snake Princess-sama!



Luffy woke up!



--Luffy-sama?!--Really?!



I'm glad. I wanna see him right away!



You can't, Snake Princess!



Everybody wants to see him.



You can't discipline your people if you allow yourself to go and see him.



Men are prohibited on this island.



We let strange men stay at the bay area



and that's enough of an exception for us!



I know, but...



Before that, Big Sis, you need to eat something.



That's right, Big Sis! You've barely eaten since you got back!



That's right! Luffy must be very hungry, too!



Fix a lot of great dishes that will give him energy!



Yes, we'd be happy to!



I'm gonna help you! Ladies, let's do it now!



Yes, Snake Princess-sama!



I should just let her do that. She just wants to fix some food...



Then I'm gonna take them to him!



So you're going?!



We promised that when he gets well, we would invite Luffy alone.



Wait for that moment!



I can't! I am an empress! Don't tell me what to do!



I said no!



The most important thing is the hereditary policy of this country!



Honestly! You're infected by such a strong virus!



I can't believe that the fearful pirate empress has become love sick!



However, he must have been like a small ant



diving into a tempest at Impel Down and the Navy HQ.



It must have been an act of God to let him live and be brought back here.



I wonder what God expects from him.



--Hey, pass me the wrench.--Okay, here you go.



Hey, do you think you can fix the ship?



Yeah, I'll manage.  That aside, where did Straw Hat go?



Jimbei is gone, too.



I don't know.



Well, I heard that if a man enters the



Maiden Island, he's gonna be turned to stone



but maybe it's worth dying for.



According to Aphelandra-chan, not all women were there at the port.



The female-only island that I dreamed of! I wish I could take a look inside!



You're gonna die, you idiot.



I wonder if there are female bears...



It's Maiden Island!



I'm sorry.



Only humans! There are only humans!



I'm really sorry!



Where am I?



Maybe it was all a dream...



I'm sorry, Luffy...



I couldn't make it all the way.



Go away! Go away!



Luffy!



No!



Go away! Go away!



If I don't escape death...



I'm sorry but could you look after my brother?



The w*r is over!



Ace-san is...



Don't say it! Don't say anything!



I already pinched myself hard enough to rip my skin!



If it were a dream, I should've woken by now!



It's not a dream, is it?



Ace is really dead, isn't he?!



Yes, he is dead!



Hey grandpa, who is Ace?



Oh, he is...



...the guy who will become your brother!



Luffy! I'll see you at the top of the pirates' world!



Come to the top!



Ace!!



Next week is a special collaboration with Toriko!



Those Barbecue Pigs are scary!



Whew, I'm stuffed! That was tasty!



Apparently there are lots more of these things!



Really?!



That's what Toriko said! I wanna go home!



Okay! We're going with Toriko!



What?!



Next week, the special Toriko x One Piece collaboration episode!



"The Strongest Tag-Team! Luffy and Toriko's Hard Struggle!"



Don't miss it!
