comment:
When the Thousand Sunny drifted into unknown waters,



the crew landed on Hungry-la Island, an island brimming with strange foods,



to restock their exhausted food supplies.



There they met the Gourmet Hunter Toriko and the chef Komatsu,



and they teamed up to capture the legendary Hungry-la Bird.



Gum-Gum Gatling!



Fork!



Knife!



Thank you for this excellent meal.



And so, the time passed on their lively feast...



Now this goes in...



Hey, could I get some more soup?



Just a moment, please.



Here we go...



What's that?



They're spice seeds.



When I put these in, the spices take effect and change the soup's flavor.



"The Strongest Tag-Team! Luffy and Toriko's Hard Struggle!"



Whew, I'm stuffed!



That Hungry-la Bird was delicious!



You're really not going to include this Hungry-la Bird in your Full Course Meal?



Yeah, that's the thing...



What's wrong?



He says Komatsu and Nami are gone!



What left these tracks?



Something smells good.



It's the aroma of fine cocoa.



These tracks were definitely left by Cocoalas.



Cocoalas?



I've never seen one myself, but they're Capture Level .



Their meat doesn't taste good enough to eat,



but sweet cocoa beans of the highest quality grow on their backs.



Something that fancy took Nami-san and the chef?



No, they probably carried them back to their nest.



Cocoalas are omnivorous.



They'll take anything and store it as food.



And they make their nests in Multi-fruit Trees.



Multi-fruit?



A fruit that combines the sweet and savory flavors



of wintermelons, watermelons, apples, mangos, and other fruits.



It's also known as the Fruit Parlor of the Earth!



I'd love to eat one!



You're more worried about food than about your friend?!



So where can we find these things?



In order to grow the sweetest fruit,



Multi-fruit Trees are said to grow where the sunlight is most abundant.



Found it!



So that's it?



There's no doubt. That's Multi-fruit!



Nami-san! I'm coming!



Just you wait, Multi-fruit!



I feel so sorry for Komatsu right now...



Luffy... What happened to our food?



Luffy...



Usopp...



You've aged a lot.



At this rate, you're gonna end up all bones, like Brook.



Nice skull joke...



Still...



What's this vapor?



A geyser?



Yow!



Look out!



You don't know where they'll burst up from!



That's really hot!



But it's sweet! It's chocolate!



What?! Really?!



Quit making your eyes sparkle and just run!



While we're doing this, Nami-san is...



What's that?



A big one's coming!



Hot!



Crap! A river!



What's wrong?



People with Devil Fruit powers can't swim!



What?!



Huh? This isn't water.



Cream?



It's a river of whipped cream!



Tasty!



All right, not much longer now!



Once we're through this forest, we'll be at the Multi-Fruit Tree.



What was that?!



I knew it. A Caste Leo.



Caste Leo?



Caste Leo (Mammal Beast) Capture Level 



Capture Level .



Their manes are exquisite, fluffy castella cake!



Growling in that super deep voice... Is this supposed to be a joke?



We're going to where Nami and Komatsu are!



I won't let anyone get in our way, no matter who it is!



Luffy!



What is that?



Sound shock waves!



His castella sponge cake emits sound.



It's like a giant speaker.



Isn't there any way to beat it?



Well, can you draw his att*cks straight ahead?



Right!



Okay, now!



Toriko!



His sound attack only works directly in front of him!



We can get him from the sides!



Threefold



Nail Punch!



Amazing!



What was that?!



I drive multiple punches into one spot, like hammering in nails.



It's my Nail Punch.



There were this many of them?



And they're huge.



These guys roam in prides.



Five Caste Leos and one small Caste Leo...



Looks like we're surrounded.



What?!



Spatula!



Such a beautiful way to make an entrance.



Sunny!



Poison r*fle!



Endorphin Smoke!



What now?!



It suddenly got quiet.



Hey, Toriko.



Coco! Rin!



Toriko! I'm so glad you're safe!



An angel has come down!



Wow! They're your friends, Toriko?



Well, yeah...



But what are you doing here?



We heard that you had set out to capture a Hungry-la Bird,



so we came to tell you the secret of Hungry-la Island...



Anyway! I can't believe you left me behind! You're awful, Toriko!



It was so hard to find this island!



I'm so mad!



By the way...



Where's Komatsu-kun?



Actually, he was taken by Cocoalas.



What?!



Yeah! Our friend is with him, too!



That creature is unreal! It talked!



They've recovered, huh?



We don't have time to deal with these guys!



Quick! We've gotta go save Nami!



These guys are gonna be a pain, though.



Beautiful...



A heart that cares for its friends...



That is more beautiful than anything.



Toriko, leave this to us, and go save Komatsu.



We'll be fine on our own!



You guys...



All of you, hurry!



Thanks!



I'm counting on you!



I'll get that Multi-fruit, no matter what!



Multi-fruit?



What about Komatsu-kun?



Does it seem like Toriko's goal is different from everyone else's?



Well, in any case...



We will take you on!



What is it, Toriko?



Oh, I was just wondering why the Caste Leos didn't attack the Cocoalas,



since their Capture Level is lower.



Huh?



To get to the top of the mountain,



the Cocoalas must have passed through the Caste Leos' area.



Carrying Komatsu and your friend would've slowed the Cocoalas down.



They should've been prime prey for the Caste Leos.



And they were obviously hungry.



There must be some reason why they didn't eat the Cocoalas.



I've got a bad feeling about this.



Put me down, you monster koalas!



This is...



Multi-fruit!



It's my first time seeing them! I'm so moved!



Huh?!



I wonder what they taste like...



I wonder how they should be cooked to bring out their flavors...



Forget about that!



Think about what's happening to you right now!



That's Nami-san's voice!



Sanji!



Nami-san!



Koalas... Huh?



Luffy! Sanji-kun!



Toriko-san!



Nami!



That's...



A Knock-out Koala!



So he's their boss?



Knock-out Koala (Marsupial Beast) Capture Level 



They say that when Cocoalas reach adulthood, they become Knock-out Koalas,



but I've never heard of one getting that big.



Now I know why the Caste Leos didn't attack the Cocoalas.



They were afraid of the Cocoalas' boss, the Knock-out Koala!



So now he's shown his true colors.



Oh, boy... So if we don't beat these guys, we can't save Nami-san anyway?



How are they so fast?!



So the Capture Level of Cocoalas in battle mode exceeds , eh?



Hey, Toriko!



Luffy! Toriko!



Hey!



You guys can handle things here!



What?!



Got it!



Luffy, Toriko! Take care of Nami-san!



Right!



We'll save Nami!



What?!



Um, what about me?!



I won't let you get in Luffy and Toriko's way!



Something's making a lot of noise.



There's no helping it.



Nothing's gonna happen if we just wait around here.



Let's take the ship around to the other side of the island.



I'm too hungry to move...



So this is what they call "bones broken for nothing"...



And I'm nothing but bones...



Quit your whining! Unfurl the sails!



Luffy!



Toriko-san!



Luffy! You okay?



Yeah!



Damn that thing... It can't really only be Level !



Not bad!



Hey, you! Give back Nami!



Yeah! Give me the Multi-fruit!



What?! You didn't come to save me?!



Luffy!



Toriko!



It's incredibly strong!



Okay, now it's my turn!



Gum-Gum—



Knife!



Using Nami and Komatsu to shield yourself is playing dirty!



Toriko!



Nami! Komatsu!



That's a Multi-fruit Tree for you.



Huh?



It can support that Knock-out Koala's intense movements without even budging.



What's more, the recoil gives its attack power a huge boost!



Sounds like a pain.



But...



Those huge stems must be sending tons of nutrients to the fruit.



Multi-fruit...



I swear I will eat you!



He's still talking about that?!



Yeah!



Luffy! You, too?!



What are you thinking?!



I give thanks...



...for all this world's bounty.



Now let's eat!



H-Hey!



Gum-Gum...



...Nail Punch!



Thank you for this excellent meal.



Now, I'll just help myself to that Multi-fruit...



Huh?



What's going on? It's waving around.



Wh-What's happening?



You guys...



Hey, this is unreal!



Huh?



Everyone get down the mountain!



What?!



The island is about to show its true form.



Its true form?



I told you that we came to tell you the secret of Hungry-la Island, right?



Yeah.



You okay?



It's sweet.



Yum! This is caramel!



What?



It's true!



What's going on?



The legend of Hungry-la Island has been recorded



in many texts since ancient times.



Our predecessors have transcribed those texts and handed



them down throughout history to the present.



That's why we relied on the legends in those texts to find this island



and capture the phantom ingredient, the Hungry-la Bird.



But it turns out the phantom ingredient is not the Hungry-la Bird.



Huh?



You know, the characters for "bird" and "island" look similar.



Hungry-la Bird Hungry-la Island



Apparently, whoever transcribed it read the name wrong.



Then, the phantom ingredient is...



Not the Hungry-la Bird, but Hungry-la Island?!



No wonder the Hungry-la Bird was such an easy opponent!



This island itself is the legendary ingredient...



A natural pudding à la mode!



Amazing!



What the heck is this?!



I wonder if Luffy and the others are okay...



Delicious!



This luxurious sweetness achieved by condensing a multitude of fruits!



So this is the Multi-fruit!



It is indeed the Fruit Parlor of the Earth!



Hey, Toriko, you think this whole mountain is made of pudding?!



You're right! It's delicious!



Hey! I was gonna eat that part!



What's the problem?! There's plenty!



Oh, and apparently the next mountain is all ice cream!



What?! You should've said so sooner!



Wow! This castella is tasty, too!



Isn't that the mane of one of those Caste Leos?



What?!



So after you ate all that, you're not using any of it in your Full Course Meal?



Well, it's a big world.



I'm sure there's still lots more delicious food out there.



You really are a big eater!



We're stocked up on food now.



We can set sail anytime.



Okay!



Well, we're gonna get going.



Right. Let's meet again somewhere.



Next time, I'll treat you to my life's Full Course Meal.



Sure! I look forward to it, Toriko!



See ya, Luffy!



Bye!



So long!



A cheerful goodbye is a nice thing, but...



Who the heck are they?



Okay, now that we've got food supplies, we're leaving these waters!



That's all pudding!



No, no! Pudding is a very variable good that tastes like



sea urchin if you put soy sauce on it...



If you want sea urchin, get it from the sea!



Well, Komatsu, ready to get going, too?



On our journey to find new ingredients!



Yes, Toriko-san!



His heart deeply wounded after losing Ace,



Luffy remembers his life ten years ago.



Ace, who wouldn't accept anyone, and Luffy, who followed him everywhere.



The story of the strange bond that led them to become brothers begins...



On the next episode of One Piece!



"Luffy and Ace! The Story of How the Brothers Met!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

To the future I believe in...



The time is the Great Pirate Era.



Countless pirates fight desperately for the One Piece,



the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned to rubber after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.



As Luffy and his friends overcome numerous adventures,



the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.



This is exciting!



What kind of adventure is waiting for us next?!



The crew, on its way to the New World,



will speed along the Grand Line again today!



After losing his brother Ace during the w*r of the Best against the Navy,



Luffy made it to the Maiden Island



where he was consumed with unbearable sorrow.



There is, however, an untold story of the brothers...



... years ago in the East Blue - Luffy and Ace as boys.



Luffy has been left with Dadan - the mountain bandit of Mt. Corvo



and met  precocious kids named Ace and Sabo



with whom he pledged to be brothers forever.

we're brothers!



Yeah!!

Let's go!



You can't get away!



Yes! I got him!

Yeah!

Hey, look!



Luffy, watch your back!



Back?



A big tiger!



He caught wind of our prey!



Luffy, get away from there! He just wants the danpa!



That's my prize! I'm not gonna let you...



...h-h-have it!



He's too tough for you! Get away now!



No! Go away, stupid!



Otherwise, I'm gonna beat you up!



--That fool!--Luffy!



You bastard! Gum-Gum...



You bastard...



Gum-Gum...



Wait, wait, wait!



Let's run while he's distracted!



Okay!



I'll get even with you!



Sorry about your first prize.



Leave him alone. We had no chance against that tiger.



But that was my prize! He can't just steal it!



Y-Y-You fool! Don't shake it!



--You little...!--Stop, Luffy!



Sabo! Pull us up now!



I-I got it!



Sorry!



We're home finally! Let's just go to bed on such a bad day



Go to bed on a bad day?



Oh, I'm starving!



--It's your fault!--Ouch!



But if someone steals the prize you caught by yourself for the first time,



I can see why someone would get angry.



--But it's reckless to fight such a big tiger...--That's something you would do!



Humph! Shut up!



It's great to have brothers! If they come aboard my ship...



Captain, you keep out of this!



Leave it to us!



No, I'll fight too because I'm a captain!



Why are you laughing?



That's not gonna make your stomach full.



I made up my mind!



Ace! Sabo! You guys gotta come aboard my ship! Okay? Say yes!



That's so sudden!



We decided to leave it to the future.



But it'd be fun to be with each other



and you'll need my help, won't you?



You're the one who needs help, aren't you?



Yeah.



No!



I'm gonna help you!



You guys are welcome to come aboard my ship.



--No, my ship!--No, my ship!



Then, this is not gonna work.



--Are you sure about it?--Yeah.



Sabo?



I'm not gonna work for anyone. Forget it.



Come on! It's gonna be fun!



Oh yeah! How about this?



The one who beats the big tiger can be the captain!



The big tiger? Are you serious?



The chances of you becoming a captain are pretty low.



That's not true! None of us can compete against him now!



--Good idea!--Good idea!



Yeah! Let's do it!



--Alright!--Alright!



Are you ready?



Yeah!



We went through so much to catch these. What a waste!



Don't complain. We caught these to use them as bait.



Oh? There he comes!



What a greedy bastard! He can't have them today!



He's here!



Is that the tiger?



What?! It's a bear!



That's not what we expected! Go away! Shoo! Shoo!



Wait, it seems like he's as strong as the tiger.



We can't beat the tiger if we can't beat him.



I see! So he's perfect for practice.



--I go first!--That's not fair!



That's cheating!



Oh no! He's not cooling off!



He's gonna k*ll us!



W-Who is it?!



He better run - that old man!



That's Naguri from Gray Terminal!



Run! He's coming to you!



What're you doing, old man?!



You know that you don't belong here!



Go back to the forest now!



Cool!



It's like that time before!



What?! You were a pirate and a captain, Naguri?!



Yes, indeed.



I knew it! Only a pirate captain could do that!



"That"?



You made the big bear turn away just by staring at him like Shanks!



You're cool, old man!

making weird stuff,



and getting teased by the people



at the Gray Terminal and by Bluejam's crew.

You know nothing, Sabo! That's how pirates are!



You don't know anything, either!



What do you know about pirates?!



I know pirates! Shanks doesn't do needless killings!



Shanks, again.



Hey, it's cooked.



--Ow, ow, ow...!--Ouch!



Oh, you got more than me!



You got to pay attention.



Have some, Naguri. You helped us.



Oh, thank you.



So, what is a pirate captain doing in a place like this?



How could you ask me that?



You don't have to answer if you don't want to.



No, I'll tell you.



Do you guys know Gold Roger?



Roger?



I know him! He was the King of the Pirates!



We challenged Roger, the King of the Pirates, to a fight!



Really?!



But we lost the fight and split up.



And everything just went downhill after that



and I ended up like this.



That's basically what happened.



But you fought with the King of the Pirates, right? That's cool!



No, no, we were no match for him.



We got beaten badly.



Oh really? Even you were no match - that's how much he...



Yes. And not just Roger, his crew was also very strong!



Most importantly, their teamwork was in perfect coordination!



It was our honor to fight with them.



I see! I still have a long way to go to become a pirate.



Are you interested in pirates?



--I'm gonna become one!--Become a pirate?



Yes, a pirate! Oh yeah, old pirate man, could you give me some tips?!



I want to get stronger!



I have to become a captain to lead Ace and Sabo!



A captain?



Hey, say yes! You're a pirate master!



--Okay!--Okay?!



Yeah! Then, let's start from tomorrow!



Where did Ace go?!



Yeah, about that...



What?!



The King of the Pirates is his father?!



Yeah. But you can't tell anybody.



Don't mention it to Ace. He's gonna k*ll you.



Why?



I don't know why but he doesn't like Roger for sure.



But that's his father, right?



So what?



I'm sorry for both of you but I was all by myself even if I had parents!



Oh yeah. Your parents...



Children don't always get along with their parents.



But, what a shame! He's the King of the Pirates!



I can understand that you wanna ask him about Roger



but just don't, okay?



Uh-huh! I got it!



And... you too, Naguri.



Okay, I got it.



But I can't believe that that boy is Roger's son...



There he is. Hey, just act casually.



Yeah.



--Don't mention...--I know! Don't worry!



Oh, Ace! I didn't know that you were home!



Oh, Ace! I didn't know that your father was Roger!



I knew he'd say it!



You idiot, Luffy! I told you to not to mention it!



--Luffy!--Yeah!



Who told you that?



Sabo told me!



Hey Ace, what was Roger like?!



No!



How stupid are you? Don't just say it casually!



Let me go! I am acting casually.



--Ouch!--Ouch!



Don't you ever mention that name when I'm around!



Why did you hit me?! Don't be mean - just tell me!



Give people a chance to explain first!



Shut up!



Tell us about him! You're so mean!



He's right! You can't have a secret from your brothers!



Shut up! I don't care about my brothers!



Roger, Roger, Roger! Ace's father is the King of the Pirates!



Shut up! Don't provoke him!



When you get down to it, it's your fault for being a bigmouth!



Ouch! What did you say?!



What are you doing?!



We're no longer brothers from today!



--That's what I was gonna say!--That's what I was gonna say!



Alright, I'm counting on you.



Yes, I'll leave no stone unturned.



You know what you should do.



We'll get to it!



Yeah, but if you find him, don't do anything yet.



What?



Can't you see? We have to make his father feel indebted to us.



The longer he worries, the more he'll appreciate us when we find Sabo.



I see.



Until the time comes, don't do anything - just monitor him.



"We will have a visit this spring"?



Dogra! Magra! Where is the country called Goa?!



Mt. Corvo, Gray Terminal, and Windmill Village



are part of Goa Kingdom supposedly.



That's what I thought.



Easy, easy, boss.



It's rare to see you reading a newspaper. Hell must be freezing over.



Ouch!



Somebody's gonna visit the Kingdom?!



It's making the headlines...



What's going on here? Are they that big a deal?



A CELESTIAL DRAGON WILL VISIT



These Celestial Dragons?



Curious after Luffy is taken in as an apprentice, Ace and Sabo visit Naguri again.



Seeing that the boys only care about getting strong enough to beat a tiger,



Naguri tells them that they can't become pirate captains just by being strong.



What does it really take to be a pirate captain?!



On the next episode of One Piece!



"The Battle against the Big Tiger! Who is Going to be Captain?!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

Ace?

they gained strength and honed their skills by fighting with Naguri...



...growing both physically and mentally.

they called me "Captain" until the last minute.

Cool! It's awesome!

I'm really grateful!

Let's go and hunt the big tiger today!

I'm gonna k*ll him and end this stupid training!



I'm gonna k*ll him!

I go first!

You gotta fight me now!

Gum-Gum p*stol!

Run!



Ace! Sabo!



So heavy! How powerful he is!

The time is the Great Pirate Era.



Countless pirates fight desperately for the One Piece,



the great treasure left behind by Gold Roger, King of the Pirates.



Monkey D. Luffy, a boy whose body turned to rubber after he ate the Gum-Gum Fruit,



also takes to the sea to become the next King of the Pirates.



As Luffy and his friends overcome numerous adventures,



the World Government is less and less able to ignore their existence.



This is exciting!



What kind of adventure is waiting for us next?!



The crew, on its way to the New World,



will speed along the Grand Line again today!



After losing his brother Ace during the w*r of the Best against the Navy,



Luffy was consumed with unbearable sorrow.



There is, however, an untold story of the brothers...



... years ago in the East Blue - Luffy and Ace as boys.



"Freedom Taken Away! The Nobles' Plot Closing in on the Brothers!"

We're ready for it! Bring it on!



Oh, cool! It's getting windier and windier!



Luffy, hold on to the flag!

Alright! Come on, wild wind!



Come on, violent storm!

Here it comes!



--Luffy!--Luffy!

Help me!

That's right! We even beat the big tiger of Mt. Corvo!



You little shits!



Let's just finish this up by k*lling their captain!



Okay!



Damn!



Alright, brats, don't move!



I'm not afraid of that!



--Damn! Let me go!--You bastard!



Go away! Or I'm gonna kick your butt!



Let me go, you bastard...

Dad!

Hey!



--Damn! You...!--Sabo!

Ace!



Ack! Hey!

I ran away of my own will!

Don't do it, Sabo!

...please don't hurt these two!



I'm begging you.



They're very important to me,  they're my brothers.



Sabo...



Then go home right now.



You should stop playing pirate. It's just a waste of time.



Hey! Don't go!



Be quiet!



Sabo, run! You don't have to worry about us!



You said you wanna live freely with us!



Sabo, don't go!



Are you gonna put an end to your dream?!



Sabo!



Sabo!



Sabo!!

--Take them to our hideout.--Yes, sir.

Be quiet!



Why did you bring us here?!

It's such an easy life.



Don't you think it's nice?



What are you getting at?!

I'm feeling bad for you guys. Hey, untie them.



Yes, sir.

He's right! We're brothers!



Yeah? Alright, I'm sorry.



But you're not gonna bother that brat, are you?



If you're planning on doing that,



I'd have to k*ll both of you right here.



If you think of him as your brother, it's best to leave him alone.



For Sabo's good?



But Sabo hates the High Town!



You have to let go of him if you really care about him.



You'll understand when you get older. And...



I had an axe to grind with you about what you did to Porchemy



but we can forget about it. I rather liked your show of strength.



That's why I wanted to ask you something. I think you might be interested.



I'm short-handed now. Do you guys wanna work for me?



Well, it's an easy task. It's not dangerous at all.



There is a map of Gray Terminal.



And you just have to carry packages to the locations marked on the map.



Do you wanna do it?



Alright.



How much will you pay?



Ace, I don't like it when Sabo is not around.



Live with it. I don't like it, either. I wanna rescue Sabo.



But I don't know what is really best for him.



Let's see how things go. He's fine.

Let's make some money for the pirate savings for that occasion.



I can't say it. It's not Ace and Luffy's fault.



Why can't you tell the truth?!

If you have a criminal record, it damages your family's reputation



and you can't enter High Town.

having no choice but to get involved in v*olence,



weren't you, Sabo?



Sabo.



The fate of your friends in the Gray Terminal



is in the hands of those pirates.

think about what you have to do.

Can't you understand my dilemma?



Oh, it must be so hard.



I'll take care of the papers.



Welcome back, sir.



Okay, Sabo, let's go. It's been a long while since you left.

Mom.

No, I'm telling you too much.



Go to your room now.



You have to start studying tomorrow.



Are you gonna put an end to your dream?!

Mother and father were always saying that behind the curtain.



But you have the devil's luck



'cuz they're gonna take care of the burnables tomorrow night.

you would've died tomorrow.

if their real son didn't come home...

What's going on? Tell me everything!

has sent a group of observers to go around the East Blue?



They're gonna arrive in Goa Kingdom finally  days from now!

a Celestial Dragon with them so people are panicking!



The members of the royal family don't want him to see our stigma,



so they decided to burn down the Gray Terminal.

There are a lot of people living there!



They can't take away their home!



Let go of me!



Weren't you listening to me?



They're gonna burn up all the shame of this country.



You mean, the people, too?



H-Hey!



Where are you going?



You can't just jump down...



I-It is not my fault.



It's a lie! He must be lying!



It's not possible to burn down an area so large!



They were from this afternoon...



Are we ready for tomorrow? There can't be any miscalculation.



We're ready but the unknown factor is the pirates.



They have to burn the trash precisely.



Bluejam's clan is setting boxes of oil and expl*sives...



...all over the Gray Terminal up until the appointed time tomorrow.



Bluejam has a hand in this? Then it must be true!



But it's so ridiculous!



I wonder how's Sabo doing.



Shut up and go to sleep.



We agreed to let go of Sabo for now.



Alright.



This could be better for him.



Sabo...



Luffy!



Telescope...

Tomorrow morning should be more lovely, shouldn't it?

Everything seems normal as usual.



Today is windy.



Yes, indeed, your Majesty.



Accidents could easily happen on a day like this - especially fires.

Sabo is not in the house?!

He still wants to keep playing pirate without studying?!



Search the whole town!



He can't have gotten out of the town so easily!



--Excuse me, mister.--What do you want?



Do you know that there'll be a fire in the Gray Terminal tonight?



Of course, I know. What about it?



He knows?



Which family are you from?



So it's true!



Hey, kid!



What's going on here? Everybody knows about it?



They all know about it and they're acting normally?!

It's nothing.



Yeah? Okay.



D-Do you know that there'll be a fire in the Gray Terminal tonight?



Yes, I know.



Why doesn't anyone in this town including you look concerned?



Why does no one try to prevent it?



You sound like you're a kind boy.



But, listen carefully.



We all have to keep quiet about the plan!



What if someone outside the town finds out about it?



We're special! If you're from a noble family...



Hey, you!



Ace! Luffy!



There's something wrong with this town! Everybody's crazy!



Even though they know that people will die soon,



they act normally and even smile!



I don't wanna stay here! I gotta tell them quickly!



Today of all days, it's windy!



There he is! Isn't it him?!



There's no doubt! That's the runaway boy!



Hey you, stop!



The people in this country are planning to burn up



their national shame tonight!



You have to get out of the Gray Terminal! Ace! Luffy!



Run! Ace! Luffy!

but the intensely burning flames



are about to devour Luffy and Ace!

"The Fire Has Been Set! The Gray Terminal in Crisis!"



I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

we're brothers!
